_— ORIGINAL MESSAGE —_
Friend,

As a supporter of Democratic campaigns and causes across the country, by now you know all about the public reports campaigns (on both sides of the aisle) have to file every quarter with the FEC. These reports contain vital information to help preserve the foundation of our democracy — because we can all agree that politicians should have to tell us who is funding their campaign and prove to the public they are following the rules.

Today is the final day of the FEC fundraising quarter, so thousands of campaigns across the country are working hard to reach their individual goals. But we want to tell you why today’s deadline is particularly important for our campaign.

**This is the final quarterly FEC report we’ll file before our primary on June 7th — which means it’s one of our last chances to show voters in Montana and pundits across the country that our campaign has what it takes to win this race.**

_**[We’re only $2,448 away from reaching our ambitious goal of $10,000. Can you make a donation of $5 before midnight to help us reach it?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsxXG0f8ek4uZkUFvu9y_DsSuzSaiwdJwfeQrLHMWNTZil2jaUWxS8HOCX5Uhaiamw9u_I4_jUjX1G1ojuFAG56oTKe5eOwEqNCrcGmbVHkhzx0peMJSwUiXdcm7KYzL5FCkBLgGW4Dx6RQ10kCk-ymhmqT34KVyu58_rEKYEklc87qurEQCtRWVnF8hwconahWEJA7dvyMx6w_uT2anQm1Ux-Vi7_zLtUkbWRQt2v5lqffRyVqQh3LYp50gZvim80PmrCViGVhzzKiIPLUGzluTeVz7gnG4HdwEyvzksG-uAGfdCvrUIFqsragPsdMnQNiKJhCYM91OBtEi00yvQw/3ku/r9K1rphORPuFMR9BT0s1iQ/h3/PGauJg7E7roDL_Zfti1w7ztZjGYNMaI6lYd3_26Y4Jg)

_

Our campaign has been focused on the issues that matter most to Montana voters. We are hearing at every campaign stop just how desperate Montanans are to return our state to a place where everyone can succeed and corrupt billionaires stay out of our business.

**We’re also hearing that folks know that Tom Winter is the only Democrat who will have a shot at defeating the corrupt and dangerous Ryan Zinke in November.**

But if we don’t have the resources to make it out of the primary and face off against him in the general election, this race will be over before it even gets started. While this brand new district is currently rated as one of the most competitive districts in the country by outlets like _Sabato's Crystal Ball,_ it will quickly become a shoe-in for Ryan Zinke if Tom isn’t on the general election ballot.

_**[So this is crunch time! Please, make a donation of $5 to our grassroots campaign before midnight tonight to help us prove to Montana voters that we have what it takes to WIN!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsxXG0f8ek4uZkUFvu9y_DsSuzSaiwdJwfeQrLHMWNTZil2jaUWxS8HOCX5Uhaiamw9u_I4_jUjX1G1ojuFAG5rSjY0lWcofCEBFrLl45tjoHaOCh86hB8LM3kpZmjw-HWrWxFKiUaYVTqxHMWwTzFDBqDtjhFi1UBY3si2JU93FDt74kY_uLDS2OvfoQNq5dQKko68O9zUBwpFI2dxnbTk2bkN58-uzDsBJxvexIP4ljLHTPl9RpsBOlzj2i1lf-QmxukR2Iksj5EVXO6_kFfYWcBb6cZstTA31TDyudi_2KoZ4R59pMlFFBLEVy9RL3aDD8wQv3LFldH54eUtXFF/3ku/r9K1rphORPuFMR9BT0s1iQ/h9/9D-4AOCwTnzpBWKMzJwAbrdhzM6RHR1577d4ANJ99Fc)

subject: i won’t make it without your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
Bri just reached out to me to let me know our fundraising numbers aren’t where we want them to be.

| Hey team,

Bri just reached out to me to let me know our fundraising numbers aren’t where we want them to be. The biggest FEC filing deadline is _tonight_ and means a great deal to whether or not we can keep our campaign for the Lowcountry going strong.

I’m ready to represent Lowcountry families and make a positive difference – but I won’t make it to Congress without your support.

name: Erica Smith
subject: Can I follow up?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
#
Hi — it's Erica Smith
I promise this is the last email you’ll get from our campaign tonight.
We’re just hours until our make-or-break FEC deadline, and my team says we’re just **$901 away** from reaching our $40,000 goal.
**Your donation could help us close the gap. Can I count on you to rush a donation right now? Please use your personal ActBlue link below, so I can follow up to thank you:**
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20220331-deadline?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-1**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47718?t=1&akid=1051%2E3698%2EbUPt33)
**I’ll be honest. I need your support now more than ever.** This is one of the most competitive races in the country, and early voting for our primary starts in a few weeks. We need the resources to ramp up our organizing and invest in paid communications to spread our unifying message of economic justice and counter any attacks that will come our way.
On top of that, super PACs, corporate donors, and our opponents will all be looking to see how much money our campaign was able to raise and see if we have what it takes to win the primary and the general election in November.
[**If it works for your budget, can you please chip in whatever you can before midnight to help us hit our FEC fundraising goal and get our message in front of voters?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47719?refcode=em20220331-1051&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1051%2E3698%2EbUPt33) Whether we reach this goal or not will be public, and your donation will show we have the people on our side.
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47719?refcode=em20220331-1051&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1051%2E3698%2EbUPt33)**
Thank you for having my back,
Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220331-1051-footer&t=22&refcode2=1051_3698_bUPt33&akid=1051%2E3698%2EbUPt33)**

clean_body: Hi — it's Erica Smith I promise this is the last email you’ll get from our campaign tonight. We’re just hours until our make-or-break FEC deadline, and my team says we’re just $901 away from reaching our $40,000 goal. Your donation could help us close the gap. Can I count on you to rush a donation right now? Please use your personal ActBlue link below, so I can follow up to thank you: I’ll be honest. I need your support now more than ever. This is one of the most competitive races in the country, and early voting for our primary starts in a few weeks. We need the resources to ramp up our organizing and invest in paid communications to spread our unifying message of economic justice and counter any attacks that will come our way. On top of that, super PACs, corporate donors, and our opponents will all be looking to see how much money our campaign was able to raise and see if we have what it takes to win the primary and the general election in November. Whether we reach this goal or not will be public, and your donation will show we have the people on our side. Thank you for having my back, Erica Smith Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com

Our FEC end-of-quarter deadline is in just 4 hours and we need your support. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4kCaK_5bC3OD60CZPbM9k57k2t4D9lBu58DNdOyN8VVDOX-fkHnex8xD8TVdANnGN2bCjUlR9HMTg8qkCJFBDc3LCwifEusdkeINRYR3-KZRUO0Q8snbgGPQgkXDjlhjjIp2u8wFKKmAdFtNdFk8Vd-ITfQ-5HFmAL-7xnj-kHGzpCqAJ6AT6mOK0Q8AaSHHXSB6j-8fIQQqBZKLNw71uqkdf26x_NeaXY7bAWdDPbXQg/3ku/lmHX2A6nQA-FuPe4jt66rg/h0/6zv3iIm4b-tN0twB9hBhEJJOCZGUo3GBGyJdyhVuv0o) Peter, did you see our last email? If not, we’ll give you a quick update:

We are less than 54 days away from the runoff election and we’re less than 4 hours away from our final FEC deadline.

**Here’s why this matters: This is our last chance to fundraise as much as we can to oust Henry Cuellar this year.** Our opponent's corporate donors are ready to pour thousands into his pockets to re-elect him. And if there is one thing that is clear, this campaign will win because of grassroots supporters like you, Peter. We are not counting on the establishment or corporations to lead us to victory.

Our opponent is going to use our FEC report numbers to gauge the strength of our campaign, and we’re going to show that a campaign powered by small dollar donors can win here in South Texas. We can’t fall short on our last end-of-quarter goal before the runoff.

[_**We’re just 4 hours away from our _last_ FEC end-of-quarter deadline. We’re not taking a single cent from corporate PACs or special interest groups — so we’re relying on support from grassroots activists like you. And if there is one thing that is clear, this campaign will win because of grassroots supporters like you, Peter. We are not counting on the establishment or corporations to lead us to victory. body:
Kathleen asked me to forward this message to her top supporters. We are so close to hitting our end-of-quarter fundraising goal and I'd love to tell K | | | Hey everyone, Kathleen asked me to forward this message to her top supporters. We are so close to hitting our end-of-quarter fundraising goal and we only have 4 hours left to do so! I'd love to tell Kathleen we reached our goal. **[Can you rush in a donation of $5, $15, or whatever you can afford to help us close out this month on a high note before 9pm tonight?](http://links.drharderforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2ce7fc2f213d46c3bce90d6745e9707f&_m=9cf37c3f29b848fe8bfc81e04a43241e&_e=-0eM4By85CWHc3MUrpXy_7i7SA4CrlnXnBmFcgS45qKIpGKknPu5fw4mwQVg9CjmI8vB_-UxV2dCeTDlVenklPhUyn3IJGBpbKx2PdFOE0Xo-f2tKQZyxsiguBScfxjDXJxrcTejnBNuUkcE46ixbyhH_sJVOqvQ55vPv0Dj2HjebBs_QoSdzBvpqf0aNnU0TEfyoZytua3zuNYKumTeIdkO-WPcKnENGtE6ANe3y-MIYMqwAeLX2Pv95XrMmULAfF1BlT_nZs1hYmqhFe6YKlBZwO9osxJADCLzr66TOWY8E4Rs5NjeEl8tn89iee-gJ8NK_gEVYLzcIBUuUYPwP-oHtcXPHIOiz_l41QjifRwigqTy1cnYbz_hXidDFKR-H95IuNfJUyhmjaTuW_5zJA59Mx6KGxItnwLlWqvU2W7vE3gRU2Du2ButIpz0jIOHCYc7ru35nZ5r4llib-pZhXmS3TXberFCBPiIAukZY6LqTB0qYKUbp0_cJuORJa08o__-dj3JHk83vTtBtW_LFY5b5Jyz4zf8U7GBst19Iw4%3D)** We really appreciate all your support and it means a lot to Kathleen. Thank you,
Elise McGovern
Campaign Manager **\--------- Forwarded Message --------** Peter, When Zach and Elise came to me with the quarterly goal of $6,000, I was in shock! I know you and the rest of my supporters are beyond capable, but it was hard for me to conceptualize where that money would come from and how we could get it done in time. subject: Great news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Great news, Peter
—

We’re just TWO percent away from reaching our FEC end-of-quarter
fundraising goal!

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17592?refcode=em20220331-1711&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1711%2E346206%2ErS-4v3 ][IMG]

The good news is that this means we’re just $2,000 away from hitting our
first-ever end-of-quarter goal. But the not-so-good news is that with less
than 4 hours left until midnight ET, there isn’t much time for us to reach
our goal.

Peter, we’re
counting on your support, now more than ever. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17592?refcode=em20220331-1711&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1711%2E346206%2ErS-4v3 ]Will you please chip in
anything you can to our campaign before the midnight deadline? Even $4
makes a meaningful difference.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17592?refcode=em20220331-1711&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1711%2E346206%2ErS-4v3 ]DONATE $4 NOW →

This is our FIRST FEC EOQ deadline now that it’s officially 2022. All eyes
will be on us to see how we perform, and how strong our movement to bring
meaningful, transformative change to Kentucky just is.

Our campaign will be viewed as a test for whether the blue wave will
continue rising across the South and the chances of expanding our
Democratic majority this year.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17592?refcode=em20220331-1711&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1711%2E346206%2ErS-4v3 ]So please,
Peter: If you haven’t made a
donation yet, this is the BEST time to show your support. We’re only 2%
short from reaching our grassroots funded goal and making sure our
campaign has the resources to build a historic voter outreach program in
Kentucky.

Thank you for being a part of our team,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220331-1711-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1711_346206_rS-4v3&akid=1711%2E346206%2ErS-4v3

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: 5 hours left
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
Friend, this is the last email you’ll get from me and my team about our March Quarterly deadline.
We have just five hours left to hit our fundraising goal, and we’re still just a bit behind.**But with just a few more donations, I know we can reach it.** So I’m hoping you can make a contribution, if you’re able. Use this link:
[**https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/go/DeadlineDay**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?refcode=em220331-2-60&refcode2=667_59515_TWJXaI&akid=667%2E59515%2ETWJXaI)
The amount of money we raise, and the number of people who contributed, will be publicly reported after tonight. So we need to make sure we share numbers that everyone on this team, including you, can be proud of.
With gratitude,
Alessandra

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress

body:
If we want to save our district and our country, I need your help now. This is the most important deadline of our campaign, and it all depends on you | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/67c385dc07b2/only-a-few-hours-left-5395278?e=fc83fb200d)

|

|
,

This is it.

In just four hours it will be too late to count any contribution towards our first fundraising quarter.

This first fundraising report is CRITICAL to demonstrating that we're serious about defeating Jennifer Wexton.

If I don't put up the highest number possible, we'll never be able to have a Republican representative in Virginia 10 next year.

We can defeat Jennifer Wexton, but only if YOU help.

[Will you consider making a small donation of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to help my campaign post a strong fundraising number and run the campaign we need to defeat Jennifer Wexton?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=dc9542cde9&e=fc83fb200d)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: This is Some Serious BS
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_some_serious_bs&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Just when you think you've seen it all in politics, you get hit with another con game. **Do you remember the six Con Artist Legislators who reneged on their vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers in 2021? Rep Julie Sandstede was one of them. Her vote to protect Walz' illegal shutdowns crushed small businesses.** Now Julie Sandstede is trying to save face by passing a [bill](https://www.action4liberty.com/rep_sandstede_s_trying_to_put_bandaid?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_some_serious_bs&n=2) that would use your and my surplus money to make $100 Million in grants to the business that were crushed by her own doing.
## What a joke!
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/rep_sandstede_s_trying_to_put_bandaid?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_some_serious_bs&n=3) Sandstede knows that she has a tough election coming up this November. So she's trying to cover up the mess she left in her district. Here's why: **A politician's one goal is to get re-elected.** Trust me though, her voters will remember how she conned them and ruined small businesses. That's because Action 4 Liberty knocked on over 10,000 doors in her district last year. Her voters were furious with how she betrayed them. Action 4 Liberty **puts real pressure** on politicians who vote against our liberties. Our team of door knockers and phone callers are second to none. We're committed to protecting liberty for the next generation. Which means we are constantly fighting against the Power Structure. Peter, as you probably know, the problem isn't ONLY Democrats like Julie Sandstede. The Republican Establishment is also working against you and me because... **A politician's one goal is to get re-elected.** I know, Republican politicians talk a good game about less government. But clearly they are saying one thing and doing the exact opposite. How else could we end up in this mess? Democrats aren't in full control of all branches of our government. Republicans are also voting for this garbage. But they don't want to be EXPOSED. We're supposed to shut up, ignore it and cheer on "Team Red." **Well I'm not okay with that. When I see something wrong, I'm going to confront it!** As you can imagine, that puts a huge target on our backs. We're being attacked by Republican Establishment Politicians and their friends in the Phony News Media. They levy slanderous accusations against us - lie through their teeth (of course they do, they are politicians). **The politicians do this because we are over the target. You see, they know that you and me are getting heavily involved in politics now. And that's resulting in some of their buddies losing endorsements - and eventually, their elections.** So they are trying to derail us. But it won't work. Action 4 Liberty is growing everyday. We're reaching new activists and voters throughout the state. People have woken up and are tired of the same BS! They think they can make a speech or write a "Save Face" bill like Sandstede, and we'll just forgive and forget. NOPE! We're going to keep confronting the Political Class who is destroying this state because its the right thing to do. I need your help fighting back against these politicians. [**Please help my team today with a donation. $25, $50 or $100 can make a HUGE difference in our world. Want to make a bigger impact? Please consider a one time gift of $500.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_some_serious_bs&n=4) **** Thank you in advance. **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_some_serious_bs&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_some_serious_bs&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_some_serious_bs&n=7), software for leaders.

name: Alex Walker
subject: I’m gay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8228?t=6&akid=1679%2E878179%2EvGkrrn) I have a confession: I'm gay.

_I know - shocker!_

But guess who, for some weird, creepy reason is obsessed with it?

Lauren Boebert.

And that bothers me. You see, lawmakers have been targeting the LGBTQ+ community for years, but with the help of extremists like Boebert, they're finally breaking through.

Texas has outlawed all gender affirming medical care for transgender teenagers.

In Iowa, their governor just signed a bill banning transgender girls and women from competing in women's sports.

And right here in Colorado, our own representative is fighting against the Equality Act, a bill that would outlaw discrimination based on sexual orientation and/or gender identity.

She even claims that a law that gives us equal rights encourages the _" supremacy of gays."_

**_This is not a joke. She literally said that._**

And when LGBTQ+ kids see this coming out of an elected official's mouth, it's harmful. They feel scared. They feel isolated. They feel ashamed.

According to the Trevor Project, a young person identifying as LGBTQ+ attempts suicide every 45 seconds. And what Lauren Boebert does makes it worse.

**That 's why I'm running against her. Because we deserve leaders who understand what it's like for people struggling with their identity, mental health, or just coping in such a crazy world.**

We deserve leaders with empathy who work hard to solve actual problems facing real Coloradans.

I know it's tacky... but in order for us to build the team we need to beat Boebert, we're going to need your help.

[**Anything you can give means the world to me and my campaign. Will you join us by splitting a contribution between this campaign and Voter Protection Project to help us hit our end-of-quarter goal?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8228?t=7&akid=1679%2E878179%2EvGkrrn) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8229?t=8&akid=1679%2E878179%2EvGkrrn)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8230?t=9&akid=1679%2E878179%2EvGkrrn)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8231?t=10&akid=1679%2E878179%2EvGkrrn)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8232?t=11&akid=1679%2E878179%2EvGkrrn)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8233?t=12&akid=1679%2E878179%2EvGkrrn)
Thank you - I mean it from the bottom of my heart.

-Alex
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1679%2E878179%2EvGkrrn). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1679%2E878179%2EvGkrrn).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1679%2E878179%2EvGkrrn) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=1679%2E878179%2EvGkrrn). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1679%2E878179%2EvGkrrn)

[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1679%2E878179%2EvGkrrn)

These are the same mega-donors who know the checks they cut now could turn into favors down the road. It all started way back in 2010, when the Supreme Court's _Citizens United_ decision threw the doors open to massive corporate spending in politics. We must band together to ensure that these deep pocketed donors don't outweigh our voices this election. It is past time to overturn _Citizens United_ and give the power in our politics back to the voter. **We can hold Republican politicians and their corporate allies accountable at the ballot box.** And we must overturn _Citizens United_ once and for all. **[So let's do just that this election. body:
Look, I'll be honest with you. We haven't reached our end of month fundraising goal, and the deadline is today! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/troycarter4congress/i-need-your-help-4746939?e=dd5c2df611)

| | Look, I'll be honest with you. We haven't reached our end of month fundraising goal, and the deadline is [__**today**__](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=73d6b7c797&e=dd5c2df611)!

[__**I hope I can count on you to chip in a few dollars.**__](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=9e752294a9&e=dd5c2df611)

I've spent my entire life serving our community, and I need your help to make sure I can keep fighting for the people of LA-02 that have been left behind and forgotten for so long.

I'm working to secure high-quality, accessible **health care for all** ; create **good-paying jobs** that invest in their people while growing a healthy business climate; deliver **comprehensive justice reforms** to give marginalized people a seat at the table; and fight for the right that protects all rights:**the right to vote**.

[__**Can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, or $25 today to help us meet our deadline, and keep making good trouble?**__](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=9e6e155dee&e=dd5c2df611)

We've got a lot of fighting left to do. I cannot do it without you.

[__**Rush a $10 donation today to help us meet our deadline. **__](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=a9e435bb61&e=dd5c2df611)

Your friend,

name: Eric Stern, John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: Still need 8 more folks from Cresco
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
To put it bluntly, we could be tracking to fall short.
#
Derek,
I'll be the first to admit this was NOT the email I hoped to send you with just a few hours until our Q1 deadline at 11:59 p.m.
I'm worried our numbers just aren't where they need to be to hit our fundraising goal before midnight. **To put it bluntly, we could be tracking to fall short.**
We set a different type of goal this quarter — one focused on the number of donors and donations, not the amount of money. John and our team stand by that choice, because we know people-power is how we win elections, not huge checks cut by super PACs and corporations.
I’ll be honest with you though, Derek: Our number of grassroots supporters are skyrocketing, but the size of our average donation is crashing. Meaning, we are just not raising as much money as we need to per donor.
Now, with just hours to go, there's realistically only one scenario in which we can make up for lost time, close our fundraising gap, and stay on track to beat the Republicans and help John Fetterman flip this Senate seat:
[**I just crunched the numbers again, and we can still close the gap before midnight if around 8 more folks from Cresco are able to chip in even a modest amount. Can I put you down for a last-minute $5 donation in these final, crucial hours?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46235?amount=5&refcode=em20220331-5209&t=1&akid=5209%2E434096%2EClv78b)
**[DONATE $5 »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46235?amount=5&refcode=em20220331-5209&t=20&akid=5209%2E434096%2EClv78b)**
According to your donor file, you have yet to make your first contribution to our grassroots campaign. If you've been considering doubling down on your support by making your first-ever donation, we'd deeply appreciate your support in this big moment. It'd say a lot about how you're ready to have John's back.
That's why I'm really hoping that you'll be among the 8 more folks from Cresco we need to donate — and that you'll dig deep and pitch in for the first time on this important day for our campaign.
**[If enough people like you decide to chip in before 11:59 p.m., we've got a real shot at closing the gap on our fundraising goal before we close the books on Q1. What do you say? Can you donate any amount before midnight?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46235?refcode=em20220331-5209&t=21&akid=5209%2E434096%2EClv78b)**
Thank you,
Eric 💙
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220331-5209-footer&t=22&refcode2=5209_434096_Clv78b&akid=5209%2E434096%2EClv78b)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=5209%2E434096%2EClv78b)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=5209%2E434096%2EClv78b)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Team Sarah
subject: If only 3% of people reading this email decided to make their first donation right now, we would reach our first FEC goal of the year.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
The final three things you should know before tonight's FEC deadline:
1. Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control, and Sarah is the ONLY Democrat beating Ron Johnson in the most recent head-to-head poll.

2. _The Hill_ reported our race has shot “to the top of Senate Republicans' defensive priorities.” And _The Washington Post_ called Sarah "the best chance to rid the Senate of Ron Johnson.” But with Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC going “all-in” to protect him, flipping this seat will not be easy.

3. Our first FEC reporting deadline of 2022 ends tonight at midnight, and we set an aggressive fundraising goal to ensure we have enough resources to compete with GOP spending. Sarah won’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so we're counting on grassroots supporters (like you!) to hit our goal.

[**If only 3% of people reading this email decided to make their first donation today, we would reach our FEC goal by midnight. clean_body: The final three things you should know before tonight's FEC deadline: 1. Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control, and Sarah is the ONLY Democrat beating Ron Johnson in the most recent head-to-head poll. 2. The Hill reported our race has shot “to the top of Senate Republicans' defensive priorities.” And The Washington Post called Sarah "the best chance to rid the Senate of Ron Johnson.” But with Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC going “all-in” to protect him, flipping this seat will not be easy. 3. Our first FEC reporting deadline of 2022 ends tonight at midnight, and we set an aggressive fundraising goal to ensure we have enough resources to compete with GOP spending. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43649792/338101045/368400405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzBiNjg0NS01NGIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hma1oDfBx8Hu7hR1tFmmLJ27_6wZ8vpwnZikXZdyUdY=&emci=ef4f50d7-50b1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=130b6845-54b1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14943357) Peter, In just a few minutes, I will wrap up my eighth Town Hall of this cycle with the residents of MO-02. It’s clear to me as a candidate and a State Representative that having real conversations with voters is essential for any elected official to do their job well—but this isn’t news to me. It’s about being a good neighbor and building community, which I’ve worked to do my whole life. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43649793/338101046/-1251506298?refcode=8thtownhall&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzBiNjg0NS01NGIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hma1oDfBx8Hu7hR1tFmmLJ27_6wZ8vpwnZikXZdyUdY=) Ann Wagner, on the other hand, hasn’t held a town hall to talk with her constituents in 3,375 days. You deserve a Representative in Congress who listens, and cares—and Wagner has plainly shown that she doesn’t. I need your help to win this race. We’re up against the conservative dark money machine, GOP megadonors, and special interest groups who want to keep Ann Wagner in office to do their bidding. But I’ve flipped a seat before, and I learned that with a coalition of actual people behind me, we can do it again. If you can, **[consider making a donation before the end of the quarter tonight](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43649794/338101047/-1251506298?refcode=8thtownhall&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzBiNjg0NS01NGIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hma1oDfBx8Hu7hR1tFmmLJ27_6wZ8vpwnZikXZdyUdY=)**. clean_body: Peter, In just a few minutes, I will wrap up my eighth Town Hall of this cycle with the residents of MO-02. It’s clear to me as a candidate and a State Representative that having real conversations with voters is essential for any elected official to do their job well—but this isn’t news to me. It’s about being a good neighbor and building community, which I’ve worked to do my whole life. = Ann Wagner, on the other hand, hasn’t held a town hall to talk with her constituents in 3,375 days. You deserve a Representative in Congress who listens, and cares—and Wagner has plainly shown that she doesn’t. I need your help to win this race. We’re up against the conservative dark money machine, GOP megadonors, and special interest groups who want to keep Ann Wagner in office to do their bidding. But I’ve flipped a seat before, and I learned that with a coalition of actual people behind me, we can do it again. If you can, =. We need a strong showing to compete and win against Wagner this fall. Thank you for your confidence, and your support. Now, back to the Town Hall! Onward, = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Trish Gunby for Congress PO Box 430114 Saint Louis, MO 63143 United States Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Don't let Biden have these seats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SAVECALIFORNIANOW and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If the Democrats flip these seats, they will use them to pass more of their destructive and failing Big Government Socialism agenda. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3c27567277fe4206949d7c2210d5fe28&_e=-tWYFYacsIeQGvAVDP6gZFiFSmMLk-zeifQfHZPQImlGg5694OrK2QEptV5cf8y9C1nMGb6tGS7fg5njDtqeHD_reSr6DeR_44Y9JxZKXvtltrtUebT_PKkwoyYVvyS89twTr4JG2yh_1eWNPqCF5DgOF-3mOTBYvluD6zp95X71W8flaXHtYVMnEdYA9rn5zo7jSV1UGIj6or4Zl6fa4E5zTtjSmQj7oFoXgq8ulpQwGME3qLutlrmKdECvzgvc7fn2RjgC5YmLP2frOpsgS8vhSqgJvpCUq1w4l87ZviOJN7sqD8TLlsyCLgP9K0WXRhqIMtrqokPh3M1Z0zy4nAj31mHaiOABuQev6xUbdYs8eK1gGc9ZC-z6PQ8UfIt-LhQ3PgbjqZyKD69mLvap6y4gDofAHgdvXOveL4FL0E46lldHX12LCFdtyyPnXwGyQ4E1d8lAvK44jGrEyuDxVg%3D%3D)
---
Fellow conservative,

I’m reaching out because we’ve got a serious problem on our hands in our battle to retake a Republican House majority in 2022.

Republicans only need a net pickup of 5 seats to win back the House. But redistricting has put us on defense in current Republican seats, making it harder to go on offense.

Four of the most vulnerable Republican seats we must now defend are in California (more than any other state):

**
* Rep. David Valadao in CA-22
* Rep. Mike Garcia in CA-27
* Rep. Young Kim in CA-40
* Rep. Michelle Steel in CA-45
**

**I and our team at Save California Now PAC played a key role in flipping these seats back to Republican in 2020.** But redistricting has changed the playing field, and now each of these new districts was won by Biden in 2020.

[**We need your help to defend these key Republican seats so we can win back the House in 2022.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3c27567277fe4206949d7c2210d5fe28&_e=-tWYFYacsIeQGvAVDP6gZFiFSmMLk-zeifQfHZPQImlGg5694OrK2QEptV5cf8y9C1nMGb6tGS7fg5njDtqeHD_reSr6DeR_44Y9JxZKXvtltrtUebT_PKkwoyYVvyS89twTr4JG2yh_1eWNPqCF5DgOF-3mOTBYvluD6zp95X71W8flaXHtYVMnEdYA9rn5zo7jSV1UGIj6or4Zl6fa4E5zTtjSmQj7oFoXgq8ulpRg1nP8hPD92INTeqciu3Zaq-7HakfOwDpKqOnMMDhUDUSOaKtRghM4_oO0N6ILw4Vls8ySeHm3wjcTOk0op-1sv024-EsUCDYfTuFmuPQxSZm44cH897medM6xbwazbELWYD99QGe0KAFWfdGgtQuw52HbTyb0b7gockbQdK2mEF_CUst8LM5s5cwLpST6ROcsDFBFt3GXDDb0Ouyi7__-_FhduQB8Jf0pIzFZom9RIA%3D%3D)

| [HELP REPUBLICANS WIN THE HOUSE »](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3c27567277fe4206949d7c2210d5fe28&_e=-tWYFYacsIeQGvAVDP6gZFiFSmMLk-zeifQfHZPQImlGg5694OrK2QEptV5cf8y9C1nMGb6tGS7fg5njDtqeHD_reSr6DeR_44Y9JxZKXvtltrtUebT_PKkwoyYVvyS89twTr4JG2yh_1eWNPqCF5DgOF-3mOTBYvluD6zp95X71W8flaXHtYVMnEdYA9rn5zo7jSV1UGIj6or4Zl6fa4E5zTtjSmQj7oFoXgq8ulpTNzzrHnV7QrmUO87T0Vbh7rVbiILOW3tgQVlCIskvCB6k8v_ZOyVBelxog_gNEf84TWv-IviEdQByYpJBF-tJq8etmiG5C-JwDwqSBj_nNj6TxjHUQPZKR8Iqx-FxSiIqxfGmwaNAGUuQWEcrdBhnnrngJW5QQzZMBtVMwXmFQo0CaLe_8VGF4g3SNkCWfu7MyZ439kmR34ZFU4f-GN6Z4reIQaTeYrLYMN7O_pChIHw%3D%3D)
---

Our **final end-of-quarter fundraising deadline** before California’s primaries is tonight.

[**Will you rush $10, $25, $50 or even more to help us protect these critical Republican leaders and their seats from falling into the hands of Biden and Pelosi?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3c27567277fe4206949d7c2210d5fe28&_e=-tWYFYacsIeQGvAVDP6gZFiFSmMLk-zeifQfHZPQImlGg5694OrK2QEptV5cf8y9C1nMGb6tGS7fg5njDtqeHD_reSr6DeR_44Y9JxZKXvtltrtUebT_PKkwoyYVvyS89twTr4JG2yh_1eWNPqCF5DgOF-3mOTBYvluD6zp95X71W8flaXHtYVMnEdYA9rn5zo7jSV1UGIj6or4Zl6fa4E5zTtjSmQj7oFoXgq8ulpQ1GdNsbGA4BK8u2o5_WhltWYbRJLSKQklfK-Eh5fcTjiG0PNqwmUnHctUfcagg6CkBzHxHUAhsDEEsD35NHlk-ceSrr22IjjWyCI6-7XEz-zM_f1-CsZyHSMxdvb8Xyz4mDefjABBT9F_aq9P6CgNLAzHY49lE2DmzT0JZkDEKB1e7Bsie7_lmrByPtw9QqDgpnRMUtOO3rKTatgvKUjOxX2MO5_RkdKRnYUp6qIa3ag%3D%3D)

If the Democrats flip these seats, they will use them to pass more of their destructive and failing Big Government Socialism agenda that is hurting American families, degrading our values, and threatening our freedoms. We can’t let that happen.

[**Anything you can give before our March 31st quarterly deadline - whether it’s $50 or $10 - will help us at Save California Now PAC support these Republican leaders and win back the House in 2022.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3c27567277fe4206949d7c2210d5fe28&_e=-tWYFYacsIeQGvAVDP6gZFiFSmMLk-zeifQfHZPQImlGg5694OrK2QEptV5cf8y9C1nMGb6tGS7fg5njDtqeHD_reSr6DeR_44Y9JxZKXvtltrtUebT_PKkwoyYVvyS89twTr4JG2yh_1eWNPqCF5DgOF-3mOTBYvluD6zp95X71W8flaXHtYVMnEdYA9rn5zo7jSV1UGIj6or4Zl6fa4E5zTtjSmQj7oFoXgq8ulpQPjUW60JMc9Cb0r9vJMzTBmEoiIw_5vz6aUN7Nfd-zXztF3VgJVOZhtiv4-bADGMALg-hUc5jqeSZ5WhYwNOlKmCR5BnwYvgyoyNiCAsiK4HdPm32vYyZi1YXDTEhD7ndtII--8j3etVk8Wjg0-QPY1W9r7kkpMsuCvhRYEJEzdpJxxPGBFZ92w4e78rjid8njqlokv2HwOgB1R8zYdmCU7q0O6Ga3aYKHkDnpokcl7g%3D%3D)

Thanks,

Newt Gingrich

clean_body: If the Democrats flip these seats, they will use them to pass more of their destructive and failing Big Government Socialism agenda. | Fellow conservative, I’m reaching out because we’ve got a serious problem on our hands in our battle to retake a Republican House majority in 2022. Republicans only need a net pickup of 5 seats to win back the House. But redistricting has put us on defense in current Republican seats, making it harder to go on offense. Four of the most vulnerable Republican seats we must now defend are in California (more than any other state): Rep. David Valadao in CA-22 Rep. Mike Garcia in CA-27 Rep. Young Kim in CA-40 Rep. Michelle Steel in CA-45 I and our team at Save California Now PAC played a key role in flipping these seats back to Republican in 2020. But redistricting has changed the playing field, and now each of these new districts was won by Biden in 2020. | Our final end-of-quarter fundraising deadline before California’s primaries is tonight. If the Democrats flip these seats, they will use them to pass more of their destructive and failing Big Government Socialism agenda that is hurting American families, degrading our values, and threatening our freedoms. We can’t let that happen. Thanks, Newt Gingrich | Save California Now is leveraging the most cutting edge political technology and data to defeat California Democrat members of Congress. To help Save California Now win back a Republican majority in the House, ---|--- | Paid for by SAVECALIFORNIANOW and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.savecanow.com Don't want to receive any more of our emails: .

body:
We wanted to make sure you saw Kim's message before our end-of-quarter deadline at midnight. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43650139/338108032/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjk4ZTgwZC01N2IxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bKJ-OGdUoEFolxmLxyV9vhNXcZLqwW4UVDD-GuU37ZA=&emci=9bceaccf-60b0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=a298e80d-57b1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)

Did you catch Kim's message from earlier today, Peter?

With just a few hours left until our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election year, we still haven't reached our fundraising goal. We need the support of this grassroots team to help push us over the finish line and ensure we have the resources to defend Kim's seat and our Democratic House majority.

**[Will you rush a donation before midnight to help us reach our goal and end the first quarter of the election year strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43650141/338108033/-966726940?refcode=em22_220331_eoq8_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220331_eoq8_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjk4ZTgwZC01N2IxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bKJ-OGdUoEFolxmLxyV9vhNXcZLqwW4UVDD-GuU37ZA=)**

\---------Begin Forwarded Message---------
Sender: Dr. Kim Schrier
Subject: Before we close the books
Date: Thursday, March 31, 2022

Team,

At midnight tonight, we're closing the books on fundraising for the first quarter of the election year. My team and I set an ambitious online fundraising goal to reach before then, but we're coming up a little short.

We can't afford to miss this goal. Washington's 8th District is not only the most competitive district in the state – but it will be one of the closest races in the entire country. Election experts are calling it a "toss-up."

National Republicans think WA-08 is one of their best pick-up opportunities in their efforts to retake the House majority, and they're going all-in to defeat me. The National Republican Congressional Committee just launched a new set of digital ads attacking me and we know many more attacks will come my way over the coming months.

With control of the House majority hinging on WA-08, I'm counting on your support to reach our goal before midnight to ensure we have the resources we need to win in November.

**Will you chip in before our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at midnight tonight? Reaching this goal will help ensure we have the resources to protect my seat and the Democratic House majority >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-march-2022-eoq](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43650142/338108035/-966726940?refcode=em22_220331_eoq8_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220331_eoq8_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjk4ZTgwZC01N2IxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bKJ-OGdUoEFolxmLxyV9vhNXcZLqwW4UVDD-GuU37ZA=)**

Thank you,

Kim

clean_body: We wanted to make sure you saw Kim's message before our end-of-quarter deadline at midnight. Did you catch Kim's message from earlier today, Peter? With just a few hours left until our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election year, we still haven't reached our fundraising goal. We need the support of this grassroots team to help push us over the finish line and ensure we have the resources to defend Kim's seat and our Democratic House majority. = \---------Begin Forwarded Message--------- Sender: Dr. Kim Schrier Subject: Before we close the books Date: Thursday, March 31, 2022 Team, At midnight tonight, we're closing the books on fundraising for the first quarter of the election year. My team and I set an ambitious online fundraising goal to reach before then, but we're coming up a little short. We can't afford to miss this goal. Washington's 8th District is not only the most competitive district in the state – but it will be one of the closest races in the entire country. Election experts are calling it a "toss-up." National Republicans think WA-08 is one of their best pick-up opportunities in their efforts to retake the House majority, and they're going all-in to defeat me. The National Republican Congressional Committee just launched a new set of digital ads attacking me and we know many more attacks will come my way over the coming months. With control of the House majority hinging on WA-08, I'm counting on your support to reach our goal before midnight to ensure we have the resources we need to win in November. Will you chip in before our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at midnight tonight? Reaching this goal will help ensure we have the resources to protect my seat and the Democratic House majority >> = Thank you, Kim | Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Randolph (personal)
subject: one last thing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter —
This is the last time you’ll hear from me about tonight’s deadline, but with just a few short hours left before midnight, I wanted to ask for your help one more time.
The GOP has their network of mega-donors. They have funding from MAGA millionaires and Trump fanatics.
And when they publicize their Q1 numbers two weeks from now, you’ll see how far that money goes.
The only way we’re going to win this race and protect our House majority is with a strong team of grassroots supporters standing with us.
So, if you can, please use this link to make a donation before time runs out: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=331eoq5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=331eoq5]
Thanks!
— Randolph

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Racing against the clock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
We know it's late, so we'll keep it brief: We're racing against the clock to reach our end-of-quarter FEC deadline goal of $35,000 at midnight.
**The good news?** We're 94% of the way to our goal.
**The bad news?** That still leaves us $2,100 short with just a few hours to go until midnight.
[**Can you make your first donation to this campaign of $3 or any amount to help us hit our first FEC deadline goal of the year before midnight?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11886?refcode=em20220331-1152&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1152%2E420207%2EPGbTqw)
**[Donate $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11886?refcode=em20220331-1152&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1152%2E420207%2EPGbTqw)**
Remember, Pramila doesn't take a single penny from corporate PACs; she's laser-focused on legislating and fighting for working people in WA-7 and all across the country. So donations from emails like the one you're reading now have a major impact on our work to power her priorities forward.
Thank you for chipping in at this critical moment, Peter.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Donate »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11886?refcode=em20220331-1152&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1152%2E420207%2EPGbTqw)**

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220331-1152-footer&t=24&refcode2=1152_420207_PGbTqw&akid=1152%2E420207%2EPGbTqw)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

body:
Help us protect these critical Republican leaders and their seats from falling into the hands of Biden and Pelosi. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a9e9e9227c114eb1971e79d8ba49557a&_e=66NTOeLTU01RdFaINXjim0WoHNRFyNpBTY869J9HdnPgJhmGqlux9FNhzTGSAsttQm6sBxq66oWduvjHXIH-1qpALz9XKyEjWA6a3EIYOoUCRzjYw6YMtvIFGbE__46d-xbWYfTjII-AmAFgQFp_pYLijE1Qqh5lLVwhpo6rbFD7eRLuHI9JfB_J_pnro5jbF4esVO1X30ZdZVlvvF62d7bofeu-D8gFOHcZx3vrTP4VS1BXiKEFkzam4uvxlugXm9Sjj3ih6wmDN68t-bq_4cUdQvJ5tby1IOpObXSOk64Igze4wflQnqOCYPrzHmlk24C2rMYRd3Ih97G9Y4Rin0BLG-7NwyZ85EJ27gojkjEInhEThj7cklcBKTcTnGDIj78ZYpdO8wOZnTD5wXO3_bgmLLoyapJBSz2m7ppmh6W4qcGb6jMMTRYI_komvaXMKsSCwQ59CsatzN8Tpe48Rg%3D%3D)
---
Fellow conservative,

I’m reaching out because we’ve got a serious problem on our hands in our battle to retake a Republican House majority in 2022.

Republicans only need a net pickup of 5 seats to win back the House. But redistricting has put us on defense in current Republican seats, making it harder to go on offense.

Four of the most vulnerable Republican seats we must now defend are in California (more than any other state):

**
* Rep. David Valadao in CA-22
* Rep. Mike Garcia in CA-27
* Rep. Young Kim in CA-40
* Rep. Michelle Steel in CA-45
**

**I and our team at Save California Now PAC played a key role in flipping these seats back to Republican in 2020.** But redistricting has changed the playing field, and now each of these new districts was won by Biden in 2020.

clean_body: Help us protect these critical Republican leaders and their seats from falling into the hands of Biden and Pelosi. | Fellow conservative, I’m reaching out because we’ve got a serious problem on our hands in our battle to retake a Republican House majority in 2022. Republicans only need a net pickup of 5 seats to win back the House. But redistricting has put us on defense in current Republican seats, making it harder to go on offense. Four of the most vulnerable Republican seats we must now defend are in California (more than any other state): Rep. David Valadao in CA-22 Rep. Mike Garcia in CA-27 Rep. Young Kim in CA-40 Rep. Michelle Steel in CA-45 I and our team at Save California Now PAC played a key role in flipping these seats back to Republican in 2020. But redistricting has changed the playing field, and now each of these new districts was won by Biden in 2020. | Our final end-of-quarter fundraising deadline before California’s primaries is tonight. Peter,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st 2021 marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $3 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c322d577af7b411a872d5d0790b943f7&_e=-zFEEo6HTVFXgQjdkw4rM78vARgsDyTnZybIf9_kEHG--7yHsb0ZU4-MEKDr3kL8TM5dpN969cZ11hPyhIhOAPibEVt1iR9zB7RFldJrRuHa_GpPnA_U2FaBrZDHTpjohZlQ5ieV8rivnXrY4LVVo3tXkDU2MJN7U3xRZ6XPx5CiT5kJT4WcBG9k_WxXxFXruIfAehr5h4dxII7PFhFPxzKW5aSmgnMP-d3vBOQXtg9gEcwtl0A6JdAVOYnZcWReVSVLnX8Ur-rpWe1uCCO8lwovNKE2zmA2rAlhtOvJu9x22EITsWbH63Qw4uqqLD_NuWdg6eR6n5n7cxKs68_T_zACApixwUCPgRgRkqxXpyU8esLDv_GG3P0ly0OZyAKvPYi3TLQikDWtaeOBupTPRNcdvoGKgdQRwj8cESW9od8LyAjeXpSWrVaY-pSCkwnFZ10JVYpl6t24fX_68mOd_JpH76stjJe2Dze4C1Ntd1A%3D)

Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c322d577af7b411a872d5d0790b943f7&_e=-zFEEo6HTVFXgQjdkw4rM78vARgsDyTnZybIf9_kEHG--7yHsb0ZU4-MEKDr3kL8TM5dpN969cZ11hPyhIhOAPibEVt1iR9zB7RFldJrRuHa_GpPnA_U2FaBrZDHTpjohZlQ5ieV8rivnXrY4LVVo3tXkDU2MJN7U3xRZ6XPx5CiT5kJT4WcBG9k_WxXxFXruIfAehr5h4dxII7PFhFPxzKW5aSmgnMP-d3vBOQXtg9gEcwtl0A6JdAVOYnZcWReVSVLnX8Ur-rpWe1uCCO8l5j1gAwr616D2mkf9wtoE9-8U9sV8MQTNCxQzIh1xx6s9yrHrIUcd9iKjm9lsebPLZsT9Rp57s7XwLoWZlUf3txwHjadypV1XCeHcdrtTYLIYmdDzIIkMQs-yoI9igHeorGvsDwukkbqtUgcPeHa63s2g9bbG3AsrjDeZnv-0uq9Tp7MlKDd0Dt2CVonIOiY17JnPF1dRsJkj9UiKpFS480%3D)

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=db3adba0389b405a9a2b706e29157aa6&_e=ZweCzMhJzASVTNPR9npxjYZd-ODoti5ceo2gBDQH4FvTB6mbRO58PthKejflD4kxhH10h9mAPw4CM_OneZRig21b2ZsQGDdKxVUKoue75Nzvj7yhXWNIolONYMSD6KCd3QP-OMmUaXJI_Tf1u1_DkLGJg-URukz-osd6dqwfA1IjiJxCdpZSJi9EVRSQO_KapXrzsR94q-mAInUkr53_KxqcBXoVJCMYWWuMbOGGjem3lX5n_Hlv4oTpJivOuI3aWp_rGtBD-lmyJYLRwf-7qwZxU2wpWcMZKhL1IOTzsaxRTNdJRYQLbOwcoQPryjmoAyGWUuBWhct1qLxG_e_eWgyti6MZMRC-y6T9Ac3hGfsnk3mLvGychH7rMpZQmfTbo7_zEbywf1IMhcCmZPxTQvB4Orfrz7HX91Vbj_jHBKJwQI_D-jDq3SJ6bX3qywUYK-ic4mY5bMNcrHbXZRQ4YA%3D%3D)

Peter,

**Our campaign is THE top target of the national Democrats.**

They're nervous because they must re-elect my opponent - who calls himself the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrat - in order to keep complete control of the federal government.

_And they will be watching Team Herschel's fundraising numbers closely._

Tonight, we will close the books on the first filing deadline of 2022. A few days later, our treasurer will report our fundraising totals to the Federal Election Commission (FEC). The Democrats and their powerful special interests will scour our report page-by-page, looking for any signs of weakness they can find.

Peter, our goal is to show a massive groundswell of grassroots support from every county in the Peach State and every state in the nation. **[Will you help us end March in the strongest possible position by making a contribution of $10, $22, $34, or more to our campaign today?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=db3adba0389b405a9a2b706e29157aa6&_e=ZweCzMhJzASVTNPR9npxjYZd-ODoti5ceo2gBDQH4FvTB6mbRO58PthKejflD4kxhH10h9mAPw4CM_OneZRig21b2ZsQGDdKxVUKoue75Nzvj7yhXWNIolONYMSD6KCd3QP-OMmUaXJI_Tf1u1_DkLGJg-URukz-osd6dqwfA1IjiJxCdpZSJi9EVRSQO_KapXrzsR94q-mAInUkr53_KxqcBXoVJCMYWWuMbOGGjem3lX5n_Hlv4oTpJivOuI3ayfvEJt1ux_Qi0nM5Q5ekHyyiR_KHbwTNWX8c6-UHiHyjnJdNtqhfLzpkQyVzKwl_KOKXYccETSySWssVYeF47ZoGWeQEyUyi8eKSt-WTEU2NpPTs945n8sFX2amXXFR2mdCujPzh9yjdbXb7h5pGgWFL8gbIIwBGF72a3GDC3HdMxwc8rueYQVZ9ALrHftMlmiwRoSfQvEb56jvh7MiiHg%3D%3D)**

**Our Democrat opponent has shattered early fundraising records and now has more than $23 million in his re-election war chest.** Most of that money comes from blue states around the country, from the same folks who think our country is made stronger by pitting us against each other.

Georgia's Senate race will almost certainly decide who controls the Senate majority and the direction of our nation. At stake are issues that affect every single one of us: who controls our schools, how much we pay to fill up our gas tank, the rising cost of groceries, and the ability for small businesses to find the workers they need to keep their doors open.

Nothing I've accomplished in life has been easy and winning this U.S. Senate seat might be my toughest challenge yet. But we're up to the challenge because we have great friends and supporters like you standing with us every step of the way.

Thanks for believing in me and standing by my side.

Sincerely,

subject: It’s the 11th hour
body:
| Peter, I wanted to send a quick email personally. **[Our End of Quarter deadline is now just a few hours away — but we’re not quite there. In fact, we are only $5,623 away from our goal. name: Imani's iPhone
subject: I know it’s late, but...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
I wanted to reach out one last time
Peter —
I know it’s getting late, but I wanted to reach out one last time before midnight to personally ask for your help.
When I launched this campaign, I couldn’t have imagined the level of support we’ve received from our community and from marginalized communities across the country.
I never could’ve predicted that we’d receive contributions from all 50 states, or that we’d have enough grassroots strength to win a redistricting battle against New Jersey’s corrupt political machine.
But that’s what’s so amazing, Peter — we’ve done all of that and more. We’ve proven that our communities want a proud progressive voice fighting for them in Congress instead of a bought-and-paid-for corporate politician like my opponent.
Now, we need your help to keep up this momentum and win this race. Can you use this link to make a contribution before tonight’s deadline? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=eoq7 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=eoq7]
This is our very last end-of-quarter deadline before the June 7th primary — and this quarter’s numbers will be the last numbers we report before we take on Rep. Payne Jr. at the ballot box.
If you’re ready to help me take our grassroots movement through to the finish line, please use this link to chip in before midnight: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=eoq7 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=eoq7]
Thank you so much for being a part of this movement.
— Imani
Paid for by Oakley for Congress
Oakley for Congress
PO Box 1181
Montclair, NJ 07042
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Mullin?=
subject: The Last One Before The Deadline…We Promise!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=0e7d19a285&e=292fde286a)
---
| | | Dear Friends,

Jackie Speier endorsed my candidacy as her successor because she knows I have what it takes to carry on her legacy of service. In fact, I cut my public service teeth doing constituent casework for then-Assemblywoman Jackie Speier in her South San Fransisco District Office.

This job wasn't just a regular 9-5 for me. It quickly manifested as a deeply rooted passion and offered me an invaluable education. I saw firsthand how government can function to help people work through the unexpected challenges that arise in life.

This is why I am running for office, I fundamentally believe in the power of government to help people. If elected, I will ensure that the federal government supports you and the needs of the communities here on the Peninsula.

Our crucial end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is less than six hours away, and we’re still just about $2400 short of hitting our goal.[ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=4f00896737&e=292fde286a)If you haven’t already, can **[you chip in right now to help us close out Q1 on a strong note?](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=e93c0f8d10&e=292fde286a)**

It's difficult to express in an email how grateful I am for your support. Thank you so much for contributing and for being there to support me in all of my previous races. It hasn't gone unnoticed, and I can't wait to make you proud as your next U.S. Representative.

With gratitude,

Assemblymember Kevin Mullin

P.S. Keep an eye out for your Primary ballot which will be hitting mailboxes starting on May 9th. This election is going to be won on the margins, so we can't afford to have anyone sit it out.
---
| | |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friends, Jackie Speier endorsed my candidacy as her successor because she knows I have what it takes to carry on her legacy of service. In fact, I cut my public service teeth doing constituent casework for then-Assemblywoman Jackie Speier in her South San Fransisco District Office. This job wasn't just a regular 9-5 for me. It quickly manifested as a deeply rooted passion and offered me an invaluable education. I saw firsthand how government can function to help people work through the unexpected challenges that arise in life. This is why I am running for office, I fundamentally believe in the power of government to help people. If elected, I will ensure that the federal government supports you and the needs of the communities here on the Peninsula. Our crucial end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is less than six hours away, and we’re still just about $2400 short of hitting our goal. you haven’t already, can It's difficult to express in an email how grateful I am for your support. Thank you so much for contributing and for being there to support me in all of my previous races. It hasn't gone unnoticed, and I can't wait to make you proud as your next U.S. Representative. With gratitude, Assemblymember Kevin Mullin P.S. Keep an eye out for your Primary ballot which will be hitting mailboxes starting on May 9th. This election is going to be won on the margins, so we can't afford to have anyone sit it out. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS. Copyright © 2022 Kevin Mullin for Congress, All rights reserved. You are signed up to receive emails from Kevin Mullin for Congress. body:
Don’t miss the last chance to publicly support our campaign before the June 7 primary! The corruption in Washington won’t uproot itself. Join us to be part of the solution! | | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78ORT8Pt3SALA3pMGVDypeKbyy2kgsjsCmnmy8k7FgsqB6wuCJ9K2SYervuUQSBWz0OxmbawX32lB0c5ii-ol0iaSxkg-Ets-QLBRk5042K9YKQbqQLsPix7ISZkyvU-ahDxnL0fAOLqArTPJ0EWfk0c9P_MjSo88wpZ_guJxN6Jj1BpxnPfUodD8q3ZIIgg9PLRVTKbKxO8WVHnXefhC7bp0Mbp_oPRTGU49d3dF-bZtC7whW4JeCu70frXRGvwRMjbHJ9osDjWPvumg8krEZxljsQsWDnJcEHfHhwAPDjBMFWBwHyiyNKqTuAyqiUOXmlpt0_1_1XCW_6N6cY9YXb9yNFAtduWQN-7oW-lu5kYFX/3ku/-X2rCQbZR-CLUo9FQq7Llg/h0/ZN-VTX67skVjAeHng7tpqRDPQUZLU-6P6Yju1ML-Voc)
| | Dear Peter, **** Are you concerned about the future? Delaying medical treatment due to cost? Wondering whether your children will inherit a world in crisis? The corporate corruption in Washington driving those concerns is unfortunately bipartisan. We all know that dynasty Democrats, like their GOP allies, have enriched themselves while gatekeeping visionary reforms—like Medicare for All—favored by transpartisan grassroots majorities. Are you ready for change? [**Join us today to include your support in our final round of public disclosures before the June 7 primary!**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MKiTOFIP90KiUmSOKj79gBbzEF8p3oc1XYSkWzSu-2rkQg96oQi3z8CoFlXW95D_09yUneCzl6Ba9zRHdfk1gFnrU_t-pUispKq-lIaEBdqUagw0fzl1KDqtAmMVYMpKSuobilyFt_DiJBDEm5fy1Gxf0-BHDTD0d4t0yMxv5-ZF8PyAJze7TilyKOFISC-8oOal7BkCo2uZCWw_ccJO0VS6DIqvT-ocQvaFTSYPsLLZXoyCjjAta19VkUp4cHxefNZW1_fzXhk9nzUZxiKWffRZKmkxd43_mi2x9rXus_lrg/3ku/-X2rCQbZR-CLUo9FQq7Llg/h1/-4QepPmigWiaaG8V3enONHfmGWm3GWTopDOxZBlKaOc) Today's the last day that we can include contributions in our next round of public disclosures that we'll file with the Federal Elections Commission. It's the final report before the June primary, so we'd be thrilled to include your support! The kinds of challenges that have emerged to confront us reflect the depravity of the system, and how the field is tilted favoring corporate interests. Your support can make a big difference as we work to overcome them. clean_body: Don’t miss the last chance to publicly support our campaign before the June 7 primary! The corruption in Washington won’t uproot itself. Join us to be part of the solution! | | | | | Dear Peter, **** Are you concerned about the future? Delaying medical treatment due to cost? Wondering whether your children will inherit a world in crisis? The corporate corruption in Washington driving those concerns is unfortunately bipartisan. We all know that dynasty Democrats, like their GOP allies, have enriched themselves while gatekeeping visionary reforms—like Medicare for All—favored by transpartisan grassroots majorities. Are you ready for change? Today's the last day that we can include contributions in our next round of public disclosures that we'll file with the Federal Elections Commission. It's the final report before the June primary, so we'd be thrilled to include your support! The kinds of challenges that have emerged to confront us reflect the depravity of the system, and how the field is tilted favoring corporate interests. Your support can make a big difference as we work to overcome them. In Washington, a Congress of millionaires engineered the climate crisis, before responding to a global pandemic by repeatedly prioritizing targeted tax breaks for the wealthy, rather than measures to protect public health. It’s not OK. Only voters can impose accountability—but too many never hear about the options before us before completing their ballot. We’re working hard to educate every voter in San Francisco before the primary. Your support comes at a crucial time to help extend our reach. Thank you for being part of our community, and helping amplify solutions to defend our future from the failures of the past! Your voice, Shahid PS -- Already contributed? Please accept our thanks, and with any friends who share our values! | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Shahid for Change, please .

name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: RE: quick note before midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hey Peter — this is it. Our last public fundraising deadline before the primary hits in just a few hours. Thanks to supporters like you, we’re _so close_ to our goal. But we’re down to the wire, which is why I’m asking you personally: Can you chip in $25 before midnight? You can use this link here: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/caraveo-eoq?amount=25**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43650895/338117399/1362735038?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220331eoq11last_yc_allop_xx_l1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWNiYWMyYS01ZmIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=85bPunUyZHKNPnVfhx47tO87RjIDS4vasqszfPkSXQA=) Together, we’re going to win this race, make history for Colorado, and bring our fight for a brighter future to the halls of Congress. With gratitude, Yadira
---
| Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests.

Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. body:
If we want to save our district and our country, I need your help now. This is the most important deadline of our campaign, and it all depends on you | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f1961688ebbe/only-a-few-hours-left-5395286?e=fc83fb200d)

---
|
---
|
,

This is it.

In just two hours it will be too late to count any contribution towards our first fundraising quarter.

This first fundraising report is CRITICAL to demonstrating that we're serious about defeating Jennifer Wexton.

If I don't put up the highest number possible, we'll never be able to have a Republican representative in Virginia 10 next year.

We can defeat Jennifer Wexton, but only if YOU help.

[Will you consider making a small donation of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to help my campaign post a strong fundraising number and run the campaign we need to defeat Jennifer Wexton?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=40a08156df&e=fc83fb200d)

If just a few strong Republicans pitch in tonight we can be thousands of dollars stronger going into this campaign. We'll need it to go up against Wexton and her war chest.

**I hope I can count on you tonight to help me save our district and our country.**

Thank you,

Jeanine Lawson

clean_body: | | Hi Peter, Just checked with the team, and we're only $627 from our Q1 goal! This is our last chance to put up a strong showing in the FEC Q1 finance reports. What we raise by our deadline will dictate the next phase of this race. Please click here and give whatever you can. I promise you no amount is too small: I'm polling at the top of this race because the people in this district KNOW they can count on me to heal Washington. I've been working for a year to build momentum for Democrats not only in WA-03, but in Washington state, and even across the country. Can I count on you to stand with me now? I'm between meetings, so I'll make this quick: Your name is on our list of inactive Democratic memberships for March, and I need to make sure you activate your membership by tonight’s public FEC deadline.
Don't forget -- our Senate majority is RAZOR THIN, so we can't afford for anyone to sit on the sidelines. Voting rights, reproductive justice, a Supreme Court seat, and our ultra-slim Democratic majority are all on the line.

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: HOLY COW!!!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Honestly, we woke up this morning and thought there was NO CHANCE we were going to reach our March FEC fundraising goals.
#

Friends —
Honestly, we woke up this morning and thought there was NO CHANCE we were going to reach our March end-of-quarter fundraising goals. Getting there would mean receiving more donations today alone than on any day of the campaign so far.
We were all set to sit down tomorrow and figure out what we had to pull out of the budget.
But...wow. So many people are answering our call and stepping up to help re-elect Mark before our midnight deadline.
Now we actually have a CHANCE of getting there. But it will only happen if lots and lots of people keep giving what they can.
Can you add a donation before it’s too late? Use this link:
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/End-Of-Quarter-Deadline**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220331-5-15-pd&t=1&refcode2=2504_6688874_2ekvo2&akid=2504%2E6688874%2E2ekvo2)
Just look at the chart of donations we’ve received in the last hour. HOLY COW!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220331-5-15-pd&t=2&refcode2=2504_6688874_2ekvo2&akid=2504%2E6688874%2E2ekvo2)
Every single dot on that chart is a person who has Mark’s back and is chipping in to help us reach our goals, and keep Mark in office.
Now, they’re desperately hoping YOU will do the same before we reach midnight. What do you say?
[**Can you PLEASE make a $3 contribution to help Mark Kelly reach his goals before our March FEC fundraising drive ends at midnight TONIGHT?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220331-5-15-pd&t=3&refcode2=2504_6688874_2ekvo2&akid=2504%2E6688874%2E2ekvo2)

We are approaching the end of our fundraising deadline and I need your help to make sure we finish strong. I am so grateful for the amount of support I have received so far in this race. If you have already donated, thank you! If you haven't joined this grassroots movement yet, now is the time! It is regular people like you that make up the backbone of this campaign. It is you that will push us over the finish line. Thank you for being in this fight with me! Friend,

I know it's late, and I know I just emailed you.

I wouldn't be doing this if it wasn't important.

We're still not where we need to be for this quarter's deadline tonight.

If you're still awake and you see this, will you please consider pitching in?

[Will you make a small donation of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to help my campaign meet our goal and run the campaign we need to defeat Jennifer Wexton?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=11c66489eb&e=fc83fb200d)

With a few donations of $50, we can meet our goal and run the campaign that we need to **defeat Jennifer Wexton, put an end to Biden's radical agenda, and restore commonsense leadership to our country.**

I'm counting on your support, and I'm looking forward to winning together this November.

For love of country,

Jeanine Lawson
