subject: Josh Weil - Democrat for U.S. Senate (FL)
body:
Friday, April 1, 2022 | Another quarter come and gone, our fifth since starting this campaign, and the last three months saw us begin to rac
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.joshweil.org/so/39N-aysgm/c?w=GJanfor-1n33nG75GIu742ChyU3EC2NOad6DLgTWepE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuam9zaHdlaWwub3JnL3NvLzM5Ti1heXNnbT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6Ijg5ZmI1NTQ5LTQ5MzQtNGM0OS1iZDRmLTRhZWEyZTg2MzgxNiJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Josh Weil - Democrat for U.S. Senate (FL)
---
| |
---
| | Friday, April 1, 2022
---
| | |
---
| | Another quarter come and gone, our fifth since starting this campaign, and the last three months saw us begin to rack up significant endorsements across the state, and propel ourselves to the front of the field of Progressives challenging Val Demings for the Democratic nomination on August 23rd. We sent out a major press release today today to outlets across the nation, and I wanted to share it with all of you, first. Joshua Weil Announces First Slate of National, State, and Local Progressive Endorsements As a first-time candidate, his campaign continues to grow beyond all early expectations as progressive organizers from across the state are now lining up to stand in support of his campaign. Orlando, FL — Joshua Weil, candidate for U.S. Senate in Florida, announced his first list of national, state, and local progressive endorsements, including the Florida Board of Progressive Democrats of America, a pair of Florida DNC Committee Members who were elected delegates for Senator Bernie Sanders in 2020, a pair of former County D.E.C. Chairs, a prominent faith leader in the state, an elected City Commissioner, and several local community leaders. The full endorsement list is as follows American Youth for Climate ActionCentral Florida Progressive Democrats of AmericaNadia Ahmad - Pledged Democratic Delegate for Sen. Sanders (FL-CD7), 2020Chad Albritton - Casselberry City Commissioner, Seat 4Rebekah Cordova - Fmr. Chair, Putnam County Democratic Executive CommitteeArlo Dennis - Florida Trans Rights ActivistLaura Hill - Progressive Grassroots Activist, North MiamiJames Langford - Pledged Democratic Delegate for Sen. Sanders (FL-CD7), 2020Imam Tariq Rasheed - Islamic Center of OrlandoDr. Richard Thripp - Fmr. Chair, Volusia County Democratic Executive Committee In response, Weil made the following statement: ““I’m honored to have received the endorsement and trust of these tremendous progressive leaders and organizers from across our incredible state. This campaign has always been built on Human Rights, and with our most vulnerable and marginalized communities being aggressively targeted in recent months by the Governor and State Legislature, it is incredibly validating to see leaders from these communities lining up to support our strong platform of federal protections,” said Joshua Weil, candidate for U.S. Senate in Florida. "Joshua is a rising star in the Florida Democratic Party," said former Volusia County D.E.C. Chair, Dr. Richard Thripp, "which is shown in the legions of dedicated volunteers and tens of thousands of dollars of grassroots donations his team has won. I have had the honor of marching alongside Joshua in the Orlando Gay Pride parade and of introducing him at Volusia County Democratic Party meetings. I have seen him talk with voters all across the political spectrum. They like what they are hearing. Joshua and I believe that progressive policies are key to winning elections, reforming our skewed economy, and saving the earth. As a member of the Advisory Board of the Central Florida Chapter of the Progressive Democrats of America, I was proud to vote for Joshua's endorsement. Now, I am publishing my sincere endorsement of Joshua Weil in the August 23, 2022 Democratic primary for United States Senator for Florida.” “As a Pledged Delegate for Sen. Bernie Sanders from Florida's 7th Congressional District our unofficial motto was #NotMeUs. As an active member of the progressive movement in Central Florida I recognize the same sentiment in Josh Weil’s campaign statement and fully support it. I'm proud to personally endorse him in the 2022 Democratic primary for US Senate,” said James Langford, Florida State Director, People for Democratic Party Reform. This major announcement comes at the end of a fantastic 1st quarter that saw Josh Weil solidify his position as the frontrunner in the race among Progressive candidates challenging Congresswoman Val Demings for the Democratic nomination on August 23rd. If elected, Joshua Weil will be the first openly LGBTQ+ male, and first Muslim elected to the U.S. Senate, as well as the second youngest sitting Senator (Jon Ossoff, born 1987). Florida’s Class III U.S. Senate seat is currently represented by Marco Rubio, who has not held an open constituent town hall in over 4 years. About Joshua Weil Joshua Weil grew up in Orlando, Florida, and has spent most of his life in the region. He holds Bachelors Degrees in Biology and Business Administration from Stony Brook University in New York and Northwood University in Michigan, respectively, and a Masters Degree in Teaching from University of Central Florida. He has been a public school teacher, working primarily with at-risk youth in Alternative Education settings, since 2012. From 2012-2017, Josh worked extensively as a volunteer outreach coordinator with the Islamic Center of Orlando. Over that time, what started as a weekly Open House grew into a network of outreach with churches, synagogues, community action centers, local governments, and law enforcement agencies across the state, and as a result saw ICO hosting foreign dignitaries, U.S. Congressmen (and women), and national and international media. In the wake of the tragedy at Pulse Nightclub in 2016, ICO became a focus of international spotlight, and Joshua Weil and Imam Tariq Rasheed were featured on PBS Newshour for their efforts in the community.In 2017, Josh and his wife Anna were offered positions teaching at an international school in Kuwait. Over the course of the following school year, their family had their perspectives of the entire world reshaped, with travel to places like Turkey, Lebanon, Jordan, Israel, Palestine, Saudi Arabia, and Italy that were truly unforgettable. Since returning, Josh and Anna have been active volunteers for such organizations as Color for Change, Organizing Corps, and the Orlando DSA. The Weil family, including sons David, 9, and Alexander, 7, currently live in Orlando, FL. Josh is a proud member of the LGBTQ+ community. You can learn more about Josh’s campaign at www.JoshWeil.org. For press inquiries please contact info@weil4ussenate.org. Weil can be found across social media platforms at @Weil4USSenate on Facebook and Twitter, and @joshweilforsenate on Instagram and TikTok.

clean_body: Friday, April 1, 2022 | Another quarter come and gone, our fifth since starting this campaign, and the last three months saw us begin to rac | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Josh Weil - Democrat for U.S. Senate (FL) | | | | Friday, April 1, 2022 | | | | | Another quarter come and gone, our fifth since starting this campaign, and the last three months saw us begin to rack up significant endorsements across the state, and propel ourselves to the front of the field of Progressives challenging Val Demings for the Democratic nomination on August 23rd. We sent out a major press release today today to outlets across the nation, and I wanted to share it with all of you, first. Joshua Weil Announces First Slate of National, State, and Local Progressive Endorsements As a first-time candidate, his campaign continues to grow beyond all early expectations as progressive organizers from across the state are now lining up to stand in support of his campaign. Orlando, FL — Joshua Weil, candidate for U.S. Senate in Florida, announced his first list of national, state, and local progressive endorsements, including the Florida Board of Progressive Democrats of America, a pair of Florida DNC Committee Members who were elected delegates for Senator Bernie Sanders in 2020, a pair of former County D.E.C. Chairs, a prominent faith leader in the state, an elected City Commissioner, and several local community leaders. The full endorsement list is as follows American Youth for Climate ActionCentral Florida Progressive Democrats of AmericaNadia Ahmad - Pledged Democratic Delegate for Sen. Sanders (FL-CD7), 2020Chad Albritton - Casselberry City Commissioner, Seat 4Rebekah Cordova - Fmr. Chair, Putnam County Democratic Executive CommitteeArlo Dennis - Florida Trans Rights ActivistLaura Hill - Progressive Grassroots Activist, North MiamiJames Langford - Pledged Democratic Delegate for Sen. Sanders (FL-CD7), 2020Imam Tariq Rasheed - Islamic Center of OrlandoDr. Richard Thripp - Fmr. Chair, Volusia County Democratic Executive Committee In response, Weil made the following statement: ““I’m honored to have received the endorsement and trust of these tremendous progressive leaders and organizers from across our incredible state. This campaign has always been built on Human Rights, and with our most vulnerable and marginalized communities being aggressively targeted in recent months by the Governor and State Legislature, it is incredibly validating to see leaders from these communities lining up to support our strong platform of federal protections,” said Joshua Weil, candidate for U.S. Senate in Florida. "Joshua is a rising star in the Florida Democratic Party," said former Volusia County D.E.C. Chair, Dr. Richard Thripp, "which is shown in the legions of dedicated volunteers and tens of thousands of dollars of grassroots donations his team has won. I have had the honor of marching alongside Joshua in the Orlando Gay Pride parade and of introducing him at Volusia County Democratic Party meetings. I have seen him talk with voters all across the political spectrum. They like what they are hearing. Joshua and I believe that progressive policies are key to winning elections, reforming our skewed economy, and saving the earth. As a member of the Advisory Board of the Central Florida Chapter of the Progressive Democrats of America, I was proud to vote for Joshua's endorsement. Now, I am publishing my sincere endorsement of Joshua Weil in the August 23, 2022 Democratic primary for United States Senator for Florida.” “As a Pledged Delegate for Sen. Bernie Sanders from Florida's 7th Congressional District our unofficial motto was #NotMeUs. As an active member of the progressive movement in Central Florida I recognize the same sentiment in Josh Weil’s campaign statement and fully support it. I'm proud to personally endorse him in the 2022 Democratic primary for US Senate,” said James Langford, Florida State Director, People for Democratic Party Reform. This major announcement comes at the end of a fantastic 1st quarter that saw Josh Weil solidify his position as the frontrunner in the race among Progressive candidates challenging Congresswoman Val Demings for the Democratic nomination on August 23rd. If elected, Joshua Weil will be the first openly LGBTQ+ male, and first Muslim elected to the U.S. Senate, as well as the second youngest sitting Senator (Jon Ossoff, born 1987). Florida’s Class III U.S. Senate seat is currently represented by Marco Rubio, who has not held an open constituent town hall in over 4 years. About Joshua Weil Joshua Weil grew up in Orlando, Florida, and has spent most of his life in the region. He holds Bachelors Degrees in Biology and Business Administration from Stony Brook University in New York and Northwood University in Michigan, respectively, and a Masters Degree in Teaching from University of Central Florida. He has been a public school teacher, working primarily with at-risk youth in Alternative Education settings, since 2012. From 2012-2017, Josh worked extensively as a volunteer outreach coordinator with the Islamic Center of Orlando. Over that time, what started as a weekly Open House grew into a network of outreach with churches, synagogues, community action centers, local governments, and law enforcement agencies across the state, and as a result saw ICO hosting foreign dignitaries, U.S. Congressmen (and women), and national and international media. In the wake of the tragedy at Pulse Nightclub in 2016, ICO became a focus of international spotlight, and Joshua Weil and Imam Tariq Rasheed were featured on PBS Newshour for their efforts in the community.In 2017, Josh and his wife Anna were offered positions teaching at an international school in Kuwait. Over the course of the following school year, their family had their perspectives of the entire world reshaped, with travel to places like Turkey, Lebanon, Jordan, Israel, Palestine, Saudi Arabia, and Italy that were truly unforgettable. Since returning, Josh and Anna have been active volunteers for such organizations as Color for Change, Organizing Corps, and the Orlando DSA. The Weil family, including sons David, 9, and Alexander, 7, currently live in Orlando, FL. Josh is a proud member of the LGBTQ+ community. You can learn more about Josh’s campaign at www.JoshWeil.org. For press inquiries please contact info@weil4ussenate.org. Weil can be found across social media platforms at @Weil4USSenate on Facebook and Twitter, and @joshweilforsenate on Instagram and TikTok. | | | | As always, this is for you. We're here because of you, and every great thing that has happened to this campaign is thanks to you. I can't wait to pay it off for you as your next U.S. Senator! Stay safe! -Josh | | | | | | | | Follow Us | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Three Reinforcements
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Almost all of the new congressional district maps have been approved and the 2022 battle for control of Congress is heating up in Republican primaries across the nation.
We are proud to announce our support for three new conservative candidates who will help strengthen the House Freedom Caucus and fight for America's future.
✓ JIM BOGNET (PA-08) - Jim Bognet is running against a former Democrat in the Republican primary (May 17) and needs your urgent support. This district was redrawn so it is now very winnable in the general election. The winner of the primary will face liberal incumbent Rep.
Matt Cartwright (D-PA).
✓ BO HINES (NC-13) - Bo Hines is running in a brand new North Carolina district. He's running for the Republican nomination (May 17) against former Rep. Renee Ellmers and another moderate attorney. Hines has been endorsed by President Trump and is the only Freedom Caucus
conservative in the race.
✓ JEREMY MUNSON (MN-01) - Jeremy Munson is running in the Special Election (May 24) to replace former Rep. Jim Hagedorn. Munson is a state representative who started the conservative House caucus in the Minnesota state legislature.
Please support these outstanding candidates with a generous contribution today!
You can support multiple candidates with one transaction and the House Freedom Fund will pay all processing fees so they can spend 100% of your contributions on voter contact.
Republicans are positioned to win the House in November, but conservatives need to work together now to nominate the strongest Republicans in the primary elections.
And it doesn't matter where you live. Congressional seats are national elections because the outcomes affect all Americans.
So please take action right now and support our priority House candidates with a generous contribution.
Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund

 

DONATE

 

"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)

 

House Freedom Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that
promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status
are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.

PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM

body:

---
| |
---
| | Peter,

If you find yourself near Hinckley on Sunday, Matt Birk and I would love to meet you! We're speaking at a Mask Off Minnesota event at Tobies! Here are the details:
[**Click here to register!**](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=dec2fbe8c7&e=33b11688c1)
**MOMN Meeting with Dr. Scott Jensen & Matt Birk**

_Date and Time:_ Sunday, April 3rd from 2 PM - 5 PM

_Location:_ Tobies
404 Fire Monument Rd, Hinckley, MN

body:

| | |
---
| Peter,
Having been in and around politics most of my life, I’ve learned to trust my instincts. You know I’m passionate about protecting our democracy from the very real danger of Trumpism, but I want you to know something else:

_**We can win this race.**_
* We’ve received national media attention (see below!)
* Donations are flowing in!
* Momentum to fight for Democracy is building across the country!

But I need your immediate financial help to put this across the goal line. _**Early voting starts on Tuesday. The election is just a little more than a month away.**_ _**Now is the time for you to act by donating to my campaign.**_ Will you help me defeat Trumpism and protect our democracy? If so, there’s no time to delay. Please give today.
---
| [I WANT TO HELP](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=378f5e5620&e=544bb4cd89 "I WANT TO HELP")
---
| Please chip in whatever you can — $5, $10, $100, $1000.**Your donation can help to rescue our democracy** , even as politicians like Trump and my opponent seem ready to watch it die. Thank you for giving to my campaign right now. We can do this — together!
---
|

name: House Republicans
subject: Tell Biden: Reinstate the Keystone XL Pipeline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
America deserves total energy independence
Peter -- In light of Joe Biden's State of the Union address, the time has come to send a message that will echo throughout the halls of Washington: **Americans are TIRED of skyrocketing gas prices and our new dependence on foreign oil.**
**[SIGN ON: TELL BIDEN TO REINSTATE THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60010470:JZuqv1oNa:m:1:3317145305:EC9FDBD8CC4101B3EB83ABD5CE299A48:r)**
**Under President Trump, America was ENERGY INDEPENDENT!**
_Under Joe Biden, he greenlit a massive Russian pipeline and canceled the Keystone XL project ..._
You have two choices. [**1) You can sign onto our petition to restore American energy independence and lower gas prices for ALL of us...**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60010470:JZuqv1oNa:m:1:3317145305:EC9FDBD8CC4101B3EB83ABD5CE299A48:r) _Or 2) You can watch prices go EVEN HIGHER._
**[SIGN ON: TELL BIDEN TO REINSTATE THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60010470:JZuqv1oNa:m:1:3317145305:EC9FDBD8CC4101B3EB83ABD5CE299A48:r)**
[**If you believe in American Energy Independence, Democracy, and the Keystone Pipeline, sign your name onto our petition right now.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60010470:JZuqv1oNa:m:1:3317145305:EC9FDBD8CC4101B3EB83ABD5CE299A48:r)
Your signature today is important, Peter.
Thanks,
House Republicans

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: We need your voice to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Fair Fight Action has been nominated to receive a grant, but we need your help - will you get us over the finish line?
Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43669441/338190247/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzE3ZjRjYi1kNGIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6mPKcSUq_htwOV0Od5tiSxzIJXM4epMFfo7Zc_oacJM=&emci=9b2fa0f2-23b1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6317f4cb-d4b1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend, We’ve been presented with a rare opportunity. Today, we are writing to ask for your support without asking for your hard-earned dollars. Fair Fight Action has been nominated for a grant from CREDO mobile. We are one of three phenomenal non-profit nominees who will split a grant of $100,000 to support our respective causes. In short: with every vote we earn, the bigger our portion of the grant becomes. So it’s time to **#GetOutTheVote**! **[Can you spare a moment to vote for our efforts to safeguard our democracy and protect the rights of voters like you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43669442/338190249/1491935410?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzE3ZjRjYi1kNGIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6mPKcSUq_htwOV0Od5tiSxzIJXM4epMFfo7Zc_oacJM=&emci=9b2fa0f2-23b1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6317f4cb-d4b1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277)** We are so grateful for your ongoing support as a partner in this fight, and we are continuously humbled by your investment in our mission. With just a few clicks, you can help us move toward the future of free and fair elections that we are striving for. Because of your support, Fair Fight Action now has this chance to gain more resources for the fight to ensure that every voter’s voice is heard. We hope you can help carry us over the finish line. You can also share this message with friends, family, and your allies in the voting rights fight! Having your back in this means so much to us. We are in this together. In solidarity, Team Fair Fight Action [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43669443/338190250/1086193968?refcode=CREDOemailSUP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzE3ZjRjYi1kNGIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6mPKcSUq_htwOV0Od5tiSxzIJXM4epMFfo7Zc_oacJM=) |
---|---|---

clean_body: Fair Fight Action has been nominated to receive a grant, but we need your help - will you get us over the finish line? Fair Fight | | | Friend, We’ve been presented with a rare opportunity. Today, we are writing to ask for your support without asking for your hard-earned dollars. Fair Fight Action has been nominated for a grant from CREDO mobile. We are one of three phenomenal non-profit nominees who will split a grant of $100,000 to support our respective causes. In short: with every vote we earn, the bigger our portion of the grant becomes. So it’s time to #GetOutTheVote! We are so grateful for your ongoing support as a partner in this fight, and we are continuously humbled by your investment in our mission. With just a few clicks, you can help us move toward the future of free and fair elections that we are striving for. Because of your support, Fair Fight Action now has this chance to gain more resources for the fight to ensure that every voter’s voice is heard. We hope you can help carry us over the finish line. You can also share this message with friends, family, and your allies in the voting rights fight! Having your back in this means so much to us. We are in this together. In solidarity, Team Fair Fight Action = | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-430 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: It's important, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
more children from Florida can grow up with an incredible story of opportunity like mine
| | |
---
Friend: It's important for me to share my story with you about why I'm running and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.
**Back when I was a social worker, I met a young boy who was being seriously neglected at home.** He needed immediate support – but I was told it would be weeks before he could be evaluated. I didn't think he would make it until then, so I went around the red tape and got him the help he needed. I was reprimanded, but that's what it took to save his life.

I remember being so angry that the system designed to help children like him had totally failed him. **That's when I heard that the Orlando Police Department was recruiting, and I took a call to protect and serve my community, to help people like that young boy.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43670473/338194725/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2776-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTNkNDE3OS1kNWIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNj1GV2H3QrWh6_KLqFounabWIvRKYVgCxyRag3M0HA=)
Fast-forward 27 years: I was Orlando's first woman chief of police and worked tirelessly so children like that young boy I'd met as a social worker didn't have to live in fear of playing in the streets. In my last days as chief, Mayor Buddy Dyer sat me down for a chat:
**"You have to run for Congress," he told me.**

Me? A politician? I never thought of myself that way. I even laughed.
But, as I let the idea sink in, I thought about that young boy I helped as a social worker – we were still in touch three decades later. I knew he wasn’t the only one who had to overcome hardship in his childhood: 1 in 7 kids in the U.S. lives in poverty. If I could do something to help kids like him, wouldn’t it be wrong to pass up the opportunity?

That’s when I realized that I needed to run for office to help as many children and working families as I could – so that in the next generation, more children from Florida could grow up with an incredible story of opportunity like mine. Ever since then, I’ve never stopped fighting toward that goal.
**[I'll never tire of an opportunity to do good and to serve the most vulnerable members of my community, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more now to help send me to the Senate and continue my work of building a better future for our children.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43670474/338194727/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2776-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTNkNDE3OS1kNWIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNj1GV2H3QrWh6_KLqFounabWIvRKYVgCxyRag3M0HA=)**
Not a day goes by that I don't think about that child – or all of the working families who are counting on leaders like me to help them get through dark times. To thrive and not just survive.
**For me, that's what this is all about – and it's why I believe the Senate is where I can do the most good. If I win this race, Democrats can expand our Senate majority. We'll be able to extend the enhanced Child Tax Credit that's cut child poverty by more than 40%. We'll protect children from gun violence. And we'll help families keep food on the table by making groceries and gas more affordable.**
[**That's the long and short of why I'm in this race, friend. If you're ready to help me build a better future, will you donate to my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43670475/338194729/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2776-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTNkNDE3OS1kNWIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNj1GV2H3QrWh6_KLqFounabWIvRKYVgCxyRag3M0HA=)

Thanks for reading my story,

Val Demings
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43670476/338194730/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2776-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTNkNDE3OS1kNWIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNj1GV2H3QrWh6_KLqFounabWIvRKYVgCxyRag3M0HA=)

clean_body: more children from Florida can grow up with an incredible story of opportunity like mine | | | Friend: It's important for me to share my story with you about why I'm running and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read. Back when I was a social worker, I met a young boy who was being seriously neglected at home. He needed immediate support – but I was told it would be weeks before he could be evaluated. I didn't think he would make it until then, so I went around the red tape and got him the help he needed. I was reprimanded, but that's what it took to save his life. I remember being so angry that the system designed to help children like him had totally failed him. That's when I heard that the Orlando Police Department was recruiting, and I took a call to protect and serve my community, to help people like that young boy. = Fast-forward 27 years: I was Orlando's first woman chief of police and worked tirelessly so children like that young boy I'd met as a social worker didn't have to live in fear of playing in the streets. In my last days as chief, Mayor Buddy Dyer sat me down for a chat: "You have to run for Congress," he told me. Me? A politician? I never thought of myself that way. I even laughed. But, as I let the idea sink in, I thought about that young boy I helped as a social worker – we were still in touch three decades later. I knew he wasn’t the only one who had to overcome hardship in his childhood: 1 in 7 kids in the U.S. lives in poverty. If I could do something to help kids like him, wouldn’t it be wrong to pass up the opportunity? That’s when I realized that I needed to run for office to help as many children and working families as I could – so that in the next generation, more children from Florida could grow up with an incredible story of opportunity like mine. Ever since then, I’ve never stopped fighting toward that goal. = Not a day goes by that I don't think about that child – or all of the working families who are counting on leaders like me to help them get through dark times. To thrive and not just survive. For me, that's what this is all about – and it's why I believe the Senate is where I can do the most good. If I win this race, Democrats can expand our Senate majority. We'll be able to extend the enhanced Child Tax Credit that's cut child poverty by more than 40%. We'll protect children from gun violence. And we'll help families keep food on the table by making groceries and gas more affordable. = Thanks for reading my story, Val Demings | | = | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. name: Team Abby
subject: yes, we're back in your inbox
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hi again, Peter: yes, we're back in your inbox with _another_ email about Abby's campaign, and it's because even though we met our massive **end-of-quarter FEC goal last night (thank you!), Republicans just launched a nonsense lawsuit in _another_ desperate attempt to kick Abby off the ballot.**

We know you get a lot of emails from us, but we only reach out so much because this race, our grassroots fundraising goals and the role you play are so, so important – particularly as the GOP is doubling down in their attacks on our campaign. Please give us just a moment to explain.
You see, our campaign is about winning a real leader for Iowa. It's about fighting for working families, who deserve affordable health care and confidence in their democracy. It's about not just protecting, but _expanding_ our Senate majority. This race is incredibly important, and defeating a seven-term incumbent like Sen. Grassley is no walk in the park. It's clear from Republicans' TWO attempts to remove Abby from the ballot that they're feeling threatened and will go to extreme lengths to protect Sen. Grassley.
That's where you come in – and why you get so many emails from us. Our team is working hard every single day to defeat Sen. Grassley, but ultimately, winning this race will come down to people like your friends, your neighbors and, well, you, Peter.

**We need grassroots resources from folks all over Iowa to power this campaign so we can fight these slew of Republican attacks to knock us off the ballot – but also so we can travel across the state, place ads on TV and radio, and speak with critical swing voters.**
Here's the bottom line: these emails, and our grassroots fundraising that fuels this campaign, help us raise the funds we need to win this race and expand our Senate majority. So, we are sorry for filling up your inbox, but we aren't sorry for doing what it takes to fight for Iowans.

**We can't do this without you, Peter, which is why, in the face of Republican attacks trying to kick us off the ballot, we're asking for your again. [Please, will you make your first ever donation to this campaign by rushing $5 right now? Whatever grassroots commitment you can make today ensures we will have the resources to flip this seat blue and expand Democratic Senate control.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43671333/338198249/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk817-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWYwNjRhZC1kOWIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xmuyAfME-ybYRmkLp0rWw1cYp6qVaZBELef1pMnA0zk=)**
__If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43671334/338198250/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk817-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWYwNjRhZC1kOWIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xmuyAfME-ybYRmkLp0rWw1cYp6qVaZBELef1pMnA0zk=)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43671335/338198251/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk817-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWYwNjRhZC1kOWIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xmuyAfME-ybYRmkLp0rWw1cYp6qVaZBELef1pMnA0zk=)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43671336/338198252/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk817-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWYwNjRhZC1kOWIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xmuyAfME-ybYRmkLp0rWw1cYp6qVaZBELef1pMnA0zk=)
---
| | [Other](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43671337/338198253/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk817-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWYwNjRhZC1kOWIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xmuyAfME-ybYRmkLp0rWw1cYp6qVaZBELef1pMnA0zk=)
---
Polling has shown us that Iowans are turning against Sen. Grassley: he's up against record-high disapproval ratings, and only 27% of likely Iowa voters said they want to reelect him. **Our grassroots movement is _working,_ and if Abby wins, Democrats will be virtually guaranteed to maintain our majority. It's no surprise then how desperate Republicans have gotten in their attempts to attack Abby and protect Sen. Grassley.**
We've got the advantage of momentum on the ground, but the GOP has a war chest of more than $41 MILLION dedicated to taking back the Senate and defeating challengers just like Abby. **[Winning this is going to happen $5, $15 or $25 at a time. So please, if you're with us, join our team of grassroots donors by rushing $5 to flip this seat and protect our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43671338/338198254/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk817-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWYwNjRhZC1kOWIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xmuyAfME-ybYRmkLp0rWw1cYp6qVaZBELef1pMnA0zk=)**
Thank you for fighting so hard alongside Abby. Together, we _will_ defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley in Iowa!

– Team Abby

name: Laura Nevitt,  Keystone Progress
subject: Only one week until the summit -- have you registered?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress, www
body:
Dear Friend,

We are only ONE WEEK away from the biggest annual gathering of progressive activists, candidates, and allies in the state of Pennsylvania, the virtual Keystone Progress Summit - Pennsylvania’s Progressive Summit.

On April 8-9, we will be discussing some of the most important issues in the state, from organizing in rural areas to criminal justice reform. We’ll also be hearing from lawmakers and candidates.
REGISTER [https://hopin.com/events/keystone-progress-summit-2022?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=040122]

Once you register, you can join us for a Conversation with the State Legislative Black Caucus with the Caucus Chair, Rep. Bullock, to discuss legislative priorities that will impact Black communities.

We’re hosting an interactive Candidate Forum with Democratic Candidates for U.S. Senate and Candidate Forum: Candidates for Lt. Governor with Keystone Progress moderators Carmina Taylor and Nick Pressley.

A Conversation with Attorney General Josh Shapiro will feature a pre-recorded session with the Democratic candidate for governor.

Do not miss this chance to grow this movement and create a progressive Pennsylvania. Too much is at risk, and now is the time to act.

REGISTER TODAY. [https://hopin.com/events/keystone-progress-summit-2022?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=040122]

We can't wait to see you there!

Laura Nevitt
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress, www.keystoneprogress.org.

Keystone Progress

On April 8-9, we will be discussing some of the most important issues in the state, from organizing in rural areas to criminal justice reform. We’ll also be hearing from lawmakers and candidates. REGISTER [] Once you register, you can join us for a Conversation with the State Legislative Black Caucus with the Caucus Chair, Rep. Bullock, to discuss legislative priorities that will impact Black communities. We’re hosting an interactive Candidate Forum with Democratic Candidates for U.S. Senate and Candidate Forum: Candidates for Lt. Governor with Keystone Progress moderators Carmina Taylor and Nick Pressley. A Conversation with Attorney General Josh Shapiro will feature a pre-recorded session with the Democratic candidate for governor. Do not miss this chance to grow this movement and create a progressive Pennsylvania. Too much is at risk, and now is the time to act. REGISTER TODAY. [] We can't wait to see you there! Laura Nevitt Keystone Progress [] Paid for by Keystone Progress, www.keystoneprogress.org. name: Emily Seidel
subject: The government is trying to take over your healthcare
body:
URGENT: Congress is considering price controls on prescription drugs representing a dangerous government takeover of your medicine cabinet. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9738%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=1hE8fHP6JQq4IhsvSdecJA&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27191%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C5Cm4cNU%2fY3EuCJoUsnqaw&sysid=1)
---
**URGENT: Congress is considering price controls on prescription drugs representing a dangerous government takeover of your medicine cabinet.** How much is the life of your spouse or children or grandchildren worth? If some in Congress get their way, they will empower government officials to decide which medicines you or your loved ones can take. We need to know where you stand, Friend:
---
**SHOULD THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT DICTATE THE PRICE OF LIFESAVING PRESCRIPTION DRUGS?**
---
| | [**YES**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27192%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lsy3a0YzSfrOhSNx3gi5XA&sysid=1)
---
| [**NO**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27193%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bfS774dO3v3f7Z98jiEhIw&sysid=1)
---
| | [**YES**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27192%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lsy3a0YzSfrOhSNx3gi5XA&sysid=1)
---
| [**NO**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27193%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bfS774dO3v3f7Z98jiEhIw&sysid=1)
---
| | _Please submit your response to represent your area by midnight tonight._
---
**Friend: If you do not believe the government should control the price of prescription drugs, then you must make your voice heard. ** Members of Congress are moving quickly on legislation that would give government officials the ability to dictate prices for prescription medications regardless of patient need or doctor recommendation. The cost of certain drugs could stand to be lower, but government price controls are absolutely the wrong way to do it. When governments with single-payer health care systems engage in price fixing, the result is fewer options for patients. The European Union is routinely unable to import critical drugs due to its stifling price controls. Canada also suffers from this misguided policy causing them to ban some drugs that are “too expensive” even if those drugs are most effective at saving lives. We’ve got to bolster our natural allies in the Senate and House to make sure they hold firm. AFP’s grassroots activists will play a key role as they lobby congressional, local, and Washington, D.C. offices. We’ve got to mobilize people who don’t want federal government control over drug pricing that will lead to drug shortages and fewer new breakthrough cures. Experts say government price controls would mean 135 fewer new cures and a loss of 331 million life years. This approach is deadly. This is why we have launched a petition to force your elected officials to vote against any consideration of drug pricing controls. But we need 100,000 signatures to make them think twice about ignoring your demands. **You can make your voice heard here:[https://americansforprosperity.org/drug-pricing-petition](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27194%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MJ8V9ApXXC%2fHrxNqwJ1Jww&sysid=1)** We think enough is enough, but we need to know where top supporters like you stand, Friend. That’s why we’re conducting a 1-question survey for readers in your area by midnight tonight.
---
**SHOULD THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT DICTATE THE PRICE OF LIFESAVING PRESCRIPTION DRUGS?**
---
| | [**YES**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27192%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lsy3a0YzSfrOhSNx3gi5XA&sysid=1)
---
| [**NO**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27193%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bfS774dO3v3f7Z98jiEhIw&sysid=1)
---
| | [**YES**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27192%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lsy3a0YzSfrOhSNx3gi5XA&sysid=1)
---
| [**NO**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27193%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bfS774dO3v3f7Z98jiEhIw&sysid=1)
---
| | Best, --Emily Emily Seidel
President and CEO, Americans for Prosperity
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27191%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C5Cm4cNU%2fY3EuCJoUsnqaw&sysid=1)
---
Americans for Prosperity 1310 N Courthouse Road Suite 700 Arlington Virginia 22201 United States
This email was sent by Americans for Prosperity.
---

When governments with single-payer health care systems engage in price fixing, the result is fewer options for patients. The European Union is routinely unable to import critical drugs due to its stifling price controls. Canada also suffers from this misguided policy causing them to ban some drugs that are “too expensive” even if those drugs are most effective at saving lives. We’ve got to bolster our natural allies in the Senate and House to make sure they hold firm. AFP’s grassroots activists will play a key role as they lobby congressional, local, and Washington, D.C. offices. We’ve got to mobilize people who don’t want federal government control over drug pricing that will lead to drug shortages and fewer new breakthrough cures. Experts say government price controls would mean 135 fewer new cures and a loss of 331 million life years. This approach is deadly. This is why we have launched a petition to force your elected officials to vote against any consideration of drug pricing controls. But we need 100,000 signatures to make them think twice about ignoring your demands. You can make your voice heard here: We think enough is enough, but we need to know where top supporters like you stand, Friend. That’s why we’re conducting a 1-question survey for readers in your area by midnight tonight. SHOULD THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT DICTATE THE PRICE OF LIFESAVING PRESCRIPTION DRUGS? | | | | | | | | Best, --Emily Emily Seidel President and CEO, Americans for Prosperity Americans for Prosperity 1310 N Courthouse Road Suite 700 Arlington Virginia 22201 United States

# Watch Live: Pennsylvania Leadership Conference Governor Forum
_Live on PCN at 1:45pm _ **Friend, **

Today at 1:45pm, Bill McSwain will take the stage at the Pennsylvania Leadership Conference for a gubernatorial candidate forum to discuss the issues most important to Pennsylvanians.

Follow the conversation by tuning in LIVE TODAY on PCN or via PCN.com by [clicking here](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=aaf0e64272&e=b1ec95759b).

Can't watch the livestream? Be on the lookout for videos and highlights in your inbox later this week!

Our campaign to restore Liberty to our great Commonwealth is growing every day because of supporters like you. This is only the beginning!

Yours in the fight,

Bill McSwain

Commissioner Banks had this to say about our campaign:
---
_“Marc cares deeply about our community. He and his wife have been giving back to Walton County for as long as I’ve known them. Marc may be new to politics, but he’s long been a strong supporter of our community. I’ve seen Marc’s heart and I know that he will do what is right for the families and communities of Georgia’s 10th district. Marc has my full endorsement and I hope the voters of Walton County will join me in supporting Marc McMain.”_
---
I am grateful for Commissioner Banks’ service on the Walton County Board of Education. As an advocate for our youth and their ability to compete with workforce ready skills, Banks demonstrates how we need to safeguard the minds and hearts of our children against the indoctrination perpetuated by the Radical Left agenda.
---
The silver lining of dealing with COVID-19 was more parental awareness about how and what our children are being taught. Parents around the country have voiced their anger about the Radical Left agenda of ensnaring the minds of children with their outrageous ideologies. **As your next Congressman,** I will fight against the indoctrination of our youth. Together we can champion quality education for every child in Georgia!
---
Please join Commissioner Banks in supporting my campaign. Your support in **a donation of any amount toda** y will show the Radical Left Democrats that our children will no longer serve as fodder in their indoctrination factories. Please consider making your own endorsement today...
---

clean_body: | | | | He Believes In Me Like I Believe In You Peter, I am pleased to share that Walton County Commissioner, Mark Banks, has just endorsed my campaign. Commissioner Banks has served the people of District 2 since 2012, and his leadership has earned him a second term. Commissioner Banks had this to say about our campaign: “Marc cares deeply about our community. He and his wife have been giving back to Walton County for as long as I’ve known them. Marc may be new to politics, but he’s long been a strong supporter of our community. I’ve seen Marc’s heart and I know that he will do what is right for the families and communities of Georgia’s 10th district. Marc has my full endorsement and I hope the voters of Walton County will join me in supporting Marc McMain.” I am grateful for Commissioner Banks’ service on the Walton County Board of Education. As an advocate for our youth and their ability to compete with workforce ready skills, Banks demonstrates how we need to safeguard the minds and hearts of our children against the indoctrination perpetuated by the Radical Left agenda. The silver lining of dealing with COVID-19 was more parental awareness about how and what our children are being taught. Parents around the country have voiced their anger about the Radical Left agenda of ensnaring the minds of children with their outrageous ideologies. As your next Congressman, I will fight against the indoctrination of our youth. Together we can champion quality education for every child in Georgia! Please join Commissioner Banks in supporting my campaign. Your support in a donation of any amount toda y will show the Radical Left Democrats that our children will no longer serve as fodder in their indoctrination factories. Please consider making your own endorsement today... MARC WILL FIGHT FOR THE HEARTS AND MINDS OF YOUTH IN GEORGIA! | | | | | | In Liberty, Marc McMain Congressional Candidate for GA-10 | | [Paid for by Marc McMain for Congress, Inc.]() Our mailing address: Marc McMain for Congress, Inc. P.O. Box 191 Loganville, GA 30052

| Peter,
Having been in and around politics most of my life, I’ve learned to trust my instincts. You know I’m passionate about protecting our democracy from the very real danger of Trumpism, but I want you to know something else:

_**We can win this race.**_
* We’ve received national media attention (see below!)
* Donations are flowing in!
* Momentum to fight for Democracy is building across the country!

But I need your immediate financial help to put this across the goal line. _**Early voting starts on Tuesday. The election is just a little more than a month away.**_ _**Now is the time for you to act by donating to my campaign.**_ Will you help me defeat Trumpism and protect our democracy? If so, there’s no time to delay. Please give today.
---
| [I WANT TO HELP](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=5fe692c0e8&e=544bb4cd89 "I WANT TO HELP")

| Please chip in whatever you can — $5, $10, $100, $1000.**Your donation can help to rescue our democracy** , even as politicians like Trump and my opponent seem ready to watch it die. Thank you for giving to my campaign right now. We can do this — together!

Peter: Gov. Lujan Grisham's decision to legalize cannabis will bring millions of dollars to New Mexico, create thousands of jobs, and take an important step to end the failed war on drugs that has disproportionately harmed communities of color.
We're so proud of Gov. Lujan Grisham's bold vision for our state – but to continue passing some of the most progressive policies in the country, she needs your help now.
Due to state regulations, Gov. Lujan Grisham wasn't allowed to fundraise for THREE months during the last legislative session – and now, **she's approaching ANOTHER fundraising blackout on April 5!**
**That's why Gov. Lujan Grisham needs to raise $100,000 before Wednesday. If she doesn't reach this goal, her resources could dry up at the worst possible moment, and the GOP could gain momentum.**

We're so proud of Gov. Lujan Grisham for signing this bill into law – but she needs your help to win reelection to continue passing progressive policies. = | | = Peter: Gov. Lujan Grisham's decision to legalize cannabis will bring millions of dollars to New Mexico, create thousands of jobs, and take an important step to end the failed war on drugs that has disproportionately harmed communities of color. We're so proud of Gov. Lujan Grisham's bold vision for our state – but to continue passing some of the most progressive policies in the country, she needs your help now. Due to state regulations, Gov. Lujan Grisham wasn't allowed to fundraise for THREE months during the last legislative session – and now, she's approaching ANOTHER fundraising blackout on April 5! That's why Gov. Lujan Grisham needs to raise $100,000 before Wednesday. name: John James
subject: BREAKING: President Trump just ENDORSED me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by John James for Congress, Inc
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60011843:Ji9Od1o2N:m:1:3317145305:BAB3237C61BDC1B15D2829C4C56B139B:r)
---
Hey Peter, it's John. I've received some great news. I just received President Trump's endorsement.
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60011843:Ji9Od1o2N:m:1:3317145305:BAB3237C61BDC1B15D2829C4C56B139B:r)
---
_" John James is a fantastic candidate running for Congress in Michigan's 10th Congressional District. John was a brave combat pilot, flying the very impressive Apache Helicopter in Operation Iraqi Freedom. John isn't just tough, but he is also very smart--he received his Master's Degree in Supply Chain Management from Penn State and his MBA from the University of Michigan. He is a job creator and a problem solver who knows how to deliver for Michigan. What's more important during a supply chain crisis than a supply chain expert? John James is going to be a great Republican member of Congress, and has my Complete and Total Endorsement!" _ **\- President Donald J. Trump**
---
| | **I 'm honored to have President Trump's Complete and Total endorsement for this fight ahead.** Congress needs a combat veteran and fighter who can hold his own against Nancy Pelosi and the left and an expert who knows how to get our economy working again. _I 'll be that leader in Congress, but I need your help. _ **_[Peter, will you stand with President Trump and CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60011843:Ji9Od1o2N:m:1:3317145305:BAB3237C61BDC1B15D2829C4C56B139B:r)_** Let's Fly! John James _Sent from John 's iPhone_

name: Jevin Hodge
subject: Our community needs a voice in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jevin D
body:
This movement isn’t about just me — it’s about this community.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43659319/338146697/2116278533?refcode=BLU-HODG-Welcome2-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTQ3OGRlYS1iZWIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w9EF9g41NtFANK4p0t5qYciDwYv14SFlH1ggmxML84w=)
---
| Team,

I’m running for Congress to serve Arizona’s 6th district. But this movement isn’t about just me — it’s about this community.

Right now, too many politicians in Washington only care about their own interests. They aren’t focused on the issues affecting Arizonans.

**That’s why I’m running, because it’s so important our community has a voice in Congress — but to do this job well, I need to hear directly from you. So I’m asking if you’ll take a few minutes to fill out this brief survey. Your feedback will help guide decision-making on our campaign.**

Hi team -- I want you to know that I reviewed this community's past survey responses and was extremely impressed.

**That's why, after careful consideration and multiple conversations with our Senior Leadership Team, I'm inviting you to join the DSCC's exclusive Majority Strategy Group.**

The handful of folks in this group provide critical input to our Senior Leadership Team and are helping us finalize the Democratic Party's official strategy to defend and expand our Senate majority.

We were _only_ able to flip the Senate because of the strategic decisions you helped us make leading up to the 2020 elections. And I'm 100% confident your input will help us win again.

**[So please, click this link to accept my personal invitation right away.](https://go.dscc.org/go/5995?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220401-Christie-StrategyGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220401-Christie-StrategyGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=3588%2E9716520%2EPZAiR-)**

_*To maintain the integrity of our data, we ask that you please do not share your link with non-members._

I'm excited to have you on the team!

Christie

name: Nina Turner
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
YOU are the difference in this campaign
#

Hello Somebody!
My team is still adding up the totals from last night, but I couldn’t wait to say THANK YOU!!
Because of this movement's generous support, we already know that we hit our goal of 5,000 grassroots contributions. Thank you.
Your support means so much to me on a very deep emotional and spiritual level. It’s because of you — this grassroots movement donating $1, $3, $11, $27 at a time — that we are in a position to win this election.
We’re running a people-powered campaign that centers the voices of everyday working people — NOT the millionaires and billionaires who try to rig the system against the rest of us.
YOU are the difference in this campaign — and don’t ever let anyone tell you otherwise. Thank you so much for planting the seeds now for our success on Election Day.
As long as we continue to stand together, there’s not a doubt in my mind that we’re going to win this race and send our people-powered movement straight to Congress!
Thank you again, for everything.
With these hands,
Nina 💜
P.S. We aren’t slowing down now! Early voting starts in a couple of days, and my team and I are working hard to get the word out now that the districts are set. **[If you can afford it, a $27 contribution would really help us expand our GOTV plan and make sure we reach every possible voter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43675993/338208511/413031954?refcode2=b51df862-e1b1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220401-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTFkZjg2Mi1lMWIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJFd0mJJ8I_qfTkq3WcR3gfJO3ngEEsMkFHH1tnzTec=)**

body:
You can watch in person or online | | | | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=8b3b5e88b6&e=1090c5c412)
---
| | |
# **Congressional Debate Tonight**
Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Preparations are all set for this evening's congressional debate. Lisa Scheller and I will take questions from a moderator beginning at 7 p.m. in Northampton Community College's Alumni Hall, which is across the street from the main campus on 3835 Green Pond Road in Bethlehem. The debate is sponsored by the Northampton County Republican Committee.

You can attend in person or watch online. If you want to watch in person, doors open at 6 p.m. I'd arrive early because it looks like there will be a sizeable crowd. To watch online, the Northampton County GOP will use Facebook Live to stream the debate from their [Facebook page](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=37be87e854&e=1090c5c412).

If you're interested in learning more about why I am running for office and want an explanation that can't fit into one-minute, debate-sized soundbites, please check out yesterday's [blog post](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=27f2c7f654&e=1090c5c412) on my campaign website. There, I elaborate on the reasons why I am working so hard to Keep America Free.

Thank you for all the well-wishes and prayers. I am truly looking forward to this evening's debate,

Sincerely,

---
|
---

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: The latest stop of our Berkshires to Boston Tour in Essex County was a great success!
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friends,
I had a great day in Essex County on Thursday during the latest stop of my Berkshires to Boston tour of the Commonwealth.
We started at the historic Agawam Diner, meeting diners and greeted by owners, and sisters, Angela Mitchell and Ethel DePasquale.
---
|
---
| Leah Cole Allen and I then went to her Alma mater, Lynn Vocational and Technical Institute for a tour of their facility by principal, Fred Gallo. I was joined by Lynn City Councilor, Rick Starbard, also a former teacher at the school.
---
|
---
| We then visited Boston Clear Water Company in Lynnfield, MA, a natural spring dating back to 1640. We were amazed by the cross on the property which came from a Polish church, honoring the last pandemic, the Spanish flu. Thanks to Lynnfield School Committee candidate Corrie Doyle Luongo. Best of luck to her in her election on April 12th!
---
|
---
| Next up was lunch at Mills 58 in Peabody, and a visit to the Peabody Area Chamber of Commerce and a discussion of small business needs.
---
|
---
| Leah and I then visited for a question and answer meeting with residents at Brooksby Village.
---
---
We then stopped at Salem Superior Court, the site of our rally with Jeffrey Kuhner a few years ago. Thanks to all who came to meet us there!
---
---
| We stopped at Village Restaurant for a mid-afternoon snack of fried clams, and chatting with friends in Essex, Massachusetts.
---
|
---
| Last, we stopped in at Beverly Depot, an awesome bar and restaurant created out of an old train depot.
---
|
---
| Thanks to all the businesses who hosted us, and all who came out to show support and ask great questions on the trail.
I can't wait for next week's stop in Hampden County! The itinerary will be posted this weekend; check for it and information on other upcoming events on the [Events page](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JCKje-lmjsFkrfaXXfKlZRLYkLJGIlfCDM_opoPDnHpy4liCFgfRYO8tHLoUgPpG51gutQiKZIaC6R1TGBKtTskpkeEsnplRJVX1m98VafjBqF2nPcTCchk7tA5OqxsJa5qq2CoPAx3hCv4ZbfIfnKTAdiLZEQTM&c=fzQAym4jiqU8rQpllgj1F1cTBHibRucYCwrFPekH08zMMvoeW5RnOw==&ch=SZuvzj3Wu7E842aOou7nfj6Vr-a_lIEquRUT3gCYknQ-swx-ZATq0g==) of my Website.
---
| By the way, Leah and I love the Berkshires to Boston Tour, but of course it isn't our only campaign event. We're busy criss-crossing the state every day, attending different events and chatting with voters. You can find out more information at this link:
---
---
| [View Upcoming Events](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JCKje-lmjsFkrfaXXfKlZRLYkLJGIlfCDM_opoPDnHpy4liCFgfRYO8tHLoUgPpG51gutQiKZIaC6R1TGBKtTskpkeEsnplRJVX1m98VafjBqF2nPcTCchk7tA5OqxsJa5qq2CoPAx3hCv4ZbfIfnKTAdiLZEQTM&c=fzQAym4jiqU8rQpllgj1F1cTBHibRucYCwrFPekH08zMMvoeW5RnOw==&ch=SZuvzj3Wu7E842aOou7nfj6Vr-a_lIEquRUT3gCYknQ-swx-ZATq0g==)
---
---
We also have a very active group of campaign volunteers, who have already collected more than 12,000 signatures in support of my campaign:
---
|
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| Thank you as always for your support!
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
|
---

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Friends, I had a great day in Essex County on Thursday during the latest stop of my Berkshires to Boston tour of the Commonwealth. We started at the historic Agawam Diner, meeting diners and greeted by owners, and sisters, Angela Mitchell and Ethel DePasquale. | | Leah Cole Allen and I then went to her Alma mater, Lynn Vocational and Technical Institute for a tour of their facility by principal, Fred Gallo. I was joined by Lynn City Councilor, Rick Starbard, also a former teacher at the school. | | We then visited Boston Clear Water Company in Lynnfield, MA, a natural spring dating back to 1640. We were amazed by the cross on the property which came from a Polish church, honoring the last pandemic, the Spanish flu. Thanks to Lynnfield School Committee candidate Corrie Doyle Luongo. Best of luck to her in her election on April 12th! | | Next up was lunch at Mills 58 in Peabody, and a visit to the Peabody Area Chamber of Commerce and a discussion of small business needs. | | Leah and I then visited for a question and answer meeting with residents at Brooksby Village. We then stopped at Salem Superior Court, the site of our rally with Jeffrey Kuhner a few years ago. Thanks to all who came to meet us there! | We stopped at Village Restaurant for a mid-afternoon snack of fried clams, and chatting with friends in Essex, Massachusetts. | | Last, we stopped in at Beverly Depot, an awesome bar and restaurant created out of an old train depot. | | Thanks to all the businesses who hosted us, and all who came out to show support and ask great questions on the trail. I can't wait for next week's stop in Hampden County! The itinerary will be posted this weekend; check for it and information on other upcoming events on the == of my Website. | By the way, Leah and I love the Berkshires to Boston Tour, but of course it isn't our only campaign event. We're busy criss-crossing the state every day, attending different events and chatting with voters. You can find out more information at this link: | == We also have a very active group of campaign volunteers, who have already collected more than 12,000 signatures in support of my campaign: | | | | | Thank you as always for your support! | Sincerely, | | | | == | | | | Paid for privately by Diehl for Massachusetts PO Box 60362 Worcester, MA 01606 | Our Company | Contact Us | FAQs | Privacy Policy | | | | | | | Diehl for Massachusetts | PO Box 60362, Worcester, MA 01606 | | Sent by mailto:info@geoffdiehl.com in collaboration with |

name: Great America Update
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6853%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=CfxoW6HQzGjUoLDzWW2Oaw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69441%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FovdysNM2DnLwB7vf0QHdw&sysid=1) Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69441%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FovdysNM2DnLwB7vf0QHdw&sysid=1) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69442%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yeADwBskllf9cqk1L8s1rA&sysid=1) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism --especially among our young people--that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69442%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yeADwBskllf9cqk1L8s1rA&sysid=1) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69443%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EaPrPn4RO1P7R04ymLjsUg&sysid=1) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

body:
Hi Peter, it's Amanda, Abby's campaign manager. You might be wondering why I'm bumping this email from Abby. Well folks, the GOP just won't quit. They're so terrified of our campaign that they're trying AGAIN to stop Abby from getting on the ballot!
---
This time, they've filed a BS lawsuit in a blatant attempt to drain our campaign of critical resources. **Well, if they think that a bunch of suits and ties and an empty lawsuit can stop a PEOPLE-POWERED campaign, they've got another thing coming.**
I'm emailing you because I KNOW that I can count on you to fight for Abby during times like this, when it matters most. **[So please, will you rush $5 right now to show the GOP they've underestimated the strength of our campaign? Every dollar will help us fight back against these attacks from the GOP establishment and get us one step closer to expanding our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43680340/338214248/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk879-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODY5NDU0MS1lNmIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4eyTXpWF7sLSvbcRw2s1XMEI98BwjDY3N5YAxOE7IBk=)**
Thank you,

Amanda
Campaign Manager
Abby for Iowa

| | |

Hi Peter –

Washington Republicans just made a weak and partisan attempt at dismantling our campaign – **but they failed.**
**On Friday, the GOP made a desperate attempt at kicking me off of the ballot and giving Chuck Grassley a free pass this election cycle.**
You all have been working hard for months: gathering petition signatures, showing up to campaign events across the state, helping us hit fundraising goals and talking to your friends about this race!**It’s ridiculous that the GOP just tried to delegitimize all of your hard work to keep their pal in office so that he can continue doling out handouts to wealthy, corporate elites. **
It’s more important than ever that we show them how strong we are. [**Can you rush $5 or whatever you can spare today to remind Washington Republicans that we’re in this fight, and we’re in it to win?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43680341/338214249/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk879-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODY5NDU0MS1lNmIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4eyTXpWF7sLSvbcRw2s1XMEI98BwjDY3N5YAxOE7IBk=)
We’ve been building a movement, and we’re going to make sure that Chuck Grassley faces the toughest reelection challenge he’s had in decades. **His approval numbers are at a historic low – and the contrast between me and him is SO stark.**
We’re going to keep talking to Iowans in every corner of the state and building our coalition to beat Chuck Grassley. Today Washington Republicans lost, and we’re going to make sure that they lose again in November.
But I need you with me in this fight. **[The GOP has $41 million in their war chest to take on candidates like me – and their attacks are going to just keep coming. Can you give $5 or whatever you can spare today to help us reach our end-of-quarter goal of raising $100,000 and showing them that we’re strong enough to take them on?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43680342/338214250/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk879-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODY5NDU0MS1lNmIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4eyTXpWF7sLSvbcRw2s1XMEI98BwjDY3N5YAxOE7IBk=)**

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: From the bottom of my heart, thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I wanted to reach out and tell you how grateful I am for your support.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43680559/338215273/-947982778?amounts=3,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk895-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzY5NDU0MS1lNmIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dqNJfKTR6ZTeY3EsCeBz-S1U91nApgshwCh3bmoW_1I=)

Hi there,
I wanted to reach out and tell you how grateful I am for your support. Because of you, and grassroots donors just like you, we hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, giving us the resources we need to reach voters across New Hampshire and build a strong pathway to victory.
>From day one, your grassroots support has been critical to showing the strength of this campaign, and I'm going to need your continued support as the most competitive Senate race of the year starts to heat up.
**We have a tough fight ahead of us. But I've won tough fights before, and I know we can do it again, with you on my team. **
So from the bottom of my heart, thank you.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

As an elite Conservative Patriot, I know you need to have one - so I set one aside for you until midnight tonight._As I said, there are an extremely limited number of signed copies and this is your only chance to grab one._

**This book is an essential must-read for any America First patriot who wants to understand Donald J. Trump 's successful four years as president.**

President Trump showed us how to win. He said he was going to cut taxes, he did. He said he was going to reduce regulations, he did. Do what you told them you were going to do. That's the model that works.

**[By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60012484:JaAMh1oNY:m:1:3317145305:E6D6D16D62A6655BF1CA8EA5139CAADE:r "By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House
Majority. ")**

Pelosi's targeting conservatives across America and she has more money than she knows what to do with. Pelosi will do everything in her power to make sure we FAIL, including dragging conservatives in ALL 50 states through the mud.

Taking back the House is the key to saving America. Without the House, our country will be lost forever to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.

**[So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! copy of my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.")**

I stand with House Conservatives who fight for freedom in the swamp and do what they said they would do.

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

subject: GOP Senators Introduce Major Property Taxpayer Relief Package
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Jeb Bradley Chairman
body:
| |

| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTE4ODUzMDgxNzEwMjA0NzQ5JmM9ZDdnNyZlPTE5MjgmYj05NTEzOTk4MTkmZD1xOGYwcjVz.-pNlpJTeygHeD6PyhBt25dLVvexSL9aL1NtoJgqUrCQ)

| Friends, This week, **the NH Senate Republicans introduced a major Property Taxpayer Relief package**! This package will provide $109 million dollars in relief for municipalities designed to lower individual property taxes.

---
---
| | | |
---
“Because of sound fiscal management and New Hampshire’s business-friendly climate, state revenues are producing a large surplus. This has created the opportunity for the Legislature to deliver property tax relief to working families across the state, helping them deal with rising costs.” - Senate President Chuck Morse (R-Salem)
| |
---
|
Details:
* SB 420 Extraordinary Needs Grants for New Hampshire schools - $24.3 million dollars

* HB 398 State funding for wastewater projects - $12.65 million dollars
* SB 412 Increase in nursing home reimbursement rates - $ 5 million dollars
* SB 401 Municipal Road Construction - $30 million dollars
* SB 401 Municipal Bridge Projects - $36 million dollars
* SB 401 Doubling body-worn and dashboard camera fund - $1 million dollars

**While Washington continues to recklessly tax and spend, your NH Senate Republicans are doing all that they can to provide much needed property tax relief.** Help us continue the fight! [>>> Donate $5, $25 or even $100 to the NH Senate Republicans (Secure Link) ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTE4ODUzMDgxNzEwMjA0NzQ5JmM9ZDdnNyZlPTE5MjgmYj05NTEzOTk4MjEmZD1vOXczazBj.Or-oC6Nlm72WBbVadteo90IoKi3JTrG2Wv4ckbeUe9Y) Thank you, NH Senate Republicans

body:
America deserves total energy independence
