name: Peter Welch
subject: A note of thanks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
It means everything to have you on this team.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=167%2E61531%2ECcYN8b)
Thank you.
I’m grateful for everyone who donated before last night’s deadline, everyone who helped hit our end-of-quarter goal, and everyone who’s making it possible to grow this grassroots coalition.
When we launched this campaign back in November, we decided we would do it the Vermont way—by listening and focusing on the solutions. **And that’s exactly what we’ve done.** That’s how we’ve worked together to get things done in the House, like passing the Postal Service Reform Act—and it’s how we’ll keep working together if I have the honor of serving as Vermont’s next senator.
**It means everything to have you on this team.** You make this campaign possible, and we’re fighting side by side.
There’s a lot on the line in November. But I know that with your continued support, we’ll be able to keep this seat blue, defend our Democratic majority, and deliver what Vermonters need most—like reasonable prescription drug prices, a lower cost of living, and Medicare for All.
Thanks for fighting alongside me.
Peter

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22apr?refcode=em_20220401_t_p_ty&refcode2=167_61531_CcYN8b&akid=167%2E61531%2ECcYN8b)

name: Peter Franchot
subject: BREAKING: Delegate Darryl Barnes Endorses The Franchot/Anderson-Walker Ticket!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
I’m excited to announce that Delegate Darryl Barnes has endorsed the Franchot/Anderson-Walker gubernatorial ticket.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Individual_DarrylBarnes_1200x1200.png]
As Chairman of the Legislative Black Caucus of Maryland, Delegate Barnes has been a tireless champion for uplifting Maryland’s Black and Brown communities. His endorsement is so appreciated by our campaign and continues our momentum. His leadership prompted and inspired our Black Agenda and we share a belief in our collective duty to make Maryland a more just and prosperous state.
My running mate, Monique Anderson-Walker, is a fourth generation HBCU graduate, with a daughter at Howard University’s College of Medicine. We believe in the strength and long-standing contributions of anchor institutions like our HBCUs, and will ensure they have the resources and support to thrive and expand in the years ahead.
I’m honored to share a vision for the work we must continue to do in Maryland to ensure immediate investments and long-term solutions for Black and Brown communities. I look forward to this partnership with Chairman Barnes. Together, we’re going to level the economic, social, and political playing field for Black Marylanders under a Franchot/Anderson-Walker administration.
Chairman Barnes’ endorsement adds to the growing coalition of statewide support that continues to keep our movement ahead in the polls. I’ve already received the endorsements of over 120 current and former elected officials – the most of any candidate for Governor in both categories – and with the help of grassroots supporters like you, we’re going to pull ahead even further in the critical weeks leading up to the primary election.
We need to get the word out to all corners of Maryland about this big moment for our campaign. Will you spread the word about our major endorsement announcement by sharing the news with your friends on social media?
Click here to view and reshare on Facebook. [https://www.facebook.com/photo?fbid=544611123697620&set=a.422901372535263]
Click here to view and retweet on Twitter. [https://twitter.com/peterfranchot/status/1509942531164971013/photo/1]
Click here to view and reshare on Instagram. [https://www.instagram.com/p/Cb0QSg_NHEB/]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b086533c-c6b1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/e6afec13-e0b1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmFmZWMxMy1lMGIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rksIGg-YvV0DA-qw06uksgrCQ_pD5-fCwpZHWdjvkkk=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Andy Kim
subject: From the bottom of my heart, thank you!

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zl0ur7rrltefauhsue3o8u795rf4eg0otp09q9rg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3gm1or4cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s3imcpmepj16mon2tlmcorb7clnmior4opgm6p60pbgshgb9o5gmdrm4or2m6o6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3appl6hjr4c36e4qb6p9nm2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zepe7ikmcti7ngefpiom8e73d0ah26hno6l83on8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3gm1or4cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zv15n7vp6mgh3ai4494ra5re0hanjsgmr4sii58o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3gm1or4cth2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline fo**r you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zgt34ds2fhaabddub55mpnlsr19f2b10h50c4f7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3gm1or4cth2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z2jg4qd5e5a69ukap043u04tb7gcn4n58f859d10_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3gm1or4cth2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zglccvd385187a8ol2qrsc0bhbofjq954k26t57g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3gm1or4cth2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zkpous6ke6c0iksjv7id1tpu3cg8glq03nt71tk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3gm1or4cth2bs) today.**
When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zvlflpsmqke7m2mhdidh3vq47mcm0asor3ucrp68_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s3gm1or4cth2bs)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Self Reliance Central, [please use this preferences page](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/prefs/9z2zckial6qos62pb5tgb8bgtrkuktg9mdpsb1tmgr8).

Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective. Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. As The New York Times’ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible. And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline for you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission. Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people. You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” This free course is called “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called Imprimis , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. Imprimis is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the Wall Street Journal or the “fake news” New York Times. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set Imprimis apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an Imprimis subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year. Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. The response has been astounding. We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. So please complete the today. When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards, Bill Gray Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty. If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Self Reliance Central, . 1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We sent a number of fundraising emails ahead of last night’s fundraising deadline, so the least I could do was send one more to say thank you.
#

Friends —
We sent a number of fundraising emails ahead of last night’s fundraising deadline, so the least I could do was send one more to say thank you.
We received tens of thousands of donations in those final days ahead of the FEC deadline. It all adds up, and that’s how we win.
So, when you see us on television, or running ads online, or you see the efforts of our 15 County Campaign in Arizona, when you see us rising in the polls and when we celebrate our victory in November, it’s these donations that made it possible.
So thank you again. When I first decided to run for Senate, I never imagined in my wildest dreams we’d run a campaign where almost every donation we received came from someone chipping in just a few bucks — but that’s what’s happened.
I am very proud of that fact. You should be too.
Thanks again,
Mark
**We’re starting off the month of April looking for 15,000 people to add their name as personal endorsers of Mark Kelly’s campaign. Can you click on “Endorse Mark” below and get your name on the list? It would mean a lot.**

name: Nikki Fried
subject: I just want to say thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

Last night was a huge night for our campaign.

We didn’t just meet our fundraising goal, Peter. We didn’t just have our best digital fundraising month EVER. We went above and beyond, hitting OVER $1 MILLION raised online since we launched in August.

And we couldn’t have done it without your help.

So, from the bottom of my heart, I want to thank you. Thank you for being on our team. Thank you for standing with me. And thank you for being a part of our fight to bring something new to Florida. 💜💜

Our grassroots movement has never been stronger. Our momentum has never been higher. And together, we’re going to keep it going until Floridians have a real leader to fight for them in the Governor’s Office.

Thank you again for being on my team. Now let’s go win this race!

— Nikki

name: Tim Ryan
subject: No April Fools around here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3102%2E3611125%2Enxjc8D ][IMG]

Folks,

I know it’s April Fools’ Day, but I’m serious right now—seriously thankful
for this team!

Because of folks like you chipping in, we met our ambitious FEC
End-of-Quarter goal. I mean it when I say that we couldn’t have done it
without you.

But we can’t hit the brakes quite yet. With our first major fundraising
deadline behind us, we’ve reached a turning point in this race. We might
be up against a bunch of GOP clowns, but the dark money boosting their
campaigns is no joke.

The GOP is spending more than $80 MILLION to stop our momentum, and once
they see our strong numbers for the quarter, they’ll do absolutely
everything in their power to tear us down.

We can’t let them. The GOP’s fundraising machine makes this an uneven
playing field. So our grassroots team has to start earlier and work harder
than our opponents—[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10245?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3102%2E3611125%2Enxjc8D ]will you pitch in $25 or more to help us jumpstart
our fundraising for the new quarter?

Because of folks like you chipping in, we met our ambitious FEC End-of-Quarter goal. I mean it when I say that we couldn’t have done it without you. But we can’t hit the brakes quite yet. With our first major fundraising deadline behind us, we’ve reached a turning point in this race. We might be up against a bunch of GOP clowns, but the dark money boosting their campaigns is no joke. The GOP is spending more than $80 MILLION to stop our momentum, and once they see our strong numbers for the quarter, they’ll do absolutely everything in their power to tear us down. We can’t let them. The GOP’s fundraising machine makes this an uneven playing field. name: Doug White
subject: Working hard, working together. Trabajar duro y juntos.
body:
¡Hola, todos! Hoy podría ser el día de los inocentes, pero el trabajo que estamos realizando no es broma. Ha sido una se
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/03N-cDsMP/c?w=JpFB4sxQBSQ2vVxzTlPaY6yAfbNMKOknQP1M3XXsRn0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL3NvLzAzTi1jRHNNUD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Working hard, working together. Trabajar duro y juntos.
---
| |
---
| | ¡Hola, todos! Hoy podría ser el día de los inocentes, pero el trabajo que estamos realizando no es broma. Ha sido una semana completa de eventos y actividades, desde una recaudación de fondos en Tri Cities hasta un encuentro y saludo virtual en el condado de Douglas organizado por la presidenta demócrata del condado, Karen Keleman. A eso le siguió un viaje a Okanogan para dos días de campaña. Durante todo esto nos mantuvimos en el teléfono para mantener las llamadas. Solo esta semana hice unas 2000 llamadas a la comunidad de esta campaña y conocí a mucha gente.
---
| |
---
| | Hello everyone! Today may be April Fool’s day but the work we are putting in is no joke. It has been a full week of events and activities from a fundraiser in Tri Cities, to virtual meet and greet in Douglas County hosted by the Democratic County Chair Karen Keleman, followed by travel to Okanogan for two days of campaigning. During all of this we kept dialing the phone to keep our phone banking and fundraising calls humming. This week alone I made about 2,000 calls to supporters of this campaign and met many more.
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Justin Raffa is well known in the Tri Cities. He is a champion of the people and an important pillar of the arts community. He and Molly opened their home for my campaign and, as expected, there was a stellar group of well informed and politically dedicated people on hand.
---
| Justin Raffa es bien conocido en Tri Cities. Es un campeón de la gente y un pilar importante de la comunidad artística. Él y Molly dieron la bienvenida a mi campaña a su casa, y había presente un grupo estelar de personas bien informadas y políticamente dedicadas.
---
| |
---
| | El miércoles comenzó muy temprano en la oscuridad de la mañana. Estuve fuera por dos días en Okanogan. Primero en Tonasket donde nos hospedamos como invitados de Chris en el Red Apple Inn. Chris conoce a todos y todo acerca de Tonasket, pasa y quédate o simplemente saluda cuando estés allí. El primer día fue tocar puertas. Las calles de Tonasket no son muchas, pero están llenas de gente cálida y generosa. Luego conocimos a más personas en el Centro Cultural Comunitario, una tienda de llantas viejas hermosamente renovada que sirve como el centro de la comunidad. Allí comimos pizza y hablamos sobre los problemas, preocupaciones e hicimos planes sobre cómo trabajaremos juntos para asegurarnos de que durante los próximos años podamos lograr mejoras sustanciales en la vida de las personas de Okanogan. Wednesday started very early in the dark of the morning. I was off for two days in Okanogan. First stop was Tonasket where we stayed as guests of Chris at the Red Apple Inn. Chris knows everyone and everything about Tonasket, stop by and stay or just say hello when you are there. The first day was door knocking. The streets of Tonasket are not many, but they are filled with warm and generous people. We then met more people at the Community Cultural Center, a beautifully renovated old tire store that serves as the hub of the community. There we ate pizza and talked about the issues, concerns and made plans for how we will work together to insure that over the next few years we can make substantial improvements to the lives of the people in Okanogan.
---
| |
---
| | El jueves fue otro gran día en Winthrop y Twisp. Me reuní con personas de la comunidad sobre cómo mejorar nuestro alcance al encontrar formas de organizar sesiones de escucha. Quiero entender completamente las necesidades de los residentes. Recibimos la visita de un miembro del DNC y tuvimos la primera de muchas buenas conversaciones sobre cómo refinar nuestros mensajes. Mi plataforma es sólida, pero siempre debemos ser conscientes de que debe ser clara y, a veces, es difícil encontrar las mejores palabras. El Twisp Grange se despertó esa noche cuando se llenó de personas para asistir a nuestro primer Ayuntamiento en persona. También transmitimos en vivo por Zoom y Facebook Live y fue nuestro evento con mayor asistencia hasta la fecha. Hubo muchas buenas preguntas, pero lo que es más importante, las personas compartieron sus pensamientos y consejos sobre lo que querían de un Representante y sus prioridades. Siempre aprendo mucho escuchando a los demás. Muchas gracias a Katie Haven por organizar el evento para nosotros. Thursday was another big day in Winthrop/Twisp. I met with people in the community on how to improve our outreach by finding ways to arrange listening sessions so I could fully understand the needs of the residents. We had a visit from a member of the DNC and had a good, first of many, conversation on how to refine our messaging. My platform is strong, but we must always be aware that it must be clearly said and finding the best words is sometimes hard to do. The Twisp Grange came to life that evening as it filled up with people to attend our first in-person Town Hall. We also live streamed on Zoom and Facebook Live and it was our largest attended event to date. There were many good questions, but more importantly, people shared their thoughts and advice on what they wanted from a Representative and their priorities. I always learn so much by listening to others. A big thank you to Katie Haven for organizing the event for us.
---
| |
---
| | We are looking forward to an April full of work with our community. April 6th we’ll be in White Swan to get to know the community better, with a Town Hall at Columbia High school at 6:30. It will be broadcast on Zoom and Facebook live. All are welcome to join us! Just RSVP on the Events Page of the website. Our community can also join us through virtual phone banks, on Tuesdays at 6:30pm and Fridays at 4:00pm. We’ll have door-to-door outreach in Yakima: April 2nd and April 30th; and door-to-door outreach in Tri-Cities: April 9th and 24th. Link to RSVP to all volunteer and community opportunities: [https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/event](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/03N-cDsMP/c?w=-0PXbR_7V1Q2buCEKhnP6xJZCRMERTfDBb4anLoBoyk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL2V2ZW50IiwiciI6ImU0OGYyZWZjLWU0NzItNDkzZC05MTQwLTM5NzlmOGI1NjhjZSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9) Esperamos un abril lleno de trabajo con nuestra comunidad. El 6 de abril estaremos en White Swan para conocer mejor a la comunidad, con un Ayuntamiento en Columbia High School a las 6:30. Será retransmitido por Zoom y Facebook live. ¡Todos son bienvenidos a unirse a nosotros! Solo confirme su asistencia en la página de eventos del sitio web. Nuestra comunidad también puede unirse a nosotros a través de bancos telefónicos virtuales, los martes a las 6:30 p. m. y los viernes a las 4:00 p. m. Tendremos alcance puerta a puerta en Yakima: 2 y 30 de abril; y alcance puerta a puerta en Tri-Cities: 9 y 24 de abril. Haga clic aquí para confirmar su asistencia a cualquier oportunidad de voluntariado y comunidad: [https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/event](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/03N-cDsMP/c?w=-0PXbR_7V1Q2buCEKhnP6xJZCRMERTfDBb4anLoBoyk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL2V2ZW50IiwiciI6ImU0OGYyZWZjLWU0NzItNDkzZC05MTQwLTM5NzlmOGI1NjhjZSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9)

name: Team Tom
subject: Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, April 1st for Peter:
body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
#

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, April 1st, 2022**
Peter,
[**#TeamPerezSneed**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43685705/338242372/-937941632?q=%23TeamPerezSneed&src=typeahead_click&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjg1YzAxMC0wN2IyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lhevg3MKcrBmlmfSXRHz0ypdfgOtSafZPIoIGbvAatQ=&emci=cc132f40-b8b1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=2685c010-07b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837) continues to grow stronger by the day, and this week we were thrilled to announce the support of two progressive champions in the Maryland General Assembly.
Delegate Vaughn Stewart and Delegate Julie Palakovich Carr are thought leaders dedicated to bringing progressive change to our state, and Tom could not be more honored to have their support. From combating climate change, to defending reproductive rights, supporting educators, and beyond, they've both done so much to lift up working families.
As our momentum continues to build, we could not be more grateful for your support.
Many thanks,
Team Tom
* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**

clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, April 1st, 2022 Peter, continues to grow stronger by the day, and this week we were thrilled to announce the support of two progressive champions in the Maryland General Assembly. Delegate Vaughn Stewart and Delegate Julie Palakovich Carr are thought leaders dedicated to bringing progressive change to our state, and Tom could not be more honored to have their support. From combating climate change, to defending reproductive rights, supporting educators, and beyond, they've both done so much to lift up working families. As our momentum continues to build, we could not be more grateful for your support. Many thanks, Team Tom On the Campaign Trail Shannon kicked off last weekend with a small business tour of different Black-owned businesses in Baltimore City. The tour included a stop at Nubian Hueman, a store that features various fashion collections made exclusively by minority artists. Tom joined Carter Memorial Church of Baltimore for their Sunday service last week. Thanks to Bishop Carl A. Pierce and the enitre church family for their inspiring service. Later that afternoon, Tom joined Baltimore City community leader and civil rights activist Doc Cheatham for a tour around the Easterwood Sandtown Park and Playground. We appreciate Doc's decades of advocacy and all he's done for the community. Shannon worshiped alongside her family this weekend at Ebenezer A.M.E. Church in Fort Washington. Thanks to Reverend Dr Grainger Browning and Reverend Dr. Jo Ann Browning for the introduction as well as the warm hospitality from the church family. After church, Shannon joined some of our volunteers for a canvass launch in gorgeous Prince George’s County! On Monday, Shannon was honored to join friends and leaders from across the state to celebrate former Treasurer Nancy Kopp in her retirement. Nancy Kopp is a transformational leader who served the state of Maryland tirelessly for over 47 years. Tom proudly joined leaders from the LGBTQ+ community Wednesday evening for a virtual meet and greet. Thank you to Representative Sharice Davids, Montgomery County Council Vice President Evan Glass, and countless others who continue to work everyday to ensure equal opportunities for all throughout Maryland and the United States. Shannon headed back down to Southern Maryland on Thursday evening for Charles County Commissioner President Reuben Collins’ campaign kickoff. Reuben is a tireless and effective voice for the people of Charles County, and we are so grateful to have his support as we create a Maryland that works for everyone. Endorsements In the News # “Democratic candidate Tom Perez on Wednesday announced a major ad buy, saying his first campaign commercial will start airing Thursday -- and it's narrated by a famous voice.” Schedule of Events****** Tuesday, April 5 | 7:00 PM Virtual Hosted by Denise Jones-Dorsey Thursday, April 7 | 6:00 PM La Palapa Too Mexican Grill & Cantina Hosted by the Hispanic Chamber of Commerce of Montgomery County Saturday, April 9 | 7:00 PM The Rockville Hotel Hosted by Kabirul Islam, Hashan Chowdhury, Mohammed Kazal, Kazi Sakhawat, Hossain Azam, Eng. body:

Hey friend, I just wanted to take a moment to thank you for all your generous support over the past few weeks. Because of your contributions, we were able to end our fundraising deadline in a solid place. I'm so grateful to have a group of grassroots supporters behind me as I take on David Schweikert.
Even though we still have our work cut out for us, I know that with your continued support, we can build a coalition of Arizonans who want our great state to move in a positive direction, whether that's fighting for women's reproductive rights or tackling climate change.
In the meantime, we greatly appreciate your constant support here at Team DiSanto.
Thank you for your support,
– Delina DiSanto

subject: Join Team Soldano at President Trump's Rally!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Look out for the Garrettmobile, Peter. | | | Good afternoon Patriots!

As you probably know, President Trump will be returning to Michigan tomorrow for a rally in Macomb County.

While Garrett has [a family commitment](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=6782023bd0&e=fe4b890356) and unfortunately will not able to personally attend, we know that America First conservatives in our movement will be giving President Trump a warm Michigan welcome!

Team Soldano will be there - if you are attending President Trump's rally, keep an eye out for the Garrett-mobile and visit us in General Admission parking!
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=0d0c341a01&e=fe4b890356)
---
| | **Wear your Garrett Soldano merchandise and receive a free bumper magnet!**

Our crew will also have some campaign swag available - **including some limited edition signed merchandise.** (First come, first serve!)

We are excited to show President Trump that Michigan is still with him. Make sure to come see us before entering the rally! Our team will be stationed in the General Admission Parking outside the Michigan Stars Sports Center (6566 Powell Rd, Washington Twp).

Respectfully,

Jon George
Campaign Manager
Garrett Soldano for Michigan
* * *

---
| | | PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
1151 WEST MILHAM AVENUE, UNIT 2546, PORTAGE, MI 49081
---

name: Deb and Jerry Finkenauer
subject: Iowa's next change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
It's time to elect a new leader who will help create more good-paying jobs, move Iowa forward and make this a state that young people are flocking to, not leaving in droves.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686063/338243929/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk759-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjA0MjljMi0wN2IyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AloapLprxX7HxI_70NUkz8v4KlgkFxqAOntkWz-D_uA=)
Hi there, Peter, it's Deb and Jerry writing to you. Our daughter, Abby, is running to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) in Iowa and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

We've lived in Sherrill, a town just north of Dubuque that’s home to about 200 people, since before Abby was born. We love Sherrill: the rolling farmlands, the country roads that seem to stretch forever and a community that sticks together through both the thick and the thin.
While we've lived here, though, we've watched Iowa change – and not always for the better. Our state has lost 30,000 family farms since Chuck Grassley has been in office, and good-paying union jobs – like the one that supported our family – have slowly disappeared. Far too many of our young people are being forced to leave home for states with more opportunities and better jobs.
**While Iowa has changed, our leadership hasn't. Sen. Grassley was first sent to Washington nearly half a century ago and, in that time, he's turned his back on working families like ours. **It's time to elect a new leader who will help create more good-paying jobs, move Iowa forward and make this a state that young people are flocking to, not leaving in droves.
Abby understands Iowa: where it has been, where it is and where it will be. That's why she chose to _stay_ and build her life here. **Abby believes in our state and our future. Trust us, there's no better leader for Iowa right now than our daughter.**
People here know it's time for change: only 27% of likely voters want to send Sen. Grassley back to Washington for an eighth term. Iowa is ready for Abby, and Abby is ready to win. **However, the GOP has already raised more than $100 million to defeat challengers like her and is even actively trying to kick her off the ballot! Abby needs you to stand with her:** **[please, can you make your first donation right now to help Abby defeat Sen. Grassley, expand our Senate majority and move Iowa forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686064/338243930/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk759-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjA0MjljMi0wN2IyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AloapLprxX7HxI_70NUkz8v4KlgkFxqAOntkWz-D_uA=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686065/338243931/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk759-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjA0MjljMi0wN2IyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AloapLprxX7HxI_70NUkz8v4KlgkFxqAOntkWz-D_uA=)
---
Abby is counting on people like you, so thank you for standing with her.

– Deb and Jerry (Abby's parents)

To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686066/338243932/496662621?refcode=jtk759-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjA0MjljMi0wN2IyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AloapLprxX7HxI_70NUkz8v4KlgkFxqAOntkWz-D_uA=&emci=ae0ec24b-16ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=320429c2-07b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=13784334#!).

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Deroy Murdock: Transgenderism-- Why Stop There?
body:

name: Karen Bass
subject: I have some good news to share:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
I am so grateful to everyone who was able to contribute.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686238/338244639/-1030761386?ms=em22_220401_eomty_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220401_eomty_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&source=em22_220401_eomty_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220401_eomty_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=JDRqLgVCQ%2Fxks0cIQTjWJWOifXVhe1w4tvIcK7OtpokOqycp03DpRxVxwPak4zkQRmmQnTWEUmLxXeV1cyOwsIueACX8xplNz8COM7aDIVqwioXRfSsYUyZ1HitMKaKgJwEdyryh1YddTV6%2FRssysA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQ3MWI3My0wOWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5yLByYeg_FFkkSVolmu5IDgbsniwaXU5NdBddK1qmzI=&emci=27250135-dab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=c5471b73-09b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)
Good news —

Over the past few days, you've heard a lot from me and my team. We had an important end-of-month deadline last night, and I have some good news. Thanks to the dedication of this grassroots campaign, we surpassed our goal!

Hitting our goal didn't happen overnight. We made it happen because hundreds of people chipped in to my campaign for Los Angeles mayor. I am so grateful to everyone who was able to contribute. It's important I see donations from every single zip code in L.A., because this campaign is powered by and for the people of our city.

Now, it's onto the next stage. We are hitting the ground running this month, and our voter engagement campaign is in full swing.

I plan to reach out to as many Angelenos as possible to share our vision for L.A. before the primary. It's going to take a lot of hard work. But I know having you in this fight with me means we can and will make history this year. Thank you again for all you do.

In solidarity,

Karen

_All solicitations are by Karen Bass and Karen Bass for Mayor 2022, and not by any other federal officeholder referenced in this e-mail._

subject: So grateful for you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
| | |
---
My Sisters and Brothers, From the bottom of my heart, I am so grateful for your continued support. Because so many supporters like you chipped in, we finished the first fundraising quarter on solid ground. Your support helps me hold Trump’s GOP and Senator Ron Johnson accountable. It is an honor to serve you in Congress, and we must make sure to keep our Democratic majority this fall. Let’s keep the momentum going, chip in to help us start April off strong!

subject: Americans deserve marijuana decriminalization.
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Troy Carter for Congress
body:
I just voted YES on the MORE Act. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/troycarter4congress/i-need-your-help-4746947?e=dd5c2df611)
---
| | [ ](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=1993fe7011&e=dd5c2df611)
---
| |
# I just voted to decriminalize marijuana at the federal level.
---
| But I need [your help](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=b11a6bc104&e=dd5c2df611) to keep fighting to make social justice and criminal justice reform a reality.

The COVID-19 pandemic has produced a rise in drug abuse, violent crime, and other indicators of collective trauma. These are pressing issues that urgently need resources devoted to them.

[**We must stop wasting precious resources on marijuana offenses. Will you chip in $5, $10, or $25 to help our progress continue?**](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=f75200b4ce&e=dd5c2df611)

Law enforcement simply cannot afford to chase small time pot dealers while violent and random crime are on the rise nationwide. The ACLU reports states waste billions annually enforcing cannabis laws. **This is money, time, and effort better spent investing in true community safety.**

Further, Americans overwhelmingly want marijuana reform. 91% report they believe it should be legalized. **Congress is long overdue in marijuana reform and decriminalizing this substance, but we have a long journey ahead to achieve social justice and criminal justice reform.**

The war on marijuana is a costly relic of the past. But today, we are taking a step towards making things right. [Donate today](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=45e9861381&e=dd5c2df611) to help me keep fighting for the change the people of Louisiana want.

**The fight is far from over.** This bill still needs to pass the senate, and there are so many more changes we need to truly achieve justice. **[By giving $5, $10, or $25, you can play a part in bringing about change.](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=6fa7628f28&e=dd5c2df611)**

name: Val Demings (iphone)
subject: from me to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
My spare minutes are almost up, friend – so here's what I want to leave you with.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686758/338245801/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2788-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTA0NDZjOC0wYmIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B_ZWAHkuYffYe26-PFeGZJELGi00wSh6lEQNCzZ_xOo=)I have a rare 15 minutes, friend. Between serving in Congress and running a battleground race for Senate, an empty block of time in my calendar doesn't come around so often. Sometimes, it means a few minutes in silence to clear my mind and have a decent cup of coffee. Other times it means checking in with my husband, Jerry, or our children and grandchildren. But right now, it means time to reflect on what this race means to me. Growing up, people like me didn't exactly anticipate serving in Congress. My family and I – we were always just trying to get by. I can close my eyes even now and still picture it: that two-room house in Jacksonville, seven children running around (me, the youngest), and my mom and dad working hard just to put food on the table. Of course life was tough, but we had each other. We had love. We persevered. I did my part to pull my weight. I worked as a dishwasher in a retirement home when I was 14. At 16, I worked at both Dairy Queen and McDonald's. It was Mom who always said she saw something special in me. She brought out my drive. She told me I was _destined_ for something. How can you ignore a mother's words like that? I sure didn't. Her belief in me has powered my entire life. My mom, Elouise, is on my mind a lot these days. I think about what she saw in me, what she believed in, when I was just a young girl. I think about the ancestors I never knew who were enslaved people, who _knew_ that they wouldn't make it but dreamed and prayed their descendants would. That I would. My spare minutes are almost up, friend – so here's what I want to leave you with. Our present is nothing without our past, and that goes double for the future. I know this is a tough race, but I've seen tough up close and personal too many times to count: as a young Black girl who grew up poor in the South, as a law enforcement officer of 27 years and as a member of Congress. **Success all comes down to leveraging our very best and fighting our hearts out until the very end – and I want you to know I'm humbled by the support from each and every one of you. Only in America could a poor, Black girl from the South have a story of opportunity like mine – and I want every Floridian to have that opportunity, which is why I'm running to be their next senator. **
Thanks for this little bit of time. But because this is the toughest political race of my life, and the future of our Senate majority is on the line, you know I can't sign off without asking just once. If you believe in this race, if you believe in me and have faith we can flip Florida blue and win a better future for our state and country, then chip in whatever you can using the following link. Any amount truly helps: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686759/338245802/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2788-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTA0NDZjOC0wYmIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B_ZWAHkuYffYe26-PFeGZJELGi00wSh6lEQNCzZ_xOo=)**
Warmly,

Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. clean_body: My spare minutes are almost up, friend – so here's what I want to leave you with. | | | have a rare 15 minutes, friend. Between serving in Congress and running a battleground race for Senate, an empty block of time in my calendar doesn't come around so often. Sometimes, it means a few minutes in silence to clear my mind and have a decent cup of coffee. Other times it means checking in with my husband, Jerry, or our children and grandchildren. But right now, it means time to reflect on what this race means to me. Growing up, people like me didn't exactly anticipate serving in Congress. My family and I – we were always just trying to get by. I can close my eyes even now and still picture it: that two-room house in Jacksonville, seven children running around (me, the youngest), and my mom and dad working hard just to put food on the table. Of course life was tough, but we had each other. We had love. We persevered. I did my part to pull my weight. I worked as a dishwasher in a retirement home when I was 14. At 16, I worked at both Dairy Queen and McDonald's. It was Mom who always said she saw something special in me. She brought out my drive. She told me I was destined for something. How can you ignore a mother's words like that? I sure didn't. Her belief in me has powered my entire life. My mom, Elouise, is on my mind a lot these days. I think about what she saw in me, what she believed in, when I was just a young girl. I think about the ancestors I never knew who were enslaved people, who knew that they wouldn't make it but dreamed and prayed their descendants would. That I would. My spare minutes are almost up, friend – so here's what I want to leave you with. Our present is nothing without our past, and that goes double for the future. I know this is a tough race, but I've seen tough up close and personal too many times to count: as a young Black girl who grew up poor in the South, as a law enforcement officer of 27 years and as a member of Congress. Success all comes down to leveraging our very best and fighting our hearts out until the very end – and I want you to know I'm humbled by the support from each and every one of you. Only in America could a poor, Black girl from the South have a story of opportunity like mine – and I want every Floridian to have that opportunity, which is why I'm running to be their next senator. Thanks for this little bit of time. But because this is the toughest political race of my life, and the future of our Senate majority is on the line, you know I can't sign off without asking just once. If you believe in this race, if you believe in me and have faith we can flip Florida blue and win a better future for our state and country, then chip in whatever you can using the following link. Any amount truly helps: = Warmly, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. In case you missed it, here’s a recap: Derek is taking Biden to court to challenge the administration's airplane mask mandate that forces everyone - even two year old children - to wear masks in order to travel on an airplane. Derek has already won the fight against several of Biden’s unconstitutional mandates. We need to stand with him in this fight. I am honored by the support you have given me in this campaign. When it is so clear that our democracy is endangered, that so many people’s rights and freedoms are threatened, and there is so much hanging in the balance, your support for me is more important than ever. subject: ICYMI: Bill McSwain Media Roundup
body:
York GOP Chair Endorsement, Bill on PCN, Fact Checker Scores Bill 100% | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us5.campaign-archive.com/?e=b1ec95759b&u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=c76856abe3)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**April 1, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# ICYMI: Bill McSwain in the news
_This week: York GOP Chair Endorsement, Bill on PCN, Fact Checker Scores Bill 100% _ **West Chester, Pa.** **\-- ** The primary election is only 46 days away, and McSwain for Governor continues to build momentum! Across all 67 counties, hard-working Pennsylvanians are excited to elect a conservative outsider who will undo the damaging policies of the Wolf administration.

Here are some media highlights from Bill's recent travels on the campaign trail:

On Wednesday, Bill joined PCN host Corey Clarke to share his vision for Pennsylvania, discuss his plan to permanently cut the gas tax, and answer questions from citizen callers:
---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=72e30df58c&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
| Also featured on Wednesday was [the endorsement](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=4c1679e7d7&e=b1ec95759b) of Bill by York County GOP Chair Jeff Piccola. In addition to Piccola's personal endorsement, McSwain also received the formal recommendation and support of the York County Republican Committee:
---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=fad8a49950&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
| On Tuesday, WGAL News 8 released the results of a fact checking investigation into Bill's latest [television ad](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=e6277b4734&e=b1ec95759b). They found that every claim made by McSwain is 100% true, despite efforts by _The_ _Philadelphia Inquirer_ to imply otherwise. See WGAL's findings here:
---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=3317c72425&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
|
---
| Want to learn more or volunteer? [Join the team here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=85188a6db4&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **

Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=690212142a&e=b1ec95759b)
###

clean_body: York GOP Chair Endorsement, Bill on PCN, Fact Checker Scores Bill 100% | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE April 1, 2022 CONTACT: Rachel Tripp 202.738.9089 | | ICYMI: Bill McSwain in the news This week: York GOP Chair Endorsement, Bill on PCN, Fact Checker Scores Bill 100% West Chester, Pa. \-- The primary election is only 46 days away, and McSwain for Governor continues to build momentum! Across all 67 counties, hard-working Pennsylvanians are excited to elect a conservative outsider who will undo the damaging policies of the Wolf administration. Here are some media highlights from Bill's recent travels on the campaign trail: On Wednesday, Bill joined PCN host Corey Clarke to share his vision for Pennsylvania, discuss his plan to permanently cut the gas tax, and answer questions from citizen callers: | | | Also featured on Wednesday was of Bill by York County GOP Chair Jeff Piccola. In addition to Piccola's personal endorsement, McSwain also received the formal recommendation and support of the York County Republican Committee: | | | On Tuesday, WGAL News 8 released the results of a fact checking investigation into Bill's latest . They found that every claim made by McSwain is 100% true, despite efforts by The Philadelphia Inquirer to imply otherwise. See WGAL's findings here: | | | | Want to learn more or volunteer? | | BACKGROUND: Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available | | | | | | | | | | billmcswain.com | | Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

Welcome to April, !
We're just 46 days away from Election Day in the Commonwealth, have you checked your voter registration status [https://vote.pa/?org=npp] lately? It only takes a few minutes! Remember, May 2nd is the last day to register to vote in the May 17th primary election.
Here are the important dates to mark on your calendar:

NPP IN THE SPOTLIGHT
Hundreds gather at City & State’s inaugural Above & Beyond Awards
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4E7678424E4E706E323649374A6A6E4356582B524B4B2B6F5078796131584D514A7132326B6A5874696C6941725768744B584C4D5A69334157666439634A7354/editor_images/Image%20%282%29.jpeg] [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4E7678424E4E706E323649374A6A6E4356582B524B4B2B6F5078796131584D514A7132326B6A5874696C6941725768744B584C4D5A69334157666439634A7354/editor_images/Image%20%281%29.jpeg]
Congratulations to our own Kadida Natasha Kenner, House Democratic Leader and NPP board member Rep. Joanna McClinton, and all the incredible honorees who made City and State PA [https://www.facebook.com/cityandstatepa/?__cft__[0]=AZUb0DqhPFfjVwVRjq7Jkt7_GSx3IOL3Pbczx7Rc2qBCxBpfGPmCM3qh1NqIhsJ4RivkKrP1DyYXwBr8-2Y6HW8CeN8aJu0OBFvM7ebjmE1Ra7V7np5LLYxjpdLtmKZcKxStJCBiZUgWxvsOvwlDRZD3ClupAfL3jSaGsnweJb3KMQ&__tn__=kK-R] 's Above and Beyond. See all 40 PA women honorees [https://www.cityandstatepa.com/content/2022-above-beyond] .
Your Voice. Your Power. Your Vote: Resistance—How Women Saved Democracy
NPP executive director Kadida Kenner joined the Philadelphia Commission for Women alongside Black Voters Matter co-founder LaTosha Brown and Washington Post columnist Jennifer Rubin for a conversation about the role of women in achieving voting rights.
This series is also part of a citywide commemoration of the 200th birthday of Harriet Tubman--legendary abolitionist, underground railroad conductor and lifelong advocate for voting rights.
Catch the full recap here [https://www.facebook.com/CommissionforWomenPHL/videos/492767652337556] .
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r-mDVrerpoY [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r-mDVrerpoY]
Reminder: It's time to request your mail ballot
You can vote by mail for this upcoming primary election on May 17th. Vote by mail works for Pennsylvania. 2,616,012 Pennsylvanians were able to vote safely and securely in 2020 thanks to Pennsylvania’s landmark vote-by-mail law, Act 77.
Learn more about voting by mail [https://vote.pa/info/mail/?org=npp] .
Vote By Mail [https://vote.pa/mail/?org=npp]
Voter Registration Lookup [https://vote.pa/check/?org=npp]
Register to Vote [https://vote.pa/?org=npp]

When we say representation matters, this is what we’re talking about!
