STATE AND LOCAL NEWS
Spotlight PA leads historic coalition to host debates for Pennsylvania U.S. Senate primary races
Spotlight PA announces dates for two “Pennsylvania in the Spotlight” U.S. Senate debates leading up to the spring primary.
Read more in Spotlight PA [https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2022/03/pa-primary-2022-senate-race-republicans-democrats-debates/]
Pa. redistricting maps: Search now to see your old and new political districts
The Pennsylvania Supreme Court in February selected a new congressional map that closely resembles the current one, with the partisan makeup of the state’s delegation unlikely to change dramatically. The U.S. Supreme Court in March declined a request to block the map’s usage for this year’s primary election.
Read more in Spotlight PA [https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2021/12/pennsylvania-redistricting-house-senate-districts-lookup-tool/]
Outside groups flood Pa.’s U.S. Senate race with cash
A new analysis by the political prognosticators at Decision Desk HQ sheds more light on the former, revealing that outside groups have pumped an eye-watering $68 million into this season’s U.S. Senate primaries, far outpacing the $48 million spent on Senate primaries at the same point in the 2020.
Read more in Penn Capital Star [https://www.penncapital-star.com/commentary/outside-group-flood-pas-u-s-senate-race-with-cash-tuesday-morning-coffee/]
Cities and towns across the state are electing female mayors at record rates.
From Scranton to Harrisburg, Upper Darby to Gettysburg, and in burgs across Pennsylvania, women aren’t just getting a seat at the table – more often, they can now be found at its head.
Read more in City & State PA [https://www.cityandstatepa.com/content/cities-and-towns-across-state-are-electing-female-mayors-record-rates]
Upcoming Events
Threats to the Pennsylvania Constitution Symposium
April 12, 2022 06:30 PM
The Constitution of Pennsylvania, like that of the United States, was designed to ensure our future as a republic, or in Madison’s words, a government in which all power comes directly or indirectly from the people. The separation of powers and checks and balances were designed to block an accumulation of power in the hands of any one body and the use of that power to undermine the rule of law and our representative democracy.
Members of the General Assembly have been putting forward a series of constitutional amendments that in dramatic ways would change how we choose legislators and Justice and judges as well as change the balance of power between the different branches of government.
This symposium will consider these proposed constitutional amendments and ask whether they enhance or threaten the Republican character of the government of Pennsylvania.
Register here via Zoom. [https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_ltlzjY5QSUapkGkOsglkrA]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/386678584A4D5155396B594F3176557334326F2F6F763863424F756A3475564D584A694243507159637234397869752F777A425137482F59326F30734F4B7278/editor_images/image_6487327.JPG]
April Volunteer Opportunities
Check out our volunteer sign up for April 2022- there are the different volunteer opportunities that we have scheduled for the month ahead. Please mark those that you would like to be part of. You can sign up for more than one [https://bit.ly/AprilVolunteers2022] !
The Policy Corner: Fair Education Funding
student learning [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6C4179454E78622B2F52634D324A4265593862634C2B4A71554F655659534B702B793366574943594E34697753356D4A44504C5376306E4F4777582B6B517A6E/editor_images/pexels-rfstudio-3825569.jpg]
Photo credit: Pexels
Every child in Pennsylvania has a right to a quality education, yet too many children across the commonwealth suffer from inadequate and inequitable K-12 funding. We have some of the most unequally funded schools in the entire country. The state’s share of K-12 education funding is around 35%, far below the national average of 50%. Schools with a high proportion of households below the poverty line have a funding gap of over $3,000 per student, meaning schools need an additional $3,000 per student to provide an adequate education. When we look at the funding gap by race and Latinx ethnicity, we see a funding gap of more than $2,500 in school districts with the highest share of Black students and more than $3,000 in school districts with the highest share of Latinx students.
Pennsylvania also spends less than the national average on higher education ranking 47th out of 50 states for higher education spending per capita. This results in high tuition which makes college unaffordable for many working families and years of crippling debt for many students. The future of Pennsylvania’s kids and economy are threatened by cuts to funding in higher education. Pennsylvania has cut funding for higher education per student by 33.4% since 2008, the 6th greatest cut of any state in the country. Pennsylvania has the worst college expense burden, relative to income, in the country for white, Black and Latinx students costing 34% of the median income of all families in the state. College costs are even worse for Black students at 56% of the median income and Latinx students at 48%.
When we talk about voting your values, we want you to think about the issues that matter to you and your family. Every child in Pennsylvania deserves an adequate and equitable education and should be able to look forward to college as an option to continue their education without extreme expense burdens and crippling debt. Our state legislators have the power to determine how our state budget gets spent, including how much funding we are allocating towards K-12 and higher education.
Related Article: Read the Washington Post's higher education piece Colleges scramble to recruit students as nationwide enrollment plunges. [https://www.washingtonpost.com/education/2022/03/31/college-enrollment-down-recruitment-freshmen/?fbclid=IwAR2Kn3gozWKkXfiM48dAxQzu5j4aQuT2T4XlvY9eiPu_EBlS6LQSbIIGMnE]
Help us reach our goal to register 50,000 voters in the Commonwealth
We can't do this important year-round work without you.
Will you help us defend democracy by expanding the electorate in Pennsylvania?
Invest in our democracy [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?emci=94765bbc-8d5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=1068162]

name: #teamMia Volunteers
subject: Spring Greetings, brings great news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2021, FPPC# 1437973
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/MBforAssembly_noPhoto_whiteBackground.png]
Dear Peter,
Happy Spring! Since announcing my re-election campaign, it has been great hearing from all of you of how we can continue to work together to improve AD-18 and California for all children and families. As our campaign continues to gain great momentum, I wanted to provide some updates about our successful work in the CA Legislature, endorsements in our community, and opportunities to get involved.
CA Legislative Update: As we approach Legislative spring recess, I am proud that my office has participated in the introduction of numerous bills in the CA Legislature in important policy areas of gun violence, health care, education, and gender, reproductive rights. To find out more, please subscribe [https://a18.asmdc.org/newsletter] to my Assembly District office newsletter or visit my website [https://a18.asmdc.org/] .
I am also proud to have celebrated Women’s History Month and I’m so delighted to have had the opportunity to celebrate a few local leaders right here in Assembly District 18. My selection for Women of the Year is LaNiece Jones, Oakland’s very own. LaNiece has successfully designed programs, events, and initiatives to increase the efficacy and productivity of social businesses, social enterprises and community organizations. She has worked to support Black women to be authentic leaders and has built coalitions to empower our community for economic success. LaNiece is an inspiration for all of us desiring to step into leadership roles.
Recent Endorsements: I am proud to share some of my recent endorsements for our 2022 re-election campaign. I look forward to working with these organizations to ensure our shared values are heard in Sacramento. More to come! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/women2.png]

name: Jordan Franken
subject: my hubby Michael
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43687485/338248674/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmQ2M2I1Yy0xMmIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PTj8RqcwsJD5ChvimS-cGNhf2CbKUKHhM5haiSKkbk=&emci=b243d30d-12b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4bd63b5c-12b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)

Hello everyone,
My husband Michael and I had the privilege of serving our nation together for almost three decades.
Different schools, new doctors, different commute, pack up and unpack, good-byes to old friends and hellos to new neighbors — we moved from state-to-state and overseas. I didn’t know married life to a naval officer would be so busy or so enriching when we married in 1989. (Yes, I would do it over again!)
As a family, we were better for it. Our children saw many new schools, sometimes as many as three in a single year, and they were accepting of those disruptions to their lives. Deployments were made more tolerable when email came along, but Michael’s absence was always felt around the dinner table, on holidays, and during family events.
**No challenge we faced these last three decades, though, compares to the demands of running for the U.S. Senate.** Yet this is exactly why my husband is undertaking this next level of service — because he has consistently made the impossible look doable and the difficult look commonplace. If anyone can beat Chuck Grassley, he can do it. My sense is that the nation needs people like him.
Admiral Michael Franken, my hubby, is the right person to be Iowa’s next Senator. I believe in him, and I know he will wow you, as well. His soul is Iowa’s. **But if Mike is going to win, turn Iowa blue, and fix the many challenges Iowa, its citizens, and this nation face, he needs your help today.**
**Getting his message before every Iowa voter will take significant funding, especially against a 46-year incumbent like Chuck Grassley who has the backing of corporate PACs and special interests.** [**Please, can Mike count on you to make a donation right now to his campaign and help him defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect the Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43687487/338248676/-42398318?refcode=em20220401pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmQ2M2I1Yy0xMmIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PTj8RqcwsJD5ChvimS-cGNhf2CbKUKHhM5haiSKkbk=)

Jordan Franken

clean_body: Hello everyone, My husband Michael and I had the privilege of serving our nation together for almost three decades. Different schools, new doctors, different commute, pack up and unpack, good-byes to old friends and hellos to new neighbors — we moved from state-to-state and overseas. I didn’t know married life to a naval officer would be so busy or so enriching when we married in 1989. (Yes, I would do it over again!) As a family, we were better for it. Our children saw many new schools, sometimes as many as three in a single year, and they were accepting of those disruptions to their lives. Deployments were made more tolerable when email came along, but Michael’s absence was always felt around the dinner table, on holidays, and during family events. No challenge we faced these last three decades, though, compares to the demands of running for the U.S. Senate. Yet this is exactly why my husband is undertaking this next level of service — because he has consistently made the impossible look doable and the difficult look commonplace. If anyone can beat Chuck Grassley, he can do it. My sense is that the nation needs people like him. Admiral Michael Franken, my hubby, is the right person to be Iowa’s next Senator. I believe in him, and I know he will wow you, as well. His soul is Iowa’s. But if Mike is going to win, turn Iowa blue, and fix the many challenges Iowa, its citizens, and this nation face, he needs your help today. Getting his message before every Iowa voter will take significant funding, especially against a 46-year incumbent like Chuck Grassley who has the backing of corporate PACs and special interests. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’ve seen Michael completely at ease when speaking with international leaders and just as easily as the farmers he worked for some 45 years ago. He is the most engaging, level-headed, smart, and practical person I’ve ever known. He is a remarkable man with an unbelievable ability to get things done. But at this stage of the campaign, Mike’s candidacy will be measured and scrutinized by how much campaign funds he can raise. Please help Iowa get a Senator the state needs. Thank you for everything you can do, Jordan Franken Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Marco Lopez
subject: re: up next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43687573/338249218/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk598-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTRkYzg1Ni0xNGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bq38-3_NQVE2LwPxm-UMOgTRCkwHRddVOps-Sxli29E=)
---
_I know this message is on the longer side, but it ends with some big news I'm excited to share – so please read all the way to the end! –Marco_
Friend, when I launched this campaign a year ago, I knew we were in for a tough fight. Arizona's governorship has been red for 13 years, and I'm running not just as a Democrat, but as someone who could be the only immigrant governor in the country.
Arizona families have been facing long odds and that's why I'm running: to restore the promise of our state for all people. I know I have the experience, the background and the commitment to be the governor who makes that happen.
As we’ve built this movement for change, we’ve turned the tides in our favor. First, Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight called this battleground race a toss-up. Then, POLITICO declared it the most competitive open-seat race in the nation.
**We've changed the odds. We're blazing our path. And now, I have some of the best news we've been able to share yet: Thanks to your support, I am officially on the ballot and officially here to make the change we need.**
And our movement has never been more urgent. GOP Gov. Doug Ducey just signed a slew of bills directly attacking our most fundamental freedoms – from voting rights to reproductive rights. That might be what extremist Republicans in our state are for – but that's definitely not what Arizona is for. That's why I'm reaching out today.
We've only gotten this far because of grassroots supporters like you – and the only way we can keep up our momentum is by raising the resources we need to win. **So with the GOP all in to defeat me, I have to ask:[Can you chip in $5 or more right now to defeat GOP extremism, flip Arizona blue and build a state that works for all people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43687584/338249226/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk598-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTRkYzg1Ni0xNGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bq38-3_NQVE2LwPxm-UMOgTRCkwHRddVOps-Sxli29E=)**
Thank you so much, from the bottom of my heart. Let's go win this.

–Marco Lopez (D)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43687594/338249237/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk598-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTRkYzg1Ni0xNGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bq38-3_NQVE2LwPxm-UMOgTRCkwHRddVOps-Sxli29E=)
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Charles Booker
subject: Thank you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

From the bottom of my heart: thank you,
Peter.

Last night, against the odds, we hit our FEC end-of-quarter fundraising
goal. This was no small feat and I am blown away by the power of this
movement.

Especially in these challenging times, we understand that not everyone is
in the position to give. We also know how easy it is to feel hopeless
about our future right now.

But then last night, this movement chose hope. A record number of
supporters chipped in to help push us over the edge and fund our fight to
create a new kind of politics that works for all of us. It was an
inspiring ending to the first quarter of 2022, and I feel more energized
than ever to fight for the change Kentuckians deserve.

Whether you chipped in $5, made a couple phone calls, or just signed up to
be on our email list — please know your support means the world to me.
Together, we’re showing the country that a new era of leadership is coming
to Kentucky and the political establishment how strong grassroots donors
can be.

It’s never been more clear that we are the people to beat Rand Paul.

This is our time to fight, to stand, to believe, to lock arms, and to say
that we matter. This is about our future. This is about US.

I can’t wait to see what we accomplish next.

Talk to you soon,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220401-1714-footer&t=1001&refcode2=1714_346206_pagDp5&akid=1714%2E346206%2EpagDp5

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1714%2E346206%2EpagDp5

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Greg Stanton
subject: The results of our fundraiser are in...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dIytoB1cPQBZfCwSoHS9wvvzqCojzwfkbHTOAg7f5XY=/igj4Mn3igDDArRYPWN-ghQkN83f22N_7TNnr-0EW12U=)
Hi there,
It's no exaggeration to say this was the most important fundraising deadline of my career. Thanks to your generosity, we _surpassed_ our fundraising goal for Q1.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dIytoB1cPQBZfCwSoHS9wvvzqCojzwfkbHTOAg7f5XY=/DDs5mmOoQSGm0zqRYdhF1-oBZUG9bR3ZpEhdLeT5iT8=?refcode=X_040122_ThankYou)
I'm so proud of everything we've accomplished for Arizona over the last four years that I've been in Congress. But there's still so much to do. I'm lucky to have you on my team while we fight to get it done.
Let's celebrate this quarter's accomplishments, and move forward - we have a lot of work ahead of us!
Thank you!
- _Greg_
[__](https://act.myngp.com/el/dIytoB1cPQBZfCwSoHS9wvvzqCojzwfkbHTOAg7f5XY=/5IkqLKBhB7PSGKqGQgecq3-UK6esRGlRWDBx0xJinkE=?refcode=X_040122_ThankYou)

Paid for by Stanton for Congress

body:
We need to hear from you today!
| | |

Team, we recently launched an Official Tracking Poll to confirm President Biden's _skyrocketing_ approval numbers!

But our data team just checked the results and we’re still 11 responses short in Pennsylvania. **We extended the deadline to 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT, so please, answer now before the poll closes:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6805?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220401-ResponseNeeded-BidenApprovalShort-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220401-ResponseNeeded-BidenApprovalShort-Pros-sl1&akid=3586%2E9716520%2ENmlttt)

| Team, I’d like to take this moment to make sure you know how grateful we are for your support.

Between all the urgent deadlines and daily craziness of the AZ GOP, it’s easy to get swept up in the heat of it all. But know that we never forget our supporters.

You’re why, **for the first time in decades, we have a solid chance to flip AZ totally blue!** That would mean keeping the far-right, insurrectionist-led AZ GOP from razing our democracy to the ground for Trump. And it would give us the chance to finally reverse the irresponsible policies they’ve passed over the years. **_

So thank you so much, team._**

Sincerely,

Charlie Fisher
Executive Director
Arizona Democrats

| The Arizona Democratic Party is working around the clock to ensure Democratic candidates are elected up and down the ballot — candidates who will fight for what YOU value most, like affordable healthcare for every Arizonan, economic stability and job opportunities for working families, and representation for the most marginalized among us. **Help us continue to build a party that is fighting for all Arizonans. name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Thank You for Celebrating Women’s History Month with Team Pelosi!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,
Thank you for joining our celebration of Women’s History Month as we dedicated our @TeamPelosi [https://twitter.com/TeamPelosi] Twitter feed every day in March to paying tribute to the hard work and contributions of my outstanding House Democratic women colleagues.
March 2022 was an historic and special Women’s History Month in many respects, from being joined on the dais by Vice President Kamala Harris for President Biden’s first State of the Union Address to celebrate the progress that Democrats Delivered for America’s working families this past year and to echo the President’s vow to keep building a better America – with equity, justice, and opportunity for women; to celebrating the 50th Anniversary of Title IX with the legendary Billie Jean King; to relishing the 12th Anniversary of the Affordable Care Act that created more equity for women in health care; and, finally, to the historic hearings ahead of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s confirmation to the Supreme Court, to which she will rise as the first Black woman Associate Justice in our nation’s history.
Throughout our celebration of Women’s History Month, Team Pelosi and our Grassroots VIPs, our Volunteers in Politics, also engaged with several of the amazing women leaders of our House Democratic Caucus in our Weekly Volunteer Update discussions on topics including the power and necessity of Representation, Equal Pay, the voice of Women on Policy and World Affairs, and mentoring and creating space for more women to run for office and to serve in the public sphere.
Women’s History Month 2022 has taught us, that: women are making history; women are making progress; women are defending Democracy at home and around the globe; and American women leaders, in particular, are at the head of the tables for conversations of global consequence, including meeting with our partners and allies, bringing our NATO partners and European allies together to hold Putin responsible for his diabolical war on the Ukrainian people and securing life-saving military, humanitarian, and economic assistance for the people of Ukraine.
Women – Democratic women, in particular, are getting it done. The month of March may be over but we continue to celebrate women today and every day as we are building a better America with women and for women!
As we close, please enjoy this montage [https://twitter.com/TeamPelosi/status/1509741643867598870?s=20&t=TBfXGkrn2gFHGTo5Z3CozA] of our tributes to the House Democratic women, with music from San Francisco’s own, acclaimed American Jazz and Cabaret singer, Paula West. If you don’t already, do follow us on Twitter at @TeamPelosi [https://twitter.com/TeamPelosi] to join the conversation and to learn more about what our House Democrats are doing to Deliver for the American people and to keep and strengthen our majority in the coming election!
As you always hear me say, there is nothing more wholesome to our politics and to our future than the increased participation of women. I am honored to lead the most diverse Congress in history, with trailblazing Democratic women making progress For The People every day.
Thank you for joining me this past month in celebrating and supporting Democratic women!
Warmest regards,
NANCY
Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25] SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/4b561697-13b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/b956d1d8-18b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTU2ZDFkOC0xOGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GkVpEMKSzuuZJwzCbHAY4cM8jWgFfymjKbT_Yb6DVfI=&id=117907000 .
Nancy Pelosi for Congress
700 13TH STREET NW
Suite 800
Washington, DC 20005
United States
Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

clean_body: LAST CHANCE! | Friends, Nancy Pelosi’s PAC just announced their ad buys for the 2022 election, and she has millions earmarked for IOWA!I only won by six votes because of her dirty tricks in 2020, and I need your help to stand firm this cycle! That’s why we’re authorizing an immediate3x Match to fight back. | To make matters worse,I just missed my March fundraising goal , and it is going to hurt me in the long run if I can’t catch up! I know I have been asking a lot from you lately, but without your help, I won’t be able to stand up for Iowa’s families and American freedoms any longer. You, my friend, have been through it all with me; I was able to secure victory for conservatives in the CLOSEST RACE IN OVER 30 YEARS because of you. ... BUT WE ARE NOT DONE YET! Nancy Pelosi will do anything to defeat me. I need you on my team to stand up to her millionaire cronies. Chip in today to have your donation TRIPLED to Defeat Pelosi. The month of March was huge for Team Ronchetti and we have you to thank for it! Patriots like you donated to my campaign to help us create a big chang Peter, The month of March was huge for Team Ronchetti and we have you to thank for it! Patriots like you donated to my campaign to help us create a big change here in New Mexico. With your support, we will win this race and be able to tackle the most important issues facing New Mexico: reducing crime, securing our border, giving our children the education they deserve, creating jobs, ending reckless government spending to fight inflation, and protecting your freedoms. I am encouraged to have your support, and I look forward to working with you to take this fight all across our great state. This race won’t be easy. Under President Biden, wages are growing at a rate lower than inflation, which is crushing hardworking Alabamians and retirees. That needs to change. On my first day in office, I will take specific steps to not only secure our border, but also reform our immigration system to put American workers and Alabama families first. Katie Responds to Biden Admin Decision There's no excuse to use taxpayer dollars to demonize Israel. They’re our greatest ally, friend and partner. I'll be pushing for answers in the Senate. The Stars and Shields Coalition Sends More Endorsements Thank you to the co-chairs of the Stars and Shields for Katie Britt coalition for showing their tremendous support of our campaign. This law enforcement advisory committee is growing by the day. In the Senate, I’ll work with our brave men and women in blue to keep communities safe and strong in every corner of Alabama. League of Southeastern Credit Unions Endorses Katie LSCU CEO Patrick La Pine: “We are incredibly proud to support Katie Britt in her race for U.S. Senate. Britt has demonstrated an unwavering commitment to standing up for Alabama small businesses and financial institutions. “Britt has served as a champion for jobs and credit unions across the state, fighting unnecessary regulation, working to expedite the Paycheck Protection Program process, and creating an environment where all Alabamians could succeed and thrive.” Katie on Alabama Public Television I was happy to discuss my priorities and vision for our state's future on . You can watch the full 17-minute interview here: Katie Announces Her America First Platform As the next U.S. Senator for Alabama, I will fight tirelessly for America First policies that put American workers first and keep our families and communities safe and strong. Under President Biden, wages are growing at a rate lower than inflation, which is crushing hardworking Alabamians and retirees. That needs to change. On my first day in office, I will take specific steps to not only secure our border, but also reform our immigration system to put American workers and Alabama families first. Katie Responds to Pending Border Surge With border encounters already at historic highs, Biden is about to rescind the few COVID restrictions left for illegal immigrants, while keeping restrictions on Americans. body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hi,

Recently, my team sent out an “Ask me Anything” survey, and y’all had a
TON of great questions for me. 😄 It made me so happy to read through all
the thoughtful questions that were sent in and feel the passion behind our
movement for NC-01.

Please read through my answers to some of the top questions I was asked
and [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47733?t=1001&akid=1055%2E3698%2Epkf9cY ]then take a moment to contribute to our campaign if you’re able as
we quickly approach our primary election on May 17.

With love and gratitude,

Erica ❤️

Friends,

We once again faced a big fundraising challenge, and once again our team stepped up and beat our fundraising goal. I am truly grateful for everyone who has our back during this campaign.

Grassroots donations, conversations with voters, and kind messages on social media this month have only inspired me more as we approach this election.

As long as we keep up this energy, we’ll be able to handle anything our opponent throws our way. Derrick Van Orden doesn’t care about western Wisconsin, and we will make sure every voter knows it.

Look, I’m ready to fight for you, and I want to hear your priorities. **[As we enter this new quarter, can you fill out my 2022 Midterm Strategy Survey if you haven’t already?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43684066/338234823/723516303?refcode=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.04.01_b1_thank-you_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2022.04.01_b1_thank-you_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.04.01_b1_thank-you_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTExYTNlNC1mYmIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J6AbPhzCWrQxqSwFueASNnaPRtH3trv9v4PZeSVbG2I=&emci=8067e35e-efb1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=2911a3e4-fbb1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=3200050)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43684067/338234824/723516303?refcode=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.04.01_b1_thank-you_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2022.04.01_b1_thank-you_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.04.01_b1_thank-you_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTExYTNlNC1mYmIxLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J6AbPhzCWrQxqSwFueASNnaPRtH3trv9v4PZeSVbG2I=&emci=8067e35e-efb1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=2911a3e4-fbb1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=3200050)

subject: I'm in!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roberts for Congress, James Hill, Treasurer
body:
Together we will win this race for Congress!

** I’d like to take a moment and tell you, directly, that I’m in the race for Congress!

I’ll share more about the journey to this point in a moment, but first I must respectfully ask: Can you help jump start this campaign as we are running against the multi-million-dollar machine who are already slinging false, negative political hits against us. Can I count on you for a $5 contribution towards our grassroots campaign for Congress? (https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=367eecf667&e=a088917f89)
------------------------------------------------------------
Chip In $5 (https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=9a3019929b&e=a088917f89)
https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=493c7deb1e&e=a088917f89

**
Our primary election is just four months away – our opponent and her supporters are already spending millions against us but with your help, we can share our vision of bringing people together and delivering results throughout the 1^st district.

I jumped in this race after months of people encouraging me to run. I’m in it to win it – and together we will run our grassroots campaign of bringing people together and delivering results for every family in St Louis – city and county!

We have an uphill climb, especially with the multimillion-dollar machine our opponent is using. I know i'm asking a lot, but your generous donation today of $5 (https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=eceeb4bdc4&e=a088917f89) , or any amount you can, will make a huge difference in this race.

------------------------------------------------------------
Chip In $5 (https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=c4cf756659&e=a088917f89)

**
Together I know we can win this race!

Best,

~ Steve
------------------------------------------------------------

Hey friends,

**_Listen up closely, because the sooner everyone realizes this, the better:_ The Ohio GOP will lose if Mike Gibbons or Josh Mandel win the primary. They both just proved they cannot beat Tim Ryan.**

**Watch this to see what I’m talking about:**
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=1dcec8012dfd4a749c16af70a4bf2847&_e=mLN1yJ4BWhxpRgaRWeLrwKbtj26pqcXcj9Mjc1cVTtoRcSuj16jrhdIM9-pYjaL-fHNa4p-xXa-5eaqKRgDWYoZf_KyHkSu39Hmtl8RYDLgZx1sycY_UYURDvhK_VpTueqrwGgXjz5oBBXSoq0L6tNlEbN0rhUxD1JTUY-ibn9RYKGnzXzv_b8Z55iNJITwvQg1_lKBKghwPZ5svwjnQi1h7WwucLRklfPOdNj5Oh7zAYB3msEuXgkeSQhLou_c-ivvXX8D7T_Z4vpZQCdGG5pi1CKPtYKcc-wLKO2ALYJ7niCB53dhyBqpRPLDP6a2RISLMgmbi2eC2nYXszmWgDDt8S8Yq8xDPIeRbbfnpy32Acu6_p3stzsG9XJ1fm2y4m34kjw74Uxz_2-0eLMN9KCytsSOAuHjDUSIeEp6PFXHkqKHSEmcr3Qz4P8njYmvpgjIcN0iyLyIMOuNTnfP0X0eH5yRPeJPgh3M9tdW5PocaD6D72A5kd_5REqyUghtx88-_jHjDDghM5elKjXbsQ4q-dRHL2vvDRPnVOM7OaatKR3geXAqyvdl4z4adX-af) | | [**CHIP IN TO HELP ME TAKE BACK OHIO**](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=1dcec8012dfd4a749c16af70a4bf2847&_e=mLN1yJ4BWhxpRgaRWeLrwKbtj26pqcXcj9Mjc1cVTtoRcSuj16jrhdIM9-pYjaL-fHNa4p-xXa-5eaqKRgDWYoZf_KyHkSu39Hmtl8RYDLgZx1sycY_UYURDvhK_VpTueqrwGgXjz5oBBXSoq0L6tNlEbN0rhUxD1JTUY-ibn9RYKGnzXzv_b8Z55iNJITwvQg1_lKBKghwPZ5svwjnQi1h7WwucLRklfPOdNj5Oh7zAYB3msEuXgkeSQhLou_c-ivvXX8D7T_Z4vpZQCdGG5pi1CKPtYKcc-wLKO2ALYJ7niCB53dhyBqpRPLDP6a2RISLMgmbi2eC2nYXszmWgDDt8S8Yq8xDPIeRbbfnpy33IVKGTqlTe8Qxd3Jaki7Vp3hTtK3TYl2DA3SD48tbRBOkECzgJXdVQbVekmwpb3QDZoFn5-qdLgD3K77HkeHpDodc8ud_E8P5ttJFV-I-R03WxTo9CFm5MvZFnMol-y0PzYzRvYMj4VMG5PdJw3P4PT4fThBYi20FCFKSBaBvV5UCY0a3kQK3Ys8nCpjIyGJ8K0029RExYei9Jm2GXG9RH)
---

_I can’t tell you what to do or who to vote for, but I can tell you this:
You have a choice, and your choice boils down to this:_

• Mike Gibbons and Josh Mandel are nothing but the same old pompous men who run Washington. They are all talk, and absolutely **NO GAME**.

• They have proven that they are out-of-touch politicians who are driven by money, power and their own ego.

• If we lose this seat, **Republicans have ZERO chance** to take back the Senate.

• **I am a proven workhorse, not a show horse. Know the difference? While I have led with grit and grace to win Ohio TWICE for President Trump, they have been busy embarrassing the Ohio GOP.**

But don’t take my word for it, take President Trump’s: _“Jane Timken, she’s unbelievable.”_

clean_body: please watch this | Hey friends, Listen up closely, because the sooner everyone realizes this, the better: The Ohio GOP will lose if Mike Gibbons or Josh Mandel win the primary. They both just proved they cannot beat Tim Ryan. Watch this to see what I’m talking about: | | I can’t tell you what to do or who to vote for, but I can tell you this: You have a choice, and your choice boils down to this: • Mike Gibbons and Josh Mandel are nothing but the same old pompous men who run Washington. They are all talk, and absolutely NO GAME. • They have proven that they are out-of-touch politicians who are driven by money, power and their own ego. • If we lose this seat, Republicans have ZERO chance to take back the Senate. • I am a proven workhorse, not a show horse. Know the difference? While I have led with grit and grace to win Ohio TWICE for President Trump, they have been busy embarrassing the Ohio GOP. But don’t take my word for it, take President Trump’s: “Jane Timken, she’s unbelievable.” Thank you in advance for all of your support. Godspeed, Jane Timken | Paid for by Jane Timken for Ohio Jane Timken for Ohio 9856 Archer Ln, Dublin, OH 43017 If you would like to send donation by mail,

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, No fooling. Election Day is 32 days away. It’s been over a year and more than 50,000 miles traveled throughout Ohio for Jane since the start of this campaign and we are well-positioned to finish strong. Jane had yet another great week with the release of our latest ad, a solid debate performance, another key county party endorsement, and great events throughout Ohio with former Trump Adviser Kellyanne Conway. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Protecting Women's Sports** As part of our seven-figure broadcast TV buy, the campaign released it’s latest ad, titled “Compete”, standing up to protect women’s sports. [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=358be25e3dac43539a2f15e7f2445649&_e=oE6Moq1tkdzOi8st6WjpFQIHMaRg7C2gGH008AhQtMijOiVJiALVsXRUN30vUIpUlcOZV3aivfUnYvT5usY754AwafknWzn0M9ilBGLTPZecdC421cJl4nAToCMMSQxhOW42cmA0QSrohwycvJ9VNuF10zJL41WTixHtcERqwWyrlfYEfKgH1yWe-riCLn-9TnWlAg1MFZpH0X099Bd-iXDxXlh7Tr_7WvV-RQubYeYy5bCDPTOYAwwJr8jok_YWzTKa5rtPuPxAimHhAV4XOH98ImK9-3OT1-S3-ZrVFWk%3D)
As a former college rugby player and mom to a daughter, this fight is personal to Jane. In pursuit of their woke agenda, the Left is erasing opportunities for women. This is about fundamental fairness and standing up for what is right and that’s exactly what Jane will do in the U.S. Senate.
**From the Trail**
Last Friday, the Greater Toledo Right to Life hosted a breakfast and candidate forum in Toledo. We need leaders in Washington who will never be afraid to stand for Life and champion pro-Life, pro-family policies and Jane is the right person for the job!
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=358be25e3dac43539a2f15e7f2445649&_e=oE6Moq1tkdzOi8st6WjpFbik31kkyvVY_-mMRw0QQ8mfeLdIMHDxxLkgQTYwbSMvdvK3ebuvcxLloOTMpCzufPY3Fb2SeaV1zfDHYuA6rmyHDzWFT35IWdqLqc-Mb6AC13LCys2hehySc9R9OIl9VQ48x8fsPWhl_bzxKHEw0zh57tpCYsYMFGTP8xFdQrulhodbhq-7_XIBOlSi87FyQ6W6aNWX0nbVHorpjTGZqj3tNIKR40FiBF3tcI7ctfaKfJSAhOHtACvombDZyBBgcCNSVZhN0e1mOe8Gcvs5-qJvoomuRMQjze4ktECMiHo5RuoUCzOzfjdC6wRq2NLUQA%3D%3D)
On Saturday, the campaign hosted our “Skeet and Greet” at the Ashland Lake Gun Club. The weather didn’t stop local law enforcement and sportsmen from coming out for a great shoot. Whether for sport or for protection, gun rights are Constitutional rights and Jane will always defend our 2nd Amendment.
On Sunday afternoon, we were thrilled to receive the endorsement of the Stark County Republican Party! Jane has worked side by side with Republicans in Stark County for decades and they know she’ll take that same work ethic to Washington.
We were thrilled to have Kellyanne Conway in state and on the trail with us on Tuesday. With stops in Cuyahoga County, Lorain County, and Lucas County, Jane and Kellyanne fired up supporters across Northern Ohio for Jane’s America First campaign for Senate!
**Join Jane This Weekend!**
Ohio's choice for U.S. Senate will take place on May 3rd, which means early voting starts in just FOUR DAYS!

We must win all of April to elect Jane Timken!
Join her tomorrow in Cincinnati at 9:00 a.m. and Columbus at 12:30 p.m. to kick off our GOTV operation! Click the button below for details, or to join our team in other regions of the state!
[Join Jane!](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=358be25e3dac43539a2f15e7f2445649&_e=4YJR0ebmc3qqB6j9uth85Txcz_cqgbKI90JHWJfyIbPFFrCL2buMydKSDHBqW6bFdQsBc0vM6pphgYn_XT6TQl9-sSYeYZEDvxX5bWipWMECVa4ppWBr0rWe3jS4ZYBxEt2Pt4-ZbjoN-5i2uIAXrZTrAo68HghSTr11uVith1qudPzUmz3uuXTYFYmNABI3d3E7C8mrdYIsfFy560ILXnjWYVNRm1vqg3jgHEhmQVLOdjwa-2UC7aDrGARASl9TaJOJlnKl3oBOS1-odFNxSgp8LVxRXcoyCVWO5JabxWAmf28Eyh42TGYlTyFCp5-ic4EZ0xDpYTrfkm9N0xXqDwMDsX7hjDZLI8yIu1GQlR70cnJErG4z2O9Tjoyxc2long-Fi0HrlOoNkSn5vwlOxi4M2QhZMmfQvvnI3l8j-KkgqjFbgKQuSQ_CtSKHaxD6sn3xZE3yqKfzaU8Sufk1VP-i2bA-rypz71dSksoGCLL3MudyzEJZP8vAXiwlhMs54jY_OOoJE1-xIf53c5YbQ-mi6xTxYCNcbODvsqiqeo6RhPWn2gSIOWqU0Qfi_O0XoTHzlek8zndnwYNkw6mNKCh__I4VKEWOFU7Aq2UATbw77i4R3MYCJ8BK96u8cEJQoGYheRozzkZy3AJ0yHP0p1itYYhRbjzz7GWlYdN4QDoxv6GA362pWF_03OWdeqZ7bS5Slv3gCTdj0Lv2FVQcIM_-tjnQ9np5pwKUXkOim_aNrjd6eHYR734zOBk0FP8uonl1zOwlEnR699C_qps_C862CoJS8A2vozGeGiFRW3jouxkgenCWF0xYdOmMGu3ZBgCY5CcfhTQJG_6dSHaTI--0_J6mOkuMNg05lCZg7pu03uKHvEZzSUGeBgZcCpeSHhzLMh1x8ANWPD0CemvbzQ%3D%3D)
I hope everyone has a great weekend.
Sincerely,

Rob Secaur
Campaign Manager
Jane Timken for Ohio

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: I cannot thank you enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Friends,
I am writing today to thank you.
We’ve officially closed the books on our final quarterly FEC deadline before the primary, and I am proud to share that we hit our goal! This deadline was one of our last chances before our primary to show our supporters, competitors, and the media who this campaign is powered by — folks like you. And we did exactly that.
So thank you for being a part of this team in whatever capacity you can. Whether you contributed to our campaign, posted your support on social media, knocked on your neighbor’s door, or simply believed in this grassroots coalition, you are part of the reason we can proudly share our fundraising successes today. And I am incredibly grateful. Thank you.
When I joined this race, I had a clear vision in mind. I want a Senate that empowers working class families and strives for equity and justice for all, regardless of race, socio-economic status, or sexual orientation. And today, we are one step closer to making that a reality.
As we approach our primary, I want you to know that I won’t stop fighting as long as I have you by my side. But it’s not going to be easy. We have to put our whole heart in this. So now is the time to gear up and get ready to fight for this people-powered campaign.
You in?
Malcolm

This week, Kyrsten Sinema joined with Republicans on an important Senate vote. This time, she helped block one of President Biden’s key nominees in the Department of Labor.

clean_body: Taking the side of huge corporations — again. | | | | Kyrsten Sinema just impeded President Biden’s agenda AGAIN by blocking his Labor Department nominee. If this feels like deja vu...it’s not just you, Peter. This week, Kyrsten Sinema joined with Republicans on an important Senate vote. This time, she helped block one of President Biden’s key nominees in the Department of Labor. Why? Because he’s been too tough on wealthy corporations like Uber and Lyft that abuse their workers. It’s just more evidence that Sinema will always take the side of rich corporations over workers and families. ** Sinema has sided with Senate Republicans to torpedo critical and effective Build Back Better legislation, to defend the filibuster and kill any chance of passing a voting rights bill — and now this.It has to stop. Kyrsten Sinema is not a real Democrat, Peter. She doesn’t care about workers, working families, Arizonans, or anything beyond decisions that line her own pockets (and that of her wealthiest donors). We’ve had enough. Have you? Together, Primary Sinema Project This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC | | Sent via . clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Folks – I just wanted to take a moment to say thank you. Thank you for supporting this campaign. Thank you for supporting our Democratic Majority. It’s because of folks like YOU that we’re going to keep the Coachella Valley BLUE. But it’s not going to be an easy fight. As you know, Republicans are more motivated than ever before to steal our Democratic Majority this November. | | There’s so much at stake this November. But knowing that I have supporters like you by my side gives me all the hope in the world that we’re going to come out on top. From the bottom of my heart, thank you, folks. Onwards to November! –Raul | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? subject: I’m officially the Democratic nominee for SC-01!

body:
None of this would be possible without the outpouring of support I’ve received since announcing my intent to run.

| Because of your dedication, we were able to reach a huge milestone — **I filed to run for office last week and became the official Democratic nominee for SC-01!**

None of this would be possible without the outpouring of support I’ve received since announcing my intent to run. I want to thank you for standing with me and supporting my mission to bring caring, thoughtful leadership to the Lowcountry.

**Political operatives are calling this race the type that “will decide who controls the House” come November, so every dollar raised and every door knocked on matters.**

Your incredible support this month not only helped me reach my first FEC goal of 2022, but will help me introduce myself to voters in the district and spread the word about our campaign.

We have a long road ahead of us, but with you by my side, I know we’ll bring positive change to our communities.

Thank you,
Dr. Annie

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: BREAKING: historic victory for Amazon workers!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

This isn’t an Aprils Fools' Joke,
Peter.

Today history was made. Amazon workers in Staten Island won their election
to become the first unionized Amazon warehouse in the country. Despite
Amazon management's extreme union-busting efforts, workers voted to
unionize by a wide margin.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/101201?t=1001&akid=22671%2E1203867%2E9dKE7G ]Tweet from Amazon Labor that readsIt’s official!! Amazon Labor Union is
the first Amazon union in US HISTORY!!️ POWER TO THE PEOPLE! #UnionStrong
#ALUfortheWin

This victory was won by poor and working people showing solidarity and
coming together to take on one of, if not the most powerful, companies in
the world.

But the fight isn’t over. With more elections coming in April, Amazon will
do everything they can to undermine organizing because they know that
worker power is a threat to their bottom line.

Until workers secure their contract, Amazon Labor Union is depending on
contributions from supporters to keep up their organizing in the fights
ahead. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/101201?t=1002&akid=22671%2E1203867%2E9dKE7G ]Will you stand with Amazon workers and make a direct
contribution to the Amazon Labor Union?

Contribute

ALU President Chris Smalls, and all of the other organizers that made this
victory possible are showing us what we can collectively achieve when we
stand together.

This is just the beginning of a labor movement that is rising up across
the country, in response to the failures of corporations and government in
protecting working people during a pandemic.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/101201?t=1003&akid=22671%2E1203867%2E9dKE7G ]Celebrate with Amazon workers by making a contribution to the Amazon
Labor Union. With another union election coming this month, ALU needs your
support to power its organizing efforts.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/101201?t=1004&akid=22671%2E1203867%2E9dKE7G ]Contribute

Solidarity forever,

Team Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1005&akid=22671%2E1203867%2E9dKE7G ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1006&akid=22671%2E1203867%2E9dKE7G ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220401-22671-footer&t=1007&refcode2=22671_1203867_9dKE7G&akid=22671%2E1203867%2E9dKE7G

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1008&akid=22671%2E1203867%2E9dKE7G

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team Beto
subject: So grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We are on our way to electing the first Democratic governor of Texas in decades.
#
We asked our grassroots supporters to help us reach our $1,200,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal before yesterday's midnight deadline so we could continue growing our campaign to elect Beto as Texas' next Governor.
In response, tens of thousands of folks stepped up, chipped in, and helped us hit that critical goal. **From Beto, Amy, Nick, and our entire team — thank you!**
Every dollar is going directly to crucial investments in on-the-ground organizing including hiring new staff members, putting on more events, and opening field offices as part of our mission to build the largest coalition of voters that Texas has ever seen so we can defeat Greg Abbott.
We're so grateful that you're a part of this people-powered movement for a future where all Texans have access to great jobs, world-class schools, and affordable health care. **Because of your support, we are on our way to electing Beto the first Democratic governor of Texas in decades.**
**We're in this fight for everyday Texans, and with each grassroots donation from supporters like you, we move one step closer to making our positive, popular, and unifying vision a reality**. [If you can, would you please consider chipping in your first $3 contribution to help Beto go up against — and defeat — Greg Abbott?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54747?refcode=ema20220401-183115&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=183115%2E444211%2EKNSjqV)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54747?refcode=ema20220401-183115&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=183115%2E444211%2EKNSjqV)**
Abbott and his corporate mega-donors will do everything in their power to silence our voices and slow our movement. But together — volunteers, organizers, donors, staff, and voters — we will bring about the future we deserve.
Thank you,
Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220401-183115-footer&t=21&refcode2=183115_444211_KNSjqV&akid=183115%2E444211%2EKNSjqV)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=22&akid=183115%2E444211%2EKNSjqV)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=183115%2E444211%2EKNSjqV)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: George Bochetto
subject: Liars
body:
You NEED to see this....

|
---
Peter, Two guys running for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania want us to believe they're Republicans. But they're lying to themselves and to us. Dr. Oz is a liberal who lives in New Jersey, has more friends in Hollywood than he does in Pennsylvania, and only claims to be pro-life when it helps him politically. Shameful! And Dave McCormick is a lifelong Democrat from Connecticut who never supported President Trump, and has more ties to Communist dictator Xi Jinping than he does to Pennsylvania. Disgraceful! Please watch our new television commercial below and see why these two make-believe conservatives are WRONG for Pennsylvania. [](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYhRECXP9zpGAeiJcLx1o7CEYOL1CC-c4-JFL3DN8Z1zTEZ_w5u0vVCltY-jwbwWsYw&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=david_mccormick_email&n=1) Pennsylvania needs a conservative fighter - not liberal phonies. I will not dance around with Michelle Obama, or make billions off the Communist Regime in China. **I will stand up against the barbaric practice of abortion.** **I will support the men and women in law enforcement who protect our communities every day.** **I have fought for our statues and our culture, and I will put a stop to the liberal attacks on American values.** Help me get our shared message out to conservatives all across Pennsylvania \- **and help keep our ad up on television!** \- by clicking the link below and **sending us a contribution RIGHT NOW**. The only way Pennsylvania can progress is if we kick these phony conservatives to the curb and elect a real conservative leader. I am that leader.
[](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYhRECXP9zpGAeiJcLx1o7CEYOL1CC-c4-JFL3DN8Z1zTEZ_w5u0vVCltY-jwbwWsYw&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=david_mccormick_email&n=2) Thank you for your support, George Bochetto
Bochetto for Senate · PA 19102, United States

name: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: Omg, Derek ❤️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We mean it.
#
**Omg, Derek ❤️**
I know that we have been sending a lot of emails lately (sorry!), but I wanted to take a moment to share two things.
1️⃣ Thank you for being a supporter of this campaign. Your encouragement means the world to us.
2️⃣ Last night, just after midnight, João got the call from our HQ staff that we not only reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, but surpassed it!!
This is exciting for a million reasons, but especially because of this:
**We're running a clean, kind and honest Democratic campaign.** I think kindness has long been missing in politics and we need to elect leaders who will change politics for good. We also believe not all money is good money... with us, there will never be any dirty corporate PAC money. No shady super PACs.
We’ve always funded our campaign this way — the right way. Because when we say we're people-powered, we really mean it.
Derek, that’s why my family and I are just so deeply grateful for all of this: Every supporter, every contribution, and every message of encouragement. Even just reading this email makes you a part of this team.
We hope being a part of this campaign makes you proud.
With love,
Gisele ❤️
Thank you,
Gisele Barreto Fetterman
Second Lady of Pennsylvania (SLoP)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46264?refcode=em20220401-5221&t=1&akid=5221%2E434096%2EiBBAoa)
P.S. **[While our end-of-quarter deadline may be behind us, it would mean the world to us if you could help us start Q2 (the quarter that includes our primary election!) off even stronger by chipping in any amount today.🙏](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46264?refcode=em20220401-5221&t=2&akid=5221%2E434096%2EiBBAoa)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220401-5221-footer&t=3&refcode2=5221_434096_iBBAoa&akid=5221%2E434096%2EiBBAoa)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=4&akid=5221%2E434096%2EiBBAoa)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=5221%2E434096%2EiBBAoa)

subject: Less than 2 months until Election Day!

---
|
---
| **House approves plan to weaken voting rights protections**
The House of Representatives on March 30 granted first-round approval to Republican legislation that could severely weaken the voting rights protections in the Missouri Constitution. The measure requires a second vote to advance to the Senate.

The state constitution currently guarantees voting rights to “all” U.S. citizens who are at least 18 years old, Missouri residents and registered to vote. House Joint Resolution 131 would change that provision to say that “only” people who meet those requirements can vote. However, that simple one-word shift would eliminate the constitution’s current absolute guarantee of voting rights to those who meet the constitutional requirements and enable the legislature to pass laws to disenfranchise certain subsets of otherwise eligible voters.

HJR 131 also contains provisions aimed at blocking efforts to adopt ranked-choice voting or other methods that allow voters to cast ballots for multiple candidates. But the way those provisions are worded could have unintended consequences.

One provision specifies that voters can only cast one vote for a particular office. This would seem to constitionally prohibit Missouri’s traditional method of conducting school board elections in which two or three board seats are up at a time voters get to cast a ballot for as many as many candidates as there are contested seats, with the top vote-getters winning.

The other provision says that the winner of a party’s primary “shall be the only candidate for that party for the office at the general election.” This absolute language appears to constitutionally block the selection of a replacement candidate if a primary winner subsequently dies or withdraws his or her candidacy prior to the general election.

If both chambers approve HJR 131, it automatically would go on the Nov. 8 statewide ballot for voter consideration. The measure is one of several majority Republicans have pushed this year seeking to restrict voter rights.
---
|
---
| **House, Senate at stalemate on congressional redistricting**
Candidate filing for the Aug. 2 primary elections closed March 29 with Missouri lawmakers no closer to enacting new congressional districts as the House Representatives sought to negotiate a final bill and senators told the lower chamber to take the Senate’s version or nothing. The House promptly voted down the Senate plan and again asked for negotiations.

The House in January passed its plan to redraw Missouri’s eight congressional in accordance with the 2020 U.S. Census, but it took the Senate two months to approve its version as conservative Republican hardliners blocked the process in a failed attempt to secure an aggressive partisan gerrymander they hoped would result in a partisan split of seven Republicans and one Democrat.

Just days before the end of candidate filing, the Senate eventually settled on plan that would maintain the current 6-2 split in the state’s delegation. However, the Senate’s lines are vastly different from those proposed by the House, which just hours before the filing deadline voted to ask the Senate to negotiate a final version. The Senate rejected the request the next day and demanded the House accept the Senate version.

The House responded on March 31 by outright rejecting the Senate plan on a 129-26 vote before again requesting negotiations on the underlying legislation, House Bill 2117. Shortly thereafter, the Senate adjourned until April 4 without considering the request. A leader of the hardliners said at a subsequent news conference that there will be no negotiations.

For now, congressional candidates are filed under the outdated congressional map lawmakers enacted in 2011. However, both the state and federal constitutions require districts to be based on the most recent Census. A lawsuit already has been filed seeking to block the state from using the outdated map for the 2022 elections and asking the court to draw new districts given the legislature’s failure to do so. Many Democrats believe a court is more likely to produce a map closer to Missouri’s voting patterns in recent congressional races, which would yield a 5-3 partisan split.

Although candidate filing has closed, primary ballots won’t be finalized until late May, giving lawmakers more time to approve new congressional districts. If the current measure remains stalled, lawmakers could restart the process with another redistricting bill.
---
|
---
| **Governor declares 'COVID-19 crisis is over in the state'**
At a March 30 news conference, Gov. Mike Parson said: “The COVID-19 crisis is over in the state of Missouri, and we are moving on.” Although new cases in recent weeks have dropped to their lowest level since June, Missouri has seen sharp declines before only to experience large surges in cases as new variants sweep the state.

In fact, the state is a just a couple months removed from a massive peak in cases in January as the highly contagious omicron variant ravaged the state. As recently as Feb. 10, Missouri was still reporting at least 2,000 new cases a day before those numbers began to go down.

Parson, a Republican who has largely taken a hands-off approach to fighting the pandemic over the last two years, said his administration will now treat COVID-19 as an endemic disease, like seasonal influenza. Since the pandemic began in early 2020, there have been more than 1.4 million reported COVID-19 cases in Missouri and nearly 20,000 reported deaths. Both numbers likely are low due to the underreporting of cases and misclassification of deaths.

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=98c11911d4&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=9da360acef&e=a088917f89).

clean_body: House approves plan to weaken voting rights protections | | | | | | | Capitol Report April 1, 2022 | | | | Contact Senator Roberts 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329 Jefferson City, MO 65101 (573) 751-4415 Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov | | | | | | | | | | | | House approves plan to weaken voting rights protections The House of Representatives on March 30 granted first-round approval to Republican legislation that could severely weaken the voting rights protections in the Missouri Constitution. The measure requires a second vote to advance to the Senate. The state constitution currently guarantees voting rights to “all” U.S. citizens who are at least 18 years old, Missouri residents and registered to vote. House Joint Resolution 131 would change that provision to say that “only” people who meet those requirements can vote. However, that simple one-word shift would eliminate the constitution’s current absolute guarantee of voting rights to those who meet the constitutional requirements and enable the legislature to pass laws to disenfranchise certain subsets of otherwise eligible voters. HJR 131 also contains provisions aimed at blocking efforts to adopt ranked-choice voting or other methods that allow voters to cast ballots for multiple candidates. But the way those provisions are worded could have unintended consequences. One provision specifies that voters can only cast one vote for a particular office. This would seem to constitionally prohibit Missouri’s traditional method of conducting school board elections in which two or three board seats are up at a time voters get to cast a ballot for as many as many candidates as there are contested seats, with the top vote-getters winning. The other provision says that the winner of a party’s primary “shall be the only candidate for that party for the office at the general election.” This absolute language appears to constitutionally block the selection of a replacement candidate if a primary winner subsequently dies or withdraws his or her candidacy prior to the general election. If both chambers approve HJR 131, it automatically would go on the Nov. 8 statewide ballot for voter consideration. The measure is one of several majority Republicans have pushed this year seeking to restrict voter rights. | | House, Senate at stalemate on congressional redistricting Candidate filing for the Aug. 2 primary elections closed March 29 with Missouri lawmakers no closer to enacting new congressional districts as the House Representatives sought to negotiate a final bill and senators told the lower chamber to take the Senate’s version or nothing. The House promptly voted down the Senate plan and again asked for negotiations. The House in January passed its plan to redraw Missouri’s eight congressional in accordance with the 2020 U.S. Census, but it took the Senate two months to approve its version as conservative Republican hardliners blocked the process in a failed attempt to secure an aggressive partisan gerrymander they hoped would result in a partisan split of seven Republicans and one Democrat. Just days before the end of candidate filing, the Senate eventually settled on plan that would maintain the current 6-2 split in the state’s delegation. However, the Senate’s lines are vastly different from those proposed by the House, which just hours before the filing deadline voted to ask the Senate to negotiate a final version. The Senate rejected the request the next day and demanded the House accept the Senate version. The House responded on March 31 by outright rejecting the Senate plan on a 129-26 vote before again requesting negotiations on the underlying legislation, House Bill 2117. Shortly thereafter, the Senate adjourned until April 4 without considering the request. A leader of the hardliners said at a subsequent news conference that there will be no negotiations. For now, congressional candidates are filed under the outdated congressional map lawmakers enacted in 2011. However, both the state and federal constitutions require districts to be based on the most recent Census. A lawsuit already has been filed seeking to block the state from using the outdated map for the 2022 elections and asking the court to draw new districts given the legislature’s failure to do so. Many Democrats believe a court is more likely to produce a map closer to Missouri’s voting patterns in recent congressional races, which would yield a 5-3 partisan split. Although candidate filing has closed, primary ballots won’t be finalized until late May, giving lawmakers more time to approve new congressional districts. If the current measure remains stalled, lawmakers could restart the process with another redistricting bill. | | Governor declares 'COVID-19 crisis is over in the state' At a March 30 news conference, Gov. Mike Parson said: “The COVID-19 crisis is over in the state of Missouri, and we are moving on.” Although new cases in recent weeks have dropped to their lowest level since June, Missouri has seen sharp declines before only to experience large surges in cases as new variants sweep the state. In fact, the state is a just a couple months removed from a massive peak in cases in January as the highly contagious omicron variant ravaged the state. As recently as Feb. 10, Missouri was still reporting at least 2,000 new cases a day before those numbers began to go down. Parson, a Republican who has largely taken a hands-off approach to fighting the pandemic over the last two years, said his administration will now treat COVID-19 as an endemic disease, like seasonal influenza. Since the pandemic began in early 2020, there have been more than 1.4 million reported COVID-19 cases in Missouri and nearly 20,000 reported deaths. Both numbers likely are low due to the underreporting of cases and misclassification of deaths. | | 2022 SENATE BILLS \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility \- Authorizes a property tax credit for certain senior citizens \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines \- Modifies the Show-Me Heroes Program to provide for grants for veteran apprenticeship training programs \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons \- Relating to the legal minimum standard for valuation of insurance policies and contracts \- Creates provisions relating to certificates of moral character for persons convicted of certain offenses \- Modifies provisions relating to travel insurance \- Modifies provisions relating to arrests by private persons \- Modifies provisions relating to wrongful convictions \- Authorizes a tax credit for employers providing educational assistance to employees \- Establishes provisions relating to inquiries of wage ranges \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution processes \- Creates provisions relating to grants to not-for-profit organizations for physical security measures \- Designates "Police Officer Tamarris Bohannon Memorial Bridge" \- Modifies provisions relating to the Municipal Land Reutilization Law - Authorizes a tax credit for contributions made to refugee resource centers - Modifies provisions relating to warrants executed by law enforcement officers \- Designates every November 7th as Victims of Communism Memorial Day \- Authorizes a freeze on property tax assessments for senior citizens | | 2022 CO-SPONSORED BILLS \- Establishes the "Truth in Medicine Act" (Schupp) | | "Signed By Governor" | "Truly Agreed Bills" | | | | | HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19). SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing. Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and . Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov for more information on SBA disaster assistance. | | SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit or call 314-531-2003. You can also contact at 314-993-2777. | | COMMUNITY RESOURCE LIST The has a COVID-19 Community Economic Relief Fund. The Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services hotline can be reached at tel:%20\(877\%20435-8411). | | | | | | RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit: As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy. Cannabis is now officially for sale in NM!
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686060/338243924/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1204-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWJkNTVjOC0wN2IyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_iFuVtjjolQpITH4jMpGrwFy9cPf0gqPejApFNSC2CU=)

**Did you hear the good news, Peter? Today, retail stores in New Mexico can officially sell cannabis.**
Gov. Lujan Grisham is taking huge strides toward our shared progressive vision. From legalizing cannabis to taking bold action on climate change, **Gov. Lujan Grisham is passing some of the most progressive policies in the country.**
The problem is this:**** Gov. Lujan Grisham is up for reelection in November, and the GOP is trying harder than ever to remove her from office. National Republicans are even spending **hundreds of thousands of dollars on deceitful attack ads against her.**
To make matters worse, Gov. Lujan Grisham is behind on her fundraising goals. Due to regulations around legislative sessions, she wasn't allowed to fundraise for THREE months – **and now, she's about to enter ANOTHER fundraising blackout. **
**That's why it's so important that Gov. Lujan Grisham reaches her $150,000 goal before she enters the fundraising blackout on Tuesday. It's going to take all hands on deck to keep New Mexico blue, so she's counting on you to contribute:**
[**Please, Peter, will you donate $5 – or whatever you can spare today – to help Gov. Lujan Grisham get back on track, reach her goal on Wednesday, and continue enacting bold, progressive change?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686061/338243925/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1204-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWJkNTVjOC0wN2IyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_iFuVtjjolQpITH4jMpGrwFy9cPf0gqPejApFNSC2CU=)
