name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: Open for UNC vs. Duke final score
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
All eyes are on North Carolina and the greatest rivalry in college sports
#

Okay, that was a bit of an April Fools' joke.
But with all eyes on North Carolina and the greatest rivalry in college sports, **[we did want to poll this team to find out who you will be cheering for tomorrow. Are you rooting for UNC or Duke?](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-unc-duke-poll/?source=em220401-1-t1&refcode2=658.357359.6NtQ_H&t=1&akid=658%2E357359%2E6NtQ_H)**
| | **[UNC](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-unc-duke-poll/?source=em220401-1-t1-unc&refcode2=658.357359.6NtQ_H&t=2&akid=658%2E357359%2E6NtQ_H)**
---
| **[DUKE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-unc-duke-poll/?source=em220401-1-t1-duke&refcode2=658.357359.6NtQ_H&t=3&akid=658%2E357359%2E6NtQ_H)**
---
Sorry that we don’t have some secret psychic power to share tomorrow’s final score.
If Cheri could spare you another 24 hours of nerves, anxiety, existential dread, or whatever it is you’re feeling ahead of tomorrow’s big game, we promise she would.
But instead, consider this a permission slip for North Carolinians to be a bit insufferable about the greatness of our state and this rivalry. Never before have these legendary teams, separated by a mere 8 miles, met in the NCAA tournament. Coach K’s last season. Hubert Davis’ first season.
It’s a historic moment in a year meant for Team Blue to make history in North Carolina.
**[So who will you be cheering for and which shade of blue will you be wearing tomorrow when the Blue Devils and Tar Heels take the court?](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-unc-duke-poll/?source=em220401-1-t1&refcode2=658.357359.6NtQ_H&t=4&akid=658%2E357359%2E6NtQ_H)**
| | **[UNC](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-unc-duke-poll/?source=em220401-1-t1-unc&refcode2=658.357359.6NtQ_H&t=5&akid=658%2E357359%2E6NtQ_H)**
---
| **[DUKE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-unc-duke-poll/?source=em220401-1-t1-duke&refcode2=658.357359.6NtQ_H&t=6&akid=658%2E357359%2E6NtQ_H)**
---
No matter what happens, our position on this is very clear: we are going to come together to make sure Team Blue wins in North Carolina in November (all shades of blue welcome)!
Let's go!
Team Beasley
**[TAKE THE POLL](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-unc-duke-poll/?source=em220401-1-t1&refcode2=658.357359.6NtQ_H&t=7&akid=658%2E357359%2E6NtQ_H)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=658%2E357359%2E6NtQ_H). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=658%2E357359%2E6NtQ_H). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=10&refcode2=658_357359_6NtQ_H&akid=658%2E357359%2E6NtQ_H) today to help us make history.

name: INDEMS
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
### **Join INDems for our[2022 Crossroads Summit on Saturday, April 2](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686266/338244752/884541636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) in Indianapolis for a day-long training for party leaders and candidate campaigns.**
**\- American Rescue Plan Helps IPS Schools Retain Educators Through Bonuses and Mental Health Services -** This week, Indiana Democrats celebrated how President Joe Biden’s American Rescue Plan is creating a better future for Indianapolis Public Schools. Thanks to Indiana Democrats like U.S. Congressman André Carson, [IPS announced it will use $15 million of its Rescue Plan dollars](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686267/338244753/-203628130?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) to help retain educators in the school system. This will be accomplished by issuing attendance-based bonuses, providing virtual mental health services, and implementing a new program aimed at giving teachers flexibility during their workday. Indiana Democrats delivered this brighter future for teachers, and these investments will help combat the [D+ rating](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686268/338244754/1944698831?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) the state’s education system earned under the Indiana Republican Party. **In contrast, the Indiana Republican Party said “NO” this brighter future.** Politicians like U.S. Senator Todd Young voted “NO” on these investments, and in fact, Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer called teacher bonuses “[socialism](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686269/338244755/-1180238315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535)” – claiming this opposition was a “[great campaign to run on](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686270/338244756/178131055?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535)”. Democrats will highlight the Indiana GOP’s “NO” record and their divisive culture wars throughout the 2022 campaign year and beyond. **\- Friendly Reminder: The INGOP Has No Plan on Immigration, Voted “NO” on Reform Bill in 2013 -** Democrats also called out the Indiana Republican Party for misleading Hoosiers about their record on immigration. Over the week, Republicans like [U.S. Senators Todd Young](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686271/338244757/968097682?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) and [Mike Braun](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686272/338244758/-978965832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535), [Attorney General Todd Rokita](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686273/338244759/519606922?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535), and [U.S. Congresswoman Jackie Walorski](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686274/338244760/-256624737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) all criticized President Joe Biden for the increase in asylum seekers along the country’s Southern border. They claimed Biden “[fails to do “[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686279/338244765/672247473?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535)”, bill](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686281/338244767/672247473?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) in 2013 which would have increased security along the border, required a mandatory workplace verification system for employers, installed a visa program for low-skilled workers, and established a pathway to citizenship for undocumented immigrants. **\- Mike Braun “Outraged” Over American Rescue Plan’s Investments for Broadband, Teacher Pay, Infrastructure across Indiana -** Finally, the state program he opposes in the Hoosier State. In an [interview with Fox News](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686283/338244769/1526099593?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) last Friday, Braun claimed voters should be “[outraged](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686284/338244770/1526099593?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535)” to learn how states are choosing to spend their COVID-19 relief funds, using the opportunity to criticize the overall price tag and spending of this transformative law that’s gotten Indiana and the United States back on its feet after the pandemic.
### **Indiana Democrats have this question for Mike Braun: Which American Rescue Plan project in Indiana is he against?**
Since President Joe Biden’s signature, [the Rescue Plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686285/338244771/2075701864?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) is creating a brighter future for Indiana and its families. The state’s [READI program](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686286/338244772/-1612065418?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) is entirely funded by the COVID-19 relief law, as is Governor Holcomb’s [Next Level Connections program](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686287/338244773/-762856067?emci=212345fe-6fa3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=1ce6dddc-71a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=13447588&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=) ($250 million). Further, l[aw enforcement received](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686288/338244774/166613948?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) funding to combat crime, teachers were provided a well-deserved raise, schools received funding not seen since 2008, about [$540 million](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686289/338244775/62110823?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) is being used to solve the state’s childcare crisis, and all 92 counties were given investments to address community needs - like revitalizing [local infrastructure](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686290/338244776/-1817305393?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535). **\- Indiana Democratic Party is Hiring -** **Regional Organizing Directors** The Indiana Democratic Party is hiring Regional Organizing Directors to to build a stronger party in the field throughout the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategic planning, and voter targeting and contact. These are important roles to building back a fair and equitable two party system of government in Indiana. For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at [https://www.indems.org/jobs/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686291/338244777/1076440731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTExNWNjMS0wYWIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=541-ItgXNVW7BBQ3Ltd9x6HNhLS9CE9N1Y200ajqqyM=&emci=172758f7-fab1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3a115cc1-0ab2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) **Spring and Summer Interns** The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates.
#### Benefits
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field.
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

#### _Intern Duties_
Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

####
_Qualifications_
Applicants must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

#### _How to Apply_
Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at [lauren@indems.org](mailto:lauren@indems.org). ###

Indiana Democrats have this question for Mike Braun: Which American Rescue Plan project in Indiana is he against? Since President Joe Biden’s signature, is creating a brighter future for Indiana and its families. The state’s is entirely funded by the COVID-19 relief law, as is Governor Holcomb’s = ($250 million). Further, l funding to combat crime, teachers were provided a well-deserved raise, schools received funding not seen since 2008, about is being used to solve the state’s childcare crisis, and all 92 counties were given investments to address community needs - like revitalizing . \- Indiana Democratic Party is Hiring - Regional Organizing Directors The Indiana Democratic Party is hiring Regional Organizing Directors to to build a stronger party in the field throughout the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategic planning, and voter targeting and contact. These are important roles to building back a fair and equitable two party system of government in Indiana. For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at Spring and Summer Interns The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. Benefits Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials Enhanced communication and organizational skills Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field. We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school. Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include: campaign research voter outreach data entry assistance with local campaign events special projects Qualifications Applicants must be: passionate about Democratic politics trustworthy and responsible able to communicate effectively with others flexible and willing to help when needed able to work on multiple tasks at once How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at mailto:lauren@indems.org. ### [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

_As Trump considers another run for office, we need to know where this grassroots team stands:_**

Do you approve of Donald Trump?**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6225?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220401-LivePoll-DisapprovalRating-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220401-LivePoll-DisapprovalRating-Pros-sl1&akid=3624%2E9716520%2E5RQ6nD)

**We need your help to confirm this poll's accuracy BEFORE Trump launches another White House bid.** We’re missing 8 responses from Pennsylvania, and our live poll expires at 11:59 PM. **Can you take a moment to respond?**

name: Rabine for Governor
subject: Not another April Fool’s Joke…
body:
Pritzker is still in office...we wish that was an April Fool’s joke! We have been working hard traveling throughout the state on the campaign trail to make sure Pritzker becomes a distant memory.

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_1_newsletter&n=1) | |
---|---|---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_1_newsletter&n=2) Dear Peter -- Pritzker is still in office...we wish that was an April Fool’s joke! We have been working hard traveling throughout the state on the campaign trail to make sure Pritzker becomes a distant memory. We can all agree better leadership in Illinois is necessary, but Gary is the only one who possesses the real-life experience and business acumen to ensure a brighter future for all Illinoisans. Where do we start? With pro-growth policies that make Illinois an attractive place for companies to do business. As a business owner and job creator, Gary knows how we can be more competitive and keep businesses in Illinois for the long term. For example, did you see Lori Lightfoot, today, announce a policy in Chicago of a gas card lottery system to help pay for the significant increase in gas prices? Putting a Band-Aid on a problem and forcing people to become more dependent on the government is not a sustainable way of building a successful economy. Best Regards, Gary Rabine
### **Endorsement Announcement!**
We are excited to announce the endorsement of Ret. Lt. General Michael Flynn, former Trump national security adviser and freedom fighter. General Flynn recognizes that we need to elect a principled, life-long conservative who has the experience to fix the mess in Illinois created by Mike Madigan and JB Pritzker. | [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwN0klia_0F-1kb9iFrNEEpVFPlILVs98Oe1LOXZmmfIGp&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_1_newsletter&n=3 "WATCH HERE") [WATCH HERE](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwN0klia_0F-1kb9iFrNEEpVFPlILVs98Oe1LOXZmmfIGp&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_1_newsletter&n=3)
---
**"We need more leaders like Gary. Those who don't just talk conservative but take action. Gary is exactly the leader we need now during this critical moment in our nation's history."** \- Ret. Lt. Gen. Michael Flynn
**Will you join our Growing Movement to Defeat JB Pritzker?******
Join Team Rabine to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker and help turn our state around!
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_1_newsletter&n=4 "Join Team Rabine") [Join Team Rabine](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_1_newsletter&n=4)

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
I'm not asking, just thanking. We sent a number of messages ahead of the first election-year FEC deadline, and I know my team and I have asked a LOT of you over the past few days. So, I promise this isn’t another email asking for a donation — I’m only reaching out to say thanks.

**I appreciate everything you’ve done to support the work we’re doing to defeat Ron Johnson and flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat.** And I'm proud to let you know that we not only reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal — we _surpassed_ it. I hope you’re proud, too.

When we decided to go up on TV early, I knew we were taking a big risk, but grassroots donations from thousands of supporters like you helped us fill the gap we created in our budget. Now, we’re in a position to keep our first ads running and compete with Ron Johnson on the air. That’s important, especially right now.

Millions of people across this country are watching everyday costs go up. Too many folks are stretching their pocketbooks just to fill a tank of gas. Big corporations are putting the squeeze on working families. Seniors are cutting pills to make their prescriptions last a bit longer. And we have a U.S. Senator who isn’t doing a damn thing about any of it.

It's time to replace Ron Johnson with someone who’s going to actually fight for our communities, lower costs for families, and make sure ordinary folks finally get a little breathing room. Frankly, I don’t think that’s too much to ask for.

**I’m running for U.S. Senate to represent the people of Wisconsin, not corporate interests or big political donors.** I got in this race to fight for people like _you_ — and you deserve nothing less than someone who’s going to show up, listen to what you have to say, be your voice in Washington, and get the job done for you and your family. That’s what I’m fighting for.

Every time grassroots supporters like you chip in, those donations allow us to run the kind of campaign that can take on Ron Johnson, flip this Senate seat for the people of Wisconsin, and compete with the outrageous amount of Republican spending we’re going to see in this election.

So, I wanted to thank you again for your trust and support. There's a lot of work ahead of us, and the path forward will not be easy. But the only way we'll win is if we work together, which is why I’m so grateful to have you on our team.

Forward!

— Sarah Godlewski

It would mean a lot to all of us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686893/338246219/-589298804?ms=em22_220401_endors_engg_gq_nonsigners___SG_ettx&source=em22_220401_endors_engg_gq_nonsigners___SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220401_endors_engg_gq_nonsigners___SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=5KzbOC4Jc4I1u/pC+0w5aqCbsZnhzBU4HV7opbAgGt3wrt4fXIU9KsW3x0nargXjl5gamWTXDSeJ2AOtundC9F/ACAARvr5OCOCnJio2zCq6+KR0TOgPHHtXCv72uk1mFNsAMJeL4BdCyFIU/Y5dmuGS/mRjdE26scJonuo3H3w=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjQxZGVlZC0wZGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O5C-5x1dCeiLHSRgrWd1pe3FDFXMu-b20622h3CrtT4=&emci=84865072-06b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8b41deed-0db2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18659593)** | [Endorse](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43686894/338246220/-589298804?ms=em22_220401_endors_engg_gq_nonsigners___SG_ettx&source=em22_220401_endors_engg_gq_nonsigners___SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220401_endors_engg_gq_nonsigners___SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=5KzbOC4Jc4I1u/pC+0w5aqCbsZnhzBU4HV7opbAgGt3wrt4fXIU9KsW3x0nargXjl5gamWTXDSeJ2AOtundC9F/ACAARvr5OCOCnJio2zCq6+KR0TOgPHHtXCv72uk1mFNsAMJeL4BdCyFIU/Y5dmuGS/mRjdE26scJonuo3H3w=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjQxZGVlZC0wZGIyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O5C-5x1dCeiLHSRgrWd1pe3FDFXMu-b20622h3CrtT4=&emci=84865072-06b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8b41deed-0db2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18659593)

clean_body: I'm not asking, just thanking. We sent a number of messages ahead of the first election-year FEC deadline, and I know my team and I have asked a LOT of you over the past few days. So, I promise this isn’t another email asking for a donation — I’m only reaching out to say thanks. I appreciate everything you’ve done to support the work we’re doing to defeat Ron Johnson and flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat. And I'm proud to let you know that we not only reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal — we surpassed it. I hope you’re proud, too. When we decided to go up on TV early, I knew we were taking a big risk, but grassroots donations from thousands of supporters like you helped us fill the gap we created in our budget. Now, we’re in a position to keep our first ads running and compete with Ron Johnson on the air. That’s important, especially right now. Millions of people across this country are watching everyday costs go up. Too many folks are stretching their pocketbooks just to fill a tank of gas. Big corporations are putting the squeeze on working families. Seniors are cutting pills to make their prescriptions last a bit longer. And we have a U.S. Senator who isn’t doing a damn thing about any of it. It's time to replace Ron Johnson with someone who’s going to actually fight for our communities, lower costs for families, and make sure ordinary folks finally get a little breathing room. Frankly, I don’t think that’s too much to ask for. I’m running for U.S. Senate to represent the people of Wisconsin, not corporate interests or big political donors. I got in this race to fight for people like you — and you deserve nothing less than someone who’s going to show up, listen to what you have to say, be your voice in Washington, and get the job done for you and your family. That’s what I’m fighting for. Every time grassroots supporters like you chip in, those donations allow us to run the kind of campaign that can take on Ron Johnson, flip this Senate seat for the people of Wisconsin, and compete with the outrageous amount of Republican spending we’re going to see in this election. So, I wanted to thank you again for your trust and support. There's a lot of work ahead of us, and the path forward will not be easy. But the only way we'll win is if we work together, which is why I’m so grateful to have you on our team. Forward! — Sarah Godlewski | | Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin

body:
Our police deserve better. [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=46e7c2a9f0874654a77e326dbb572e1d&_e=xpFHvMR3vRhb8_NnclgBSB5UIE4OnrdkuOJSORFE5tJxMDS1GKZXTeJwI_NWQmP5F3dM4CYcWkVfrXnl_IFwnQCTdlrhchemUlOSTaeBlcwb0JfaIbCkLDSB6fkU5Ui9-kwIgSeXAahlCyWdcRpEY5AV4CJ3ZO69idfbXhzMr1MXNWDh1mqt3uXGLFbB28ZvfRgdEez_sklTuHaDXO-Rq6BKCbOvAuL2NjcUeBphWekQHDwmQJG1Qt0GUYLAAc_Eg3kUSsZyKdg02iLR8o5Z1Q%3D%3D)
My friend,

**I'm sick of seeing our brave law enforcement officers disrespected _day after day. _**

These men and women are ready to **GIVE THEIR LIVES** to keep our Minnesota communities safe, and how does Tim Walz thank them —

_By hiding in his mansion behind his security team while riots were burning down the Twin Cities?_

_By staying protected in his state issued SUV as Minneapolis saw 655 carjacking victims last year alone?_

_By being a privileged and protected executive who gets to wake up every morning while homicide rates continue to climb to near record highs?_

**[Rather than come to the aid of our overwhelmed police officers, Tim Walz and his Democrat allies have decided where they stand, and it's not with law and order.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=46e7c2a9f0874654a77e326dbb572e1d&_e=xpFHvMR3vRhb8_NnclgBSKMfb27eDYcQDwjl_4d-al2kv35R5BdQdOEUV7-3qzB8-N5MTfDFS0J-7mKu4t9sP_KSEH1kjkIt9yamjJn6uwtiKHLBLzRGVtNxOeE8Sa-oH2nbGtTv16wCWkzuL26MQMiEJ1r3g4QM63nODTCMgZmdZqLWmqvPfnIoczSYD4klF_pXKTAmtywFKX_TLa6OomVMi4xxTsn5y4LdcpLqMpPqgpWcl-wO5O1iFCY0194AQ1l693BLkB1flRuPFJ7ECtDLNzgB2Fblh5yBLqYATJB9JQGDYzJNtksnWkvkk466c7r1tccYppSCPFjfl0X1XuL9HH6tF3FbumWmmMi1NNE%3D)**
[**Stand Up for Law Enforcement >> Chip In!
**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=46e7c2a9f0874654a77e326dbb572e1d&_e=xpFHvMR3vRhb8_NnclgBSKMfb27eDYcQDwjl_4d-al2kv35R5BdQdOEUV7-3qzB8-N5MTfDFS0J-7mKu4t9sP_KSEH1kjkIt9yamjJn6uwtiKHLBLzRGVtNxOeE8Sa-oH2nbGtTv16wCWkzuL26MQPcnIxpoJU39fkck6u98OxKgoVZ12fFzHVT7-zvvPO2J_Ae3iXqleqf4UVrcMdyZW8VWCYcPDKPus2escNqcYF30RMMZ99j8Wqqb8tk96hDffeF2eLanHQBEGlKGcCfG-X_SgWYpLrnCwxosBfh340d6JKpW3Rn6a7QFajTnhC3TIE9M5TF-MrJNKEZbWOXwGZlgrKYyS_I_eS88XMMGs14%3D)
_**I won't allow this disrespect to continue.**_

As Senate Majority Leader, I worked closely with my Republican colleagues to ensure that our police were given the best opportunity to execute their responsibilities within our communities. We championed the Matson Strong bill, which strengthened penalties for those convicted of first-degree assault against a police officer. We stopped the Democrats in their tracks as they fought tooth-and-nail to remove qualified immunity. When the public worked to establish citizen oversight boards and remove police, we stepped up and put that movement to bed. Finally, to better incentivize our brave men and women to continue to serve, we passed pay raises for our law enforcement!

I have a proven record of defending our law enforcement, and as your Governor I will continue to **Back the Blue.**

[_**Can you chip in $100, $75, $50, or $25 NOW to help me DEFEAT Walz and DEFEND our brave law enforcement?**_](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=46e7c2a9f0874654a77e326dbb572e1d&_e=xpFHvMR3vRhb8_NnclgBSKMfb27eDYcQDwjl_4d-al2kv35R5BdQdOEUV7-3qzB8-N5MTfDFS0J-7mKu4t9sP_KSEH1kjkIt9yamjJn6uwtiKHLBLzRGVtNxOeE8Sa-oH2nbGtTv16wCWkzuL26MQOIv4n9xxoq-XO6bFq5Z0z0M1q1Sz51dOVMFchhtiyPogl0AF0BTaGEFJdOSeSY09MSy0ysnaREQtUquJlCQkNE6gz2BJJRGskamsgp-BIOexJ4Vsmf4QgltDarIfl230j4aNUNNgKIvGwZwHslIaV3zlteFDo1_NrY06clKKnYdpbun-6L_rl1jK694JlnO3DQkHdgIiDCy3EXWArA7mf4%3D)

Thank you,

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Biden Admin Targets YOU?
body: Another Covid Vaccine Cover-up! [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH SUES JUSTICE OVER TASK FORCE ON “THREATS” TO ELECTION OFFICIALS [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=27037&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL2NsaW50b24tY3JpbWVzLWV4cG9zZWQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] The Biden administration has a nasty habit of trying to scare Americans about asking questions about elections. The latest is a task force chasing supposed threats to election officials. We filed a FOIA suit against the Department of Justice for records concerning this new task force (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice_ [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=27036&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWF1Z3VzdC1tZWV0aW5nLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMDczNS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] (No. 1:22-cv-00735)). We sued after the Justice Department failed to respond to an August 30, 2021, FOIA request for the following: All records related to the Department of Justice’s August 2021 virtual meeting pertaining to threats to election officials (https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=27034&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL3ByL3JlYWRvdXQtanVzdGljZS1kZXBhcnRtZW50bGVhZGVyc2hpcC1tZWV0aW5nLXRocmVhdHMtZWxlY3Rpb24td29ya2Vycz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==). This request includes, but is not limited to, the following: All records created in preparation for, during, and/or pursuant to the virtual meeting. All records depicting the invitees to, and participants in, the meeting. All audio recordings, transcripts, and summaries of the meeting. On August 26, 2021, Attorney General Merrick B. Garland convened a “virtual discussion” with a bipartisan group of over 1,400 election officials to discuss “mounting and persistent threats to the safety of election officials and workers across the country” and to introduce DOJ’s recently launched Election Threats Task Force. According to the readout [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=27035&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL3ByL3JlYWRvdXQtanVzdGljZS1kZXBhcnRtZW50LWxlYWRlcnNoaXAtbWVldGluZy10aHJlYXRzLWVsZWN0aW9uLXdvcmtlcnM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] of the virtual meeting, “the Task Force is composed of the Department’s Criminal Division’s Public Integrity Section, the Civil Rights Division’s Voting and Criminal Sections, and the National Security Division’s Counterterrorism Section, as well as the FBI’s Criminal Investigative Division and the Department of Homeland Security’s Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency.” During the meeting, Associate Attorney General Vanita Gupta revealed that the Civil Rights Division is participating in the Task Force and has established “a helpline funded by the Office of Victims of Crime that connects victims of crimes and threats to trained professionals who can provide emotional support, information and referrals in over 200 languages.” FBI Director Christopher Wray explained how “the FBI’s Election Crimes Coordinators — FBI Special Agents across all 56 FBI Field Offices — work with state and local election officials on election crime matters.” Wray also emphasized, “the importance of reporting all election-related threats and troubling communications to the FBI, even if it is unclear whether there is a violation of federal law, so that law enforcement can investigate, identify trends and share information with partners across the country.” [Emphasis in original] The Biden Justice Department appears to be manufacturing another fake crisis of “threats” against government officials. They’re doing this to justify targeting American citizens for exercising their First Amendment rights to demand election officials combat voter fraud and conduct free and fair elections. What is the Garland DOJ hiding? JUDICIAL WATCH SUES HHS ABOUT RESEARCH INTO COVID-19 BOOSTERS We’re probing a little-known federal agency, the Biomedical Advanced Research and Development Authority (BARDA), to learn more about its research into COVID-19 boosters. We filed a FOIA suit against its parent Department of Health and Human Services (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services_ [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=27030&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLWZkYS1iYXJkYS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDA3MzAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] (No. 1:22-cv-00730)) in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia. We sued after HHS failed to respond to an August 23, 2021, FOIA request for: All data and studies submitted by Pfizer and BioNTech to the FDA, including but not limited to BARDA, relating to “booster” vaccinations for the SARS-CoV-2 virus. The BARDA agency has been heavily involved with the development of the COVID-19 vaccine. According to its website [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=27031&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hc3ByLmhocy5nb3YvQWJvdXRBU1BSL1Byb2dyYW1PZmZpY2VzL0JBUkRBL1BhZ2VzL2RlZmF1bHQuYXNweF06P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz The Biomedical Advanced Research and Development Authority (BARDA) provides an integrated, systematic approach to the development of the necessary vaccines, drugs, therapies, and diagnostic tools for public health medical emergencies such as chemical, biological, radiological, and nuclear (CBRN) accidents, incidents and attacks; pandemic influenza (PI), and emerging infectious diseases (EID). The American people deserve to know the data about COVID-19 vaccines and boosters, especially data hidden by little known but powerful government agencies such as BARDA. ASSAULTS AGAINST U.S. BORDER PATROL AGENTS UP 30% OVER LAST YEAR The Biden border crisis is worsening and placing law enforcement lives at risk. Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog has the dire details [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=27038&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYXNzYXVsdHMtYWdhaW5zdC1icC1hZ2VudHMvXTo/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM= It may be hard to imagine, but the situation along the Mexican border appears to be worsening. Just months after government figures disclosed unprecedented criminal activity, a distressing escalation in drug smuggling and brazen attacks against federal agents, the U.S. Border Patrol reveals an alarming 30% increase in assaults against officers in the first five months of the fiscal year 2022, which started in October. Back in mid-August, Customs and Border Protection (CBP), the frontline Homeland Security agency charged with keeping terrorists and their weapons out of the U.S., confirmed [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=27039&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWV4aWNhbi1ib3JkZXItdmlvbGVuY2UtZHJ1Zy1zbXVnZ2xpbmctc3VyZ2UtZmVkZXJhbC1hZ2VudHMtY29tZS11bmRlci1ndW5maXJlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] that organized Transnational Criminal Organizations (TCOs) are behind the movement, and they are a serious threat to national security and public safety. The latest CPB stats [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=27040&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JwLmdvdi9uZXdzcm9vbS9zdGF0cy9hc3NhdWx0cy11c2UtZm9yY2U/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] show that agents are increasingly encountering violence on the job and a growing number are coming under attack. So far, this fiscal year the agency has recorded 194 agent assaults compared to 149 during the same period in 2021. In the majority of cases, federal agents were physically attacked by another person. The rest of the incidents mostly involved rock-throwing and vehicular assault. In some of the attacks the perpetrators used guns or knives, according to the agency. After a recent case near the border wall in Santa Teresa, New Mexico, the sector’s chief, Gloria Chavez, posted this on social media [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=27041&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9VU0JQQ2hpZWZFUFQvc3RhdHVzLzE1MDYzMjk5NzM0NjM4MjIzMzddOj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw== “USBP Agents face threats every day on the border. Transnational criminal organizations conduct counter-surveillance on our border operations daily. Watch your 6, USBP!” The phrase, used by military and law enforcement to say “watch your back,” originated with World War I pilots who referred to the back of planes as the six o’clock position. Last year 618 customs and border officers were assaulted, according to CBP, which began publicizing specific examples of the more serious attacks later in the year. Among them were several Border Patrol agents who came under gunfire in Texas and California. The agency described [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=27042&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JwLmdvdi9uZXdzcm9vbS9uYXRpb25hbC1tZWRpYS1yZWxlYXNlL2JvcmRlci1wYXRyb2wtYWdlbnRzLXByb3RlY3QtdXMtYm9yZGVyLWFtaWRzdC10YXJnZXRlZC1hdHRhY2tzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] the assailants as TCOs, which “are heavily involved in smuggling people, including terrorists, criminals and trafficking victims, as well as weapons, cash, and drugs through sophisticated criminal networks.” All those months ago, CBP confirmed that federal agents are increasingly getting attacked and that life-threatening confrontations are on the rise for agents working to secure America’s borders. “In many cases, agents find themselves in remote locations where they are significantly outnumbered and do not have immediate backup,” CBP wrote in the statement released last August. Even at Border Patrol checkpoints, smugglers are more brazen than ever. Earlier this year a Mexican national trying to smuggle 10 illegal immigrants was sentenced to prison [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=27043&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvdXNhby1zZGNhL3ByL3NtdWdnbGVyLXdoby1hc3NhdWx0ZWQtYm9yZGVyLXBhdHJvbC1hZ2VudHMtaGlzLWNhci1zZW50ZW5jZWQtcHJpc29uP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] for intentionally sideswiping and ramming multiple vehicles in 2021, injuring several Border Patrol agents. Though it appears to be at record highs, violence along the porous southern border is hardly new and overwhelmed federal agents have long risked their lives with weak support from the government. Under some administrations their hands were essentially tied to appease the left. For example, when Mexican drug-cartel violence was at the time at an unprecedented high, the Obama Department of Homeland Security (DHS) ordered federal agents on the frontline to “run away” and “hide” [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=27044&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYm9yZGVyLXBhdHJvbC1hZ2VudHMtb3JkZXJlZC10by1ydW4taGlkZS1mcm9tLXNob290ZXJzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] when encountering a shooter. DHS was headed by Janet Napolitano who famously said the Mexican border “is as secure as it has ever been” and that violence in the area is merely a mistaken “perception.” During Napolitano’s delusional proclamation, the situation was already so dire in Texas that officials created a website to track Mexican drug-cartel violence [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=27045&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGUtd2ViLXNpdGUtdHJhY2tzLW1leGljYW4tY2FydGVsLXZpb2xlbmNlLWFsb25nLWJvcmRlci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] that transformed chunks of the southern border into a war zone. The Texas Department of Agriculture started the website to keep farmers and residents informed about the growing danger created by Mexican drug cartels illegally crossing into the state. Cartels were invading Texas farms and ranches, threatening citizens’ lives and jeopardizing the nation’s food supply at an “increasingly alarming rate,” then Texas Agriculture Commissioner Todd Staples said, adding that Washington was ignoring the crisis. That was more than a decade ago. The problem has only gotten worse. Until next week, [Contribute] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=13&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0p1ZGljaWFsV2F0Y2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=14&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=15&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vdXNlci9KdWRpY2lhbFdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58470&L=1285&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH SUES JUSTICE OVER TASK FORCE ON “THREATS” TO ELECTION OFFICIALS [] The Biden administration has a nasty habit of trying to scare Americans about asking questions about elections. The latest is a task force chasing supposed threats to election officials. We filed a FOIA suit against the Department of Justice for records concerning this new task force (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [=] (No. 1:22-cv-00735)). We sued after the Justice Department failed to respond to an August 30, 2021, FOIA request for the following: All records related to the Department of Justice’s August 2021 virtual meeting pertaining to threats to election officials (==). This request includes, but is not limited to, the following: All records created in preparation for, during, and/or pursuant to the virtual meeting. All records depicting the invitees to, and participants in, the meeting. All audio recordings, transcripts, and summaries of the meeting. On August 26, 2021, Attorney General Merrick B. Garland convened a “virtual discussion” with a bipartisan group of over 1,400 election officials to discuss “mounting and persistent threats to the safety of election officials and workers across the country” and to introduce DOJ’s recently launched Election Threats Task Force. According to the readout [=] of the virtual meeting, “the Task Force is composed of the Department’s Criminal Division’s Public Integrity Section, the Civil Rights Division’s Voting and Criminal Sections, and the National Security Division’s Counterterrorism Section, as well as the FBI’s Criminal Investigative Division and the Department of Homeland Security’s Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency.” During the meeting, Associate Attorney General Vanita Gupta revealed that the Civil Rights Division is participating in the Task Force and has established “a helpline funded by the Office of Victims of Crime that connects victims of crimes and threats to trained professionals who can provide emotional support, information and referrals in over 200 languages.” FBI Director Christopher Wray explained how “the FBI’s Election Crimes Coordinators — FBI Special Agents across all 56 FBI Field Offices — work with state and local election officials on election crime matters.” Wray also emphasized, “the importance of reporting all election-related threats and troubling communications to the FBI, even if it is unclear whether there is a violation of federal law, so that law enforcement can investigate, identify trends and share information with partners across the country.” [Emphasis in original] The Biden Justice Department appears to be manufacturing another fake crisis of “threats” against government officials. They’re doing this to justify targeting American citizens for exercising their First Amendment rights to demand election officials combat voter fraud and conduct free and fair elections. What is the Garland DOJ hiding? JUDICIAL WATCH SUES HHS ABOUT RESEARCH INTO COVID-19 BOOSTERS We’re probing a little-known federal agency, the Biomedical Advanced Research and Development Authority (BARDA), to learn more about its research into COVID-19 boosters. We filed a FOIA suit against its parent Department of Health and Human Services (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services [] (No. 1:22-cv-00730)) in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia. body:
Our campaign has a new priority issue. What do you think? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/be3369427e39/big-changes-and-big-victories?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=1a549a3175&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear friends,

It’s time for a fresh start.

April marks the beginning of a new chapter for #TeamBecky, and with the Republican convention **just three weeks away,** I am thrilled to introduce the **new priority** I hope to take to the U.S. Senate!
---
| |
---
**I love Utah and the people of our great state.** Utahns are creative, innovative, and hard-working.

It has always been my commitment to **bring Utah values to Washington D.C.** ; that's why in 2022,**** I plan to bring a cookie and soda shop to **EVERY state in the country!

Utahns set the blueprint** for doing sweets right, and it's time for **Americans everywhere** to have a treat.
---
| As your U.S. Senator, **I promise to encourage and support resolutions for sips and sweets nationwide!** If you agree, sign my petition below and **support our fight! **
---
| | [SIGN NOW!](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=78000cd90b&e=10c1db3257 "SIGN NOW!")
---
| Okay, okay! Although it would be a delight to have cookie and soda shops nationwide, **I have to admit** I will not be using sips and sweets as my priority in the U.S. Senate. **Happy April Fools!**
---
|
---
| Thousands of hours logged, hundreds of miles traveled, and over 400 signature events held. THIS is the dedication our **phenomenal volunteers and signature team** have given to this campaign over the past three months.

**Thanks to their efforts, we have submitted over 44,000 signatures to the Utah Office of Elections!**

Our campaign has defied expectations. We gathered and submitted**57% more signatures than the requirement** , going above and beyond to bring more **productive, proactive, and inclusive solutions** to Washington D.C.

I am overjoyed by the **unprecedented grassroots support** our campaign has received thus far, and your support helped #TeamBecky to **reach voters in every corner of the state.** We are within arm’s reach of securing our spot on the ballot, but we won’t slow down until we’ve crossed the finish line—and **we need your help to get there!**

**If you haven’t submitted your signatures,** turn them in**ASAP.** To submit your signatures, mail your packet to _Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate, P.O. Box 1467, Bountiful, Utah 84011_ , or **visit one of these locations:**
* **1121 Eaglewood Loop, North Salt Lake – Anytime**
* **1777 Somerset Ridge, Dr, Draper – Anytime**
* **Harmony, 275 E Center Street, Provo – Business Hours**

---
|
---
| **In case you missed it, check out #TeamBecky’s Weekly Roundup! **
---
|
---
**Talking with voters in Morgan County**
|
---
**Meeting delegates from Tooele County**
|
---
**Checking out campaign art with future voters**
---
**Cottage meeting in Morgan County**
| Don't forget to **follow my campaign journey on social media** as #TeamBecky attends events and enjoys the spring weather around the state! **We hope to see you there!**
---
| | | | | | [](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=2698288a6c&e=10c1db3257)

| **As always,**** thank you **for your enduring support. **Together, we can bring more productive, proactive, and inclusive solutions to Washington. **

clean_body: Our campaign has a new priority issue. What do you think? | | | | | | Dear friends, It’s time for a fresh start. April marks the beginning of a new chapter for #TeamBecky, and with the Republican convention just three weeks away, I am thrilled to introduce the new priority I hope to take to the U.S. Senate! | | I love Utah and the people of our great state. Utahns are creative, innovative, and hard-working. It has always been my commitment to bring Utah values to Washington D.C. ; that's why in 2022,** I plan to bring a cookie and soda shop to EVERY state in the country! Utahns set the blueprint for doing sweets right, and it's time for Americans everywhere to have a treat. | As your U.S. Senator, I promise to encourage and support resolutions for sips and sweets nationwide! If you agree, sign my petition below and support our fight! | | "SIGN NOW!" | Okay, okay! Although it would be a delight to have cookie and soda shops nationwide, I have to admit I will not be using sips and sweets as my priority in the U.S. Senate. Happy April Fools! | | Thousands of hours logged, hundreds of miles traveled, and over 400 signature events held. THIS is the dedication our phenomenal volunteers and signature team have given to this campaign over the past three months. Thanks to their efforts, we have submitted over 44,000 signatures to the Utah Office of Elections! Our campaign has defied expectations. We gathered and submitted57% more signatures than the requirement , going above and beyond to bring more productive, proactive, and inclusive solutions to Washington D.C. I am overjoyed by the unprecedented grassroots support our campaign has received thus far, and your support helped #TeamBecky to reach voters in every corner of the state. We are within arm’s reach of securing our spot on the ballot, but we won’t slow down until we’ve crossed the finish line—and we need your help to get there! If you haven’t submitted your signatures, turn them inASAP. To submit your signatures, mail your packet to Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate, P.O. Box 1467, Bountiful, Utah 84011 , or visit one of these locations: 1121 Eaglewood Loop, North Salt Lake – Anytime 1777 Somerset Ridge, Dr, Draper – Anytime Harmony, 275 E Center Street, Provo – Business Hours | | In case you missed it, check out #TeamBecky’s Weekly Roundup! | Talking with voters in Morgan County | Meeting delegates from Tooele County | Checking out campaign art with future voters Cottage meeting in Morgan County | Don't forget to follow my campaign journey on social media as #TeamBecky attends events and enjoys the spring weather around the state! We hope to see you there! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | As always, thank you for your enduring support. Together, we can bring more productive, proactive, and inclusive solutions to Washington. | | | | | Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate P.O. Box 1467 Bountiful, UT 84011 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . Paid for by Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate.

subject: The Pace Is Picking Up!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
Be Part Of A GREAT Team! | | | |
---
|
# **Newsletter-April 1 Vol. 2, #8**
---
| | |
##
1 April 22

**Thank You! The campaign's pace is picking up. **

**Sign Waving - One Power Hour**
Tomorrow, Saturday, April 2, you're invited to sign wave for one power hour with the Jeff Warner For Congress campaign.
1-2p
You should be able to park at Olive Garden (14650 Baltimore Ave, Laurel, 20707)
Please park as far as possible from the building so we don't limit customer access.
Let's meet at the intersection of Route 1 (Baltimore Ave.) & Cherry Lane by the Exxon gas station.

If you have a sign, please bring it. If you have a sign and are not planning on sign waving or posting, please let us know so we can put it to use and stretch our limited funds. Consider dressing layers and bring your BIG smile.

**Gerrymandering Court Case**
The legislature passed another severely gerrymandered map and we're still pressing on.
[Please contact Governor Hogan](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e5e9e59953&e=12a37459a2) (and select "Other") and ask him to veto SB1012 to uphold the Maryland Constitution and so residents are fairly represented in Congress. Remember, voters should choose their representatives. Representatives should not choose their voters!
.
**Phone Calling**
Reaching out to voters through our online phone calling system has reached over 1500 voters. A BIG THANK YOU, to everyone who reached out.

Please keep in mind, around 2% of calls, involve speaking with voters. The goal is to introduce the campaign through a pre-recorded message from Jeff Warner to the voter's voicemail which appears to be a personal call from their next Congressman, Jeff Warner.

You can make an impact no matter where you live in the nation. Please email the campaign at info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com if you’re in interested in getting trained in order to receive the training info. It's easy.

**Important Details:**
Phone calls are audio only, no video.
A sample script is provided.
The system is all online. Anyone in the USA can assist.
Serve from home (or anyplace you'd like). There is no call center.
Your phone and phone number are not used and are therefore protected.
You choose how much you'd like to call.

Thank You for your support. The campaign continues to make and break records. Come and be a part of this amazing team. Imagine how good it will be to say you were part of this team in November as we celebrate our historic victory!

[**Donate Here**](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=4f124c5bb6&e=12a37459a2)

Remember, Jeff Warner is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Standing with you,

Jeff
---
